                   </li>\n                            ))}\n                        </ul>\n                    </div>\n                )}\n            </div>\n\n            {/* 3.         <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n                                <div className=\"flex items-baseline gap-3\">\n                                    <span className=\"text-emerald-500/70            </div>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n    )\n}\n\nfunction FullScriptSection({\n    script,\n    scriptRawContent,\n    scriptPlaceholder,\n    detectedLanguageLabel,\n    canSeek,\n    onSeek,\n    t,\n}: {\n    script?: Output\n    scriptRawContent?: string\n    scriptPlaceholder: string\n    detectedLanguageLabel: string\n    canSeek: boolean\n    onSeek: (seconds: number) => void\n    t: (key: string, vars?: Record<string, string | number>) => string\n}) {\n    const [isCopied, setIsCopied] = useState(false)\n\n    const handleCopy = async () => {\n        if (!scriptRawContent) return\n\n        const blocks = buildTranscriptBlocks(scriptRawContent)\n        const textToCopy = blocks.map(b => b.text).join(\"\\n\\n\")\n\n        try {\n            await navigator.clipboard.writeText(textToCopy)\n            setIsCopied(true)\n            setTimeout(() => setIsCopied(false), 2000)\n        } catch (err) {\n            console.error(\"Failed to copy:\", err)\n        }\n    }\n\n    return (\n        <Card className=\"bg-black/20 border-white/5 relative group\">\n            <div className=\"absolute top-3 right-3 md:top-4 md:right-4 opacity-100 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity z-10\">\n                <Button\n                    variant=\"ghost\"\n                    size=\"sm\"\n                    className=\"h-8 gap-2 bg-black/50 hover:bg-black/70 text-muted-foreground hover:text-white border border-white/10\"\n                    onClick={handleCopy}\n                >\n                    {isCopied ? <Check className=\"h-4 w-4 text-green-500\" /> : <Copy className=\"h-4 w-4\" />}\n                    {isCopied ? t(\"tasks.copied\") : t(\"tasks.copyToClipboard\")}\n                </Button>\n            </div>\n\n            <CardHeader className=\"pb-2\">\n                <div className=\"space-y-1\">\n                    <div className=\"text-sm text-muted-foreground\">\n                        {t(\"tasks.originalScriptLanguage\", { language: detectedLanguageLabel })}\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n            </CardHeader>\n            <CardContent className=\"pt-0\">\n                <TranscriptTimeline\n                    scriptRawContent={scriptRawContent}\n                    canSeek={canSeek}\n                    onSeek={onSeek}\n                    emptyFallback={<OutputCard output={script} placeholder={scriptPlaceholder} isScript={true} />}\n                />\n            </CardContent>\n        </Card>\n    )\n}\n\nfunction OutputCard({ output, placeholder, isScript = false }: { output?: Output, placeholder?: string, isScript?: boolean }) {\n    const { t } = useI18n()\n    const [isCopied, setIsCopied] = useState(false)\n\n    const cleanedContent = isScript ? stripRedundantTranscriptHeaders(output?.content) : output?.content\n\n    const handleCopy = async () => {\n        if (!cleanedContent) return\n        try {\n            await navigator.clipboard.writeText(cleanedContent)\n            setIsCopied(true)\n            setTimeout(() => setIsCopied(false), 2000)\n        } catch (err) {\n            console.error('Failed to copy:', err)\n        }\n    }\n\n    if (!output) {\n        return (\n            <Card className=\"bg-black/20 border-white/5 min-h-[220px] md:min-h-[300px] flex items-center justify-center\">\n                <CardContent className=\"text-center text-muted-foreground p-6 md:p-10\">\n                    <div className=\"mb-4 flex justify-center\">\n                        <div className=\"h-12 w-12 rounded-full bg-white/5 flex items-center justify-center mx-auto\">\n                            {isScript ? <Subtitles className=\"h-6 w-6 opacity-50\" /> : <FileText className=\"h-6 w-6 opacity-50\" />}\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                    {placeholder || t(\"tasks.contentPending\")}\n                </CardContent>\n            </Card>\n        )\n    }\n\n    if (output.status === 'error') {\n        return (\n            <Card className=\"bg-red-950/20 border-red-500/30\">\n                <CardContent className=\"p-6 flex flex-col items-center gap-4 text-red-300\">\n                    <p>{t(\"tasks.failedToGenerate\", { error: output.error_message || \"\" })}</p>\n                    <p className=\"text-sm text-red-200/80\">{t(\"tasks.processingHint1\")}</p>\n                </CardContent>\n            </Card>\n        )\n    }\n\n    if (output.status === 'processing' || output.status === 'pending') {\n        return (\n            <Card className=\"bg-black/20 border-white/5 min-h-[220px] md:min-h-[300px] flex items-center justify-center\">\n                <CardContent className=\"p-6 md:p-10 text-center space-y-4\">\n                    <div className=\"flex justify-center\"><div className=\"animate-spin rounded-full h-8 w-8 border-b-2 border-primary\"></div></div>\n                    <div>\n                        <p className=\"font-medium text-foreground\">{t(\"tasks.generatingContent\")}</p>\n                        <p className=\"text-sm text-muted-foreground mt-1\">{t(\"tasks.percentComplete\", { percent: output.progress })}</p>\n                    </div>\n                </CardContent>\n            </Card>\n        )\n    }\n\n    return (\n        <Card className=\"bg-black/20 border-white/5 relative group\">\n            <div className=\"absolute top-3 right-3 md:top-4 md:right-4 opacity-100 md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity z-10\">\n                <Button\n                    variant=\"ghost\"\n                    size=\"sm\"\n                    className=\"h-8 gap-2 bg-black/50 hover:bg-black/70 text-muted-foreground hover:text-white border border-white/10\"\n                    onClick={handleCopy}\n                >\n                    {isCopied ? <Check className=\"h-4 w-4 text-green-500\" /> : <Copy className=\"h-4 w-4\" />}\n                    {isCopied ? t(\"tasks.copied\") : t(\"tasks.copyToClipboard\")}\n                </Button>\n            </div>\n            <CardContent className=\"p-4 pt-12 md:p-8 md:pt-10\">\n                <div className=\"prose prose-invert prose-base md:prose-lg max-w-none prose-headings:text-primary prose-a:text-primary prose-strong:text-white prose-strong:font-bold\">\n                    <Markdown\n                        components={{\n                            strong: ({ ...props }) => <strong className=\"text-primary font-mono bg-primary/10 px-1 rounded\" {...props} />\n                        }}\n                    >\n                        {cleanedContent}\n                    </Markdown>\n                </div>\n            </CardContent>\n        </Card>\n    )\n}\n\nfunction stripRedundantTranscriptHeaders(content?: string) {\n    if (!content) return content\n\n    const lines = content.split(\"\\n\")\n    const filtered = lines.filter((line) => {\n        const trimmed = line.trim()\n        if (!trimmed) return true\n        if (/^\\*\\*Detected Language:\\*\\*/i.test(trimmed)) return false\n        if (/^##\\s*Transcription Content\\b/i.test(trimmed)) return false\n        if (/^#\\s*Video Transcription\\b/i.test(trimmed)) return false\n        return true\n    })\n\n    return filtered.join(\"\\n\").replace(/\\n{3,}/g, \"\\n\\n\").trim()\n}\n\nfunction TaskProgress({\n    task,\n    isSubscribed,\n    permission,\n    onNotify,\n    t,\n}: {\n    task: Task\n    isSubscribed: boolean\n    permission: string\n    onNotify: () => void\n    t: (key: string, vars?: Record<string, string | number>) => string\n}) {\n    const [stepIndex, setStepIndex] = useState(0)\n\n    useEffect(() => {\n        const interval = setInterval(() => {\n            setStepIndex((i) => i + 1)\n        }, 4000)\n        return () => clearInterval(interval)\n    }, [])\n\n    const getStatusMessage = () => {\n        const p = task.progress\n        let step = 1\n\n        if (p < 20) {\n            step = (stepIndex % 2) + 1\n        } else if (p < 80) {\n            step = (stepIndex % 2) + 3\n        } else {\n            step = 5\n        }\n\n        return t(`tasks.statusSteps.step${step}`)\n    }\n\n    return (\n        <div className=\"space-y-4 mb-8 p-6 bg-primary/5 rounded-xl border border-primary/10 transition-all duration-500\">\n            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3\">\n                <div className=\"animate-spin rounded-full h-5 w-5 border-b-2 border-primary\"></div>\n                <span className=\"font-medium text-primary flex-1 transition-all duration-300\">\n                    {getStatusMessage()}\n                </span>\n                <span className=\"ml-auto font-mono text-muted-foreground\">{task.progress}%</span>\n            </div>\n\n            <div className=\"relative\">\n                <Progress value={task.progress} className=\"h-2 transition-all duration-1000\" />\n            </div>\n\n            <p className=\"text-xs text-muted-foreground text-center animate-pulse\">\n                {t(\"tasks.processingHint1\")}\n                <br />\n                {t(\"tasks.processingHint2\")}\n            </p>\n\n            <div className=\"flex justify-center pt-2\">\n                {isSubscribed ? (\n                    <Button variant=\"outline\" size=\"sm\" className=\"gap-2 text-green-600 border-green-600/20 bg-green-500/10 pointer-events-none\">\n                        <Bell className=\"h-4 w-4\" />\n                        {t(\"tasks.notificationEnabled\")}\n                    </Button>\n                ) : (\n                    <Button\n                        variant=\"outline\"\n                        size=\"sm\"\n                        className=\"gap-2\"\n                        onClick={onNotify}\n                        disabled={permission === \"denied\"}\n                    >\n                        {permission === \"denied\" ? <BellOff className=\"h-4 w-4\" /> : <Bell className=\"h-4 w-4\" />}\n                        {t(\"tasks.enableNotifications\")}\n                    </Button>\n                )}\n            </div>\n        </div>\n    )\n}\n\nfunction MindMapSection({\n    outputs,\n    t,\n    locale,\n}: {\n    outputs: Output[]\n    t: (key: string, vars?: Record<string, string | number>) => string\n    locale: string\n}) {\n    const summaryOutputs = outputs.filter(o => o.kind === 'summary' && o.status === 'completed')\n    const summarySource = outputs.find(o => o.kind === 'summary_source' && o.status === 'completed')\n\n    const parseSummary = (output?: Output) => {\n        if (!output?.content) return null\n        try {\n            const obj = JSON.parse(output.content) as StructuredSummaryV1\n            if (!obj || typeof obj !== \"object\") return null\n            if (typeof obj.overview !== \"string\") return null\n            if (!Array.isArray(obj.keypoints)) return null\n            return obj\n        } catch {\n            return null\n        }\n    }\n\n    const availableLocales = useMemo(() => {\n        const map = new Map<string, { output: Output; parsed: StructuredSummaryV1; isSource?: boolean }>()\n\n        if (summarySource) {\n            const parsed = parseSummary(summarySource)\n            if (parsed) {\n                const lang = (parsed.language || 'source').toLowerCase()\n                map.set(lang, { output: summarySource, parsed, isSource: true })\n            }\n        }\n\n        for (const output of summaryOutputs) {\n            const parsed = parseSummary(output)\n            if (parsed) {\n                const lang = (parsed.language || output.locale || 'unknown').toLowerCase()\n                if (!map.has(lang) || map.get(lang)?.isSource) {\n                    map.set(lang, { output, parsed })\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        return map\n    }, [summaryOutputs, summarySource])\n\n    const initialLocale = useMemo(() => {\n        if (availableLocales.has(locale)) return locale\n        if (availableLocales.has('en')) return 'en'\n        const keys = Array.from(availableLocales.keys())\n        return keys[0] || 'source'\n    }, [availableLocales, locale])\n\n    const [selectedLocale, setSelectedLocale] = useState<string>(initialLocale)\n    const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(false)\n\n    const current = availableLocales.get(selectedLocale) || availableLocales.get(initialLocale)\n    const parsed = current?.parsed || null\n\n    const mindMapData: MindMapNode | null = parsed ? {\n        content: parsed.overview,\n        children: parsed.keypoints\n            .filter(kp => kp.title)\n            .map((kp, idx) => ({\n                content: `${idx + 1}. ${kp.title}`,\n                children: kp.evidence ? [{ content: kp.evidence, children: [] }] : []\n            }))\n    } : null\n\n    const anySummary = summaryOutputs[0] || summarySource || outputs.find(o => o.kind === 'summary')\n\n    if (!anySummary) {\n        return (\n            <Card className=\"bg-black/20 border-white/5 min-h-[500px] flex items-center justify-center\">\n                <CardContent className=\"text-center text-muted-foreground p-6 md:p-10\">\n                    <div className=\"mb-4 flex justify-center\">\n                        <div className=\"h-12 w-12 rounded-full bg-white/5 flex items-center justify-center mx-auto\">\n                            <Network className=\"h-6 w-6 opacity-50\" />\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                    {t(\"tasks.contentPending\")}\n                </CardContent>\n            </Card>\n        )\n    }\n\n    if (anySummary.status === \"error\") {\n        return (\n            <Card className=\"bg-red-950/20 border-red-500/30\">\n                <CardContent className=\"p-6 flex flex-col items-center gap-4 text-red-300\">\n                    <p>{t(\"tasks.failedToGenerate\", { </CardContent>\n            </Card>\n        )\n    }\n\n    const getLocaleLabel = (lang: string) => {\n        if (lang in LOCALE_LABEL) {\n            return LOCALE_LABEL[lang as Locale]\n        <Button\n                            variant=\"outline\"\n                            size=\"sm\"\n                            onClick={() => setIsOpen(!isOpen)}\n                            className=\"gap-2 h-8 px-3 bg-black/30 border-white/10 hover:bg-black/50 hover:border-white/20\"\n                        >\n                            <Languages className=\"h-4 w-4\" />\n 'text-primary' : 'text-white/80'\n                                                }`}\n                                        >\n                                            {selectedLocale === loc && <Check className=\"h-3 w-3\" />}\n                                            <span className={selectedLocale === loc ? Task History 作为**资源库**，用于快速访问已处理内容\n\n这是一个重大的 UX 范式转变：从 \"任务管理\" 转向 \"对话式工作流\"。\n\n## 需要澄清的问题：\n\n1. **Chat 界面布局**：\n   - 当用户在 Chat 中输入 YouTube URL 后，视频卡片如何展示？\n   - 是在 Chat 消息流中内嵌？还是分屏显示（左侧 Chat，右侧视频预览）？\n\n2. **多任务处理**：\n   - 如果用户在一个 Chat 会话中输入多个 YouTube URL，如何处理？\n   - 每个 URL 创建新的 Thread？还是在同一个 Thread 中？\n   \n3. **资源库的交互方式**：当用户从 Task History 访问已处理的任务时，是在 Chat 中加载新会话并恢复该任务的上下文，还是跳转到独立的只读页面？\n\n4. **导航架构**：主导航应该如何重组？是 Chat（主页）| Library（任务库）| Settings，还是保留 Dashboard？\n\n5. **Thread 管理**：如何组织和管理多个对话线程，确保用户能够轻松切换和追踪不同的任务？\n\n需要先明确这些设计决策才能制定具体的实施方案。",

          "text": "完美！基于你的回答，我现在可以制定详细的重构计划了。让我先总结一下你的愿景：\n\n## 📋 核心架构决策总结\n\n**UX 范式：** 从\"任务管理\"转向\"对话式工作流\"\n\n**关键决策：**\n1. ✅ **分屏布局**：左侧 Chat 主对话区，右侧视频详情面板\n2. ✅ **一对一关系**：1 Thread = 1 Task（专注单视频讨论）\n3. ✅ **Library 行为**：点击后在 Chat 中打开新会话（带上下文）\n4. ✅ **完全 Chat 中心**：Library 作为 Chat 内的侧边栏\n5. ✅ **多URL处理**：检测到多个 URL 时询问用户意图\n\n---\n\n## 🎯 重构计划\n\n让我为你制定分阶段实施计划：\n\n### **Phase 1: 核心 Chat 界面重构** (高优先级)\n\n#### 1.1 Chat 页面布局改造\n- **目标**：实现 AnyGen 风格的分屏布局\n- **结构**：\n  ```\n  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐\n  │  [Logo] [Library Trigger]          [User]   │ ← Top Bar\n  ├──────────────┬──────────────────────────────┤\n  │              │                              │\n  │   Chat       │   Video Detail Panel         │\n  │   Messages   │   (折叠/展开状态)             │\n  │   +          │   - 视频播放器                │\n  │   Input      │   - Summary Tabs             │\n  │              │   - Script Timeline          │\n  │              │                              │\n  └──────────────┴──────────────────────────────┘\n  ```\n\n- **关键组件**：\n  - `ChatContainer` (左侧主聊天区)\n  - `VideoDetailPanel` (右侧可折叠面板，复用现有 TaskDetailClient 组件)\n  - `LibrarySidebar` (从左侧滑出的资源库)\n\n#### 1.2 AI SDK Tool 集成\n- **实现 Custom Tool**: `process_video_tool`\n  - 用户输入 URL → AI 调用 `process_video_tool`\n  - Tool 返回视频卡片渲染指令\n  - Chat 消息流显示\"Processing...\" 状态卡片\n  - 完成后更新为交互式视频卡片\n\n#### 1.3 Message 消息流增强\n- **Rich Message Components**:\n  - `VideoCardMessage`: 显示视频缩略图 + 标题 + 状态\n  - `ProcessingMessage`: 实时进度更新（连接 Supabase Realtime）\n  - `CompletedMessage`: 包含\"Open Detail Panel\"按钮\n\n---\n\n### **Phase 2: 导航结构重构** (中优先级)\n\n#### 2.1 移除 Dashboard，Chat 成为首页\n- **路由变更**：\n  - `/` → 重定向到 `/chat`\n  - `/dashboard` → 移除或重定向\n  - `/tasks/[id]/[slug]` → 废弃（统一通过 Chat 访问）\n\n#### 2.2 Library 侧边栏\n- **触发方式**：Top Bar 左侧按钮 + 键盘快捷键 (`Cmd+K`)\n- **内容**：\n  - Recent Threads（最近对话）\n  - All Tasks（按时间/标签过滤）\n  - Search（全局搜索）\n\n- **点击行为**：\n  - 点击 Task → 加载到当前 Chat，创建新 Thread\n  - 预加载 Task 上下文（Summary + Script）到 AI 系统提示\n\n---\n\n### **Phase 3: Backend AI 工作流调整** (关键)\n\n#### 3.1 Chat API 增强\n- **新端点**: `POST /api/chat` (已存在，需增强)\n  - 支持 Tool Calling: `process_video`\n  - 参数: `{ video_url, language?, ... }`\n  - 返回: Streaming response with Tool Call Results\n\n#### 3.2 Thread-Task 绑定逻辑\n- **数据库更新**:\n  ```sql\n  ALTER TABLE chat_threads ADD COLUMN task_id UUID REFERENCES tasks(id);\n  CREATE INDEX idx_threads_task_id ON chat_threads(task_id);\n  ```\n\n- **工作流**：\n  1. 用户发送 YouTube URL\n  2. AI 识别 URL，调用 `process_video` Tool\n  3. Backend 创建 Task，绑定到当前 Thread\n  4. 返回 Task ID 给前端，触发 Detail Panel 打开\n\n#### 3.3 多 URL 检测逻辑\n- **Frontend 预处理**：\n  - 输入前检测消息中是否包含多个 YouTube URL\n  - 如果是，弹出确认框：\n    ```\n    检测到多个视频链接：\n    • [URL 1]\n    • [URL 2]\n    \n    ⚪ 分别处理（创建多个对话）\n    ⚪ 合并分析（在一个对话中对比）\n    ```\n\n---\n\n### **Phase 4: 移动端适配** (低优先级)\n\n#### 4.1 响应式布局\n- **Mobile (<768px)**:\n  - 全屏 Chat 视图\n  - 点击视频卡片 → 打开全屏 Detail 页面（类似现在的 Task Detail）\n  - Library 从底部滑出（Sheet）\n\n- **Tablet (768px - 1024px)**:\n  - 可选分屏或全屏模式切换\n\n---\n\n### **Phase 5: 数据迁移 & 兼容性** (必需)\n\n#### 5.1 现有 Tasks 迁移\n- **为每个现有 Task 创建对应的 Thread**：\n  ```sql\n  INSERT INTO chat_threads (task_id, title, user_id, created_at)\n  SELECT id, video_title, user_id, created_at FROM tasks\n  WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT task_id FROM chat_threads WHERE task_id IS NOT NULL);\n  ```\n\n#### 5.2 URL 重定向\n- **老链接兼容**：\n  - `/tasks/[id]/[slug]` → 重定向到 `/chat?openTask=[id]`\n  - 前端检测 `openTask` 参数，自动打开 Detail Panel\n\n---\n\n## 📂 文件结构预览\n\n```\nfrontend/src/\n├── app/[lang]/\n│   ├── chat/                    # 新主页（Chat 中心）\n│   │   ├── page.tsx             # Chat 主界面\n│   │   └── ChatWorkspace.tsx    # 核心组件\n│   ├── (main)/\n│   │   ├── library/             # 独立 Library 页面（可选保留）\n│   │   └── tasks/               # 废弃或仅作 SEO/分享链接\n│   └── page.tsx                 # 重定向到 /chat\n├── components/\n│   ├── chat/\n│   │   ├── AssistantChat.tsx    # 现有（需增强）\n│   │   ├── ChatWorkspace.tsx    # 新：分屏容器\n│   │   ├── VideoDetailPanel.tsx # 新：右侧面板\n│   │   ├── LibrarySidebar.tsx   # 新：资源库侧边栏\n│   │   └── messages/\n│   │       ├── VideoCardMessage.tsx     # 视频卡片消息\n│   │       ├── ProcessingMessage.tsx    # 处理中状态\n│   │       └── CompletedMessage.tsx     # 完成状态\n│   └── tasks/                   # 复用现有组件\n│       ├── VideoEmbed.tsx       # 保留\n│       └── SummarySection.tsx   # 保留\n└── lib/\n    └── tools/\n        └── process_video.ts     # AI SDK Tool 定义\n```\n\n---\n\n## 🚀 实施步骤建议\n\n**建议顺序：**\n1. **Week 1**: Phase 3（Backend AI 工作流）+ Phase 5（数据迁移）\n2. **Week 2**: Phase 1（Chat 界面重构）\n3. **Week 3**: Phase 2（导航结构）\n4. **Week 4**: Phase 4（移动端）+ 测试优化\n\n---\n\n## ❓ 需要确认的技术细节\n\n在开始实施前，还有几个技术细节需要确认：\n\n1. **AI Tool Calling 实现方式**：\n   - 使用 Vercel AI SDK 的 `tools` 参数？\n   - 还是自定义 Function Calling 解析？\n\n2. **Video Detail Panel 状态管理**：\n   - Panel 打开/关闭状态存储在 URL Query（`?panel=open`）？\n   - 还是仅本地 State？\n\n3. **Library 数据获取**：\n   - 是否需要分页/虚拟滚动（如果用户有大量 Tasks）？\n   - 按什么维度分组（时间/标签/来源）？\n\n**准备好开始实施了吗？** 我们可以从任何一个 Phase 开始，或者你希望我先准备更详细的技术设计文档？",

              "content": "# VibeDigest Chat-First Redesign - Overview\n\n> **Status**: Planning Phase  \n> **Last Updated**: 2025-01-18  \n> **Version**: 2.0 (Major Redesign)\n\n---\n\n## 🎯 Vision Statement\n\nTransform VibeDigest from a **task-management-centric** application into a **conversation-first knowledge extraction platform**, where AI chat becomes the primary interface for video processing and interaction.\n\n---\n\n## 🔄 Paradigm Shift\n\n### **From (v1.x - Current)**\n```\nUser Flow:\n1. Land on Dashboard\n2. Submit YouTube URL via form\n3. Wait on Task List\n4. Click Task Card → View Detail Page\n5. Read Summary/Script in tabs\n```\n\n**Mental Model**: \"Video Processing Queue Manager\"\n\n### **To (v2.0 - Target)**\n```\nUser Flow:\n1. Land on Chat Interface\n2. Paste YouTube URL in conversation\n3. AI processes and opens video in side panel\n4. Chat with AI about the video content\n5. Browse past videos in Library sidebar\n```\n\n**Mental Model**: \"AI Research Assistant with Video Knowledge\"\n\n---\n\n## 📐 Core Architecture Decisions\n\n### 1. **Layout: Split-Screen Workspace**\n\n```\n┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐\n│  [☰ Library] VibeDigest               [User Avatar]     │\n├───────────────────────┬─────────────────────────────────┤\n│                       │                                 │\n│   Chat Thread         │   Video Detail Panel            │\n│   ┌─────────────┐     │   ┌───────────────────────┐     │\n│   │ User: URL   │     │   │  [Video Player]       │     │\n│   └─────────────┘     │   └───────────────────────┘     │\n│   ┌─────────────┐     │   ┌───────────────────────┐     │\n│   │ AI: Card    │────→│   │  Summary | Script     │     │\n│   │ [Processing]│     │   │  [Interactive Tabs]   │     │\n│   └─────────────┘     │   └───────────────────────┘     │\n│   ┌─────────────┐     │                                 │\n│   │ User: Q&A   │     │   [Collapse Panel Button]       │\n│   └─────────────┘     │                                 │\n│                       │                                 │\n│   [Input Box]         │                                 │\n└───────────────────────┴─────────────────────────────────┘\n    60% width (flex-1)      40% width (collapsible)\n```\n\n**Desktop (≥1024px)**: Always split-screen  \n**Tablet (768-1023px)**: Optional split or full-screen toggle  \n**Mobile (<768px)**: Stack layout, video opens in modal\n\n---\n\n### 2. **Data Model: Thread-Task Relationship**\n\n**Rule**: `1 Chat Thread = 1 Task (Video)`\n\n```mermaid\nerDiagram\n    USERS ||--o{ CHAT_THREADS : creates\n    USERS ||--o{ TASKS : owns\n    CHAT_THREADS ||--|| TASKS : \"binds to\"\n    CHAT_THREADS ||--o{ MESSAGES : contains\n    \n    CHAT_THREADS {\n        uuid id PK\n        uuid user_id FK\n        uuid task_id FK \"NEW: Binding to task\"\n        string title\n        timestamp created_at\n    }\n    \n    TASKS {\n        uuid id PK\n        uuid user_id FK\n        string video_url\n        string status\n    }\n```\n\n**Implications**:\n- When user submits URL in chat → Create Task + Thread simultaneously\n- Thread title = Video title (from metadata)\n- Library shows all Tasks, clicking opens associated Thread\n\n---\n\n### 3. **Navigation: Chat-Centric**\n\n**New Navigation Structure**:\n```\n┌─────────────────────────────────────┐\n│  Chat (Default Homepage)            │ ← / or /chat\n│  ├── Library Sidebar (⌘K)           │ ← Overlay panel\n│  └── Video Detail Panel (Context)   │ ← Right panel\n└─────────────────────────────────────┘\n```\n\n**Removed Pages**:\n- ❌ `/dashboard` (replaced by `/chat`)\n- ❌ `/tasks/[id]/[slug]` (replaced by chat + panel)\n\n**Retained Pages**:\n- ✅ `/settings`\n- ✅ `/login`\n- ✅ `/` (Landing page for non-authenticated users)\n\n---\n\n### 4. **AI Workflow: Tool-Calling Pattern**\n\n**Implementation**: Vercel AI SDK `tools` parameter\n\n```typescript\n// Simplified example\nconst { messages } = useChat({\n  api: '/api/chat',\n  tools: {\n    process_video: {\n      description: 'Process a YouTube video URL',\n      parameters: z.object({\n        video_url: z.string().url(),\n        language: z.string().optional(),\n      }),\n      execute: async ({ video_url, language }) => {\n        // Backend creates Task, starts processing\n        return { task_id, status: 'processing' }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n})\n```\n\n**User Experience**:\n1. User: \"Summarize https://youtube.com/watch?v=...\"\n2. AI: Calls `process_video` tool\n3. UI: Shows \"Processing...\" card in chat\n4. Backend: Creates Task, runs workflow\n5. Realtime: Updates card status → \"Completed\"\n6. UI: Enables \"Open Detail Panel\" button\n7. User: Clicks button → Right panel opens with full video UI\n\n---\n\n### 5. **Library Behavior**\n\n**Trigger**: Button in top-left + Keyboard shortcut (`Cmd+K`)\n\n**UI Pattern**: Slide-out sidebar (similar to VS Code Command Palette)\n\n**Contents**:\n- 🕐 Recent Threads (last 10)\n- 📚 All Tasks (paginated, searchable)\n- 🏷️ Tags/Categories (if implemented)\n\n**Click Action**:\n```\nUser clicks Task in Library\n  ↓\nCheck if Thread exists for this Task\n  ↓\nIf YES: Navigate to Thread, load messages\nIf NO: Create new Thread, inject Task context as system prompt\n  ↓\nOpen Video Detail Panel with Task data\n```\n\n---\n\n### 6. **Multi-URL Handling**\n\n**Detection**: Frontend pre-processes input before sending to AI\n\n```typescript\nfunction detectYouTubeURLs(message: string): string[] {\n  const regex = /https?:\\/\\/(www\\.)?(youtube\\.com|youtu\\.be)\\/\\S+/g\n  return message.match(regex) || []\n}\n```\n\n**User Flow**:\n```\nUser pastes: \"Compare these:\n  https://youtube.com/watch?v=A\n  https://youtube.com/watch?v=B\"\n\n↓ Frontend detects 2 URLs\n\n↓ Show confirmation dialog:\n\n┌─────────────────────────────────────┐\n│ Detected 2 video links:             │\n│ • Video A (3:45)                    │\n│ • Video B (12:30)                   │\n│                                     │\n│ How should I process them?          │\n│ ⚪ Separately (2 threads)            │\n│ ⚪ Compare in one conversation       │\n│ [Cancel] [Confirm]                  │\n└─────────────────────────────────────┘\n```\n\n**Backend Handling**:\n- **Separately**: Create 2 Tasks + 2 Threads\n- **Compare**: Create 2 Tasks, 1 Thread (Thread references both Tasks)\n\n---\n\n## 🎨 Design Principles\n\n1. **Conversation First**: Every action happens through chat dialogue\n2. **Context Aware**: Video detail panel follows chat focus\n3. **Progressive Disclosure**: Don't show all info upfront, expand on demand\n4. **Keyboard Driven**: Power users can do everything via keyboard\n5. **Stateful but Stateless**: UI reflects backend state, no optimistic updates\n\n---\n\n## 📊 Success Metrics\n\n**Pre-Launch Validation**:\n- [ ] User can submit URL and see video in <10 seconds\n- [ ] Chat + Panel loads in <2 seconds (LCP)\n- [ ] Library opens in <300ms\n- [ ] Mobile UX scores >90 on Lighthouse\n\n**Post-Launch KPIs**:\n- **Engagement**: Average messages per session (Target: >5)\n- **Retention**: D7 return rate (Target: >30%)\n- **Efficiency**: Time from URL submission to first Q&A (Target: <20s)\n\n---\n\n## 🗂️ Document Structure\n\nThis redesign is documented across multiple files:\n\n- **00_overview.md** (This file) - High-level vision and decisions\n- **01_user_flows.md** - Detailed user journey maps\n- **02_technical_architecture.md** - System design and API contracts\n- **03_ui_components.md** - Component library and design system\n- **04_data_model.md** - Database schema changes\n- **05_implementation_plan.md** - Phase-by-phase execution roadmap\n- **06_migration_strategy.md** - Backward compatibility and data migration\n\n---\n\n## 🚦 Current Status\n\n- [x] Architecture decisions finalized\n- [x] User flows documented\n- [ ] Technical specs in progress\n- [ ] Implementation pending approval\n\n**Next Steps**: Review this overview, then proceed to detailed technical docs.\n"

VibeDigest 2.0 Redesign - Execution Index\n\n## Execution Order\n\nAgent should execute tasks in this strict order:\n\n1. **Read Context**\n   - [ ] `architecture/00_system_overview.md`\n   - [ ] `reference/existing_codebase.md`\n\n2. **Phase 1: Backend Foundation**\n   - [ ] `tasks/phase-1-backend/task-1.1-database-migration.md`\n   - [ ] `tasks/phase-1-backend/task-1.2-ai-tool-calling.md`\n   - [ ] `tasks/phase-1-backend/task-1.3-thread-task-binding.md`\n\n3. **Phase 2: Frontend UI**\n   - [ ] `tasks/phase-2-frontend/task-2.1-chat-workspace.md`\n   - [ ] `tasks/phase-2-frontend/task-2.2-video-detail-panel.md`\n   - [ ] `tasks/phase-2-frontend/task-2.3-library-sidebar.md`\n\n4. **Validation**\n   - [ ] Run `validation/test_scenarios.md`\n   - [ ] Verify `validation/acceptance_criteria.md`\n\n## Quick Reference\n\n- **Current Architecture**: See `AGENTS.md` (root)\n- **Design Decisions**: `reference/decisions.md`\n- **API Contracts**: `specifications/11_api_contracts.md`\n```\n\n---\n\n#### **示例 2: `tasks/phase-1-backend/task-1.1-database-migration.md`**\n\n```markdown\n# Task 1.1: Database Migration - Thread-Task Binding\n\n## Metadata\n```yaml\nid: task-1.1\nphase: 1-backend\npriority: critical\nestimated_time: 2 hours\ndependencies: []\n```\n\n## Objective\nAdd `task_id` foreign key to `chat_threads` table to bind threads to tasks.\n\n## Prerequisites\n- [ ] Postgres database accessible\n- [ ] Supabase CLI installed\n- [ ] Migration environment ready\n\n## Implementation Steps\n\n### Step 1: Create Migration File\n**File**: `backend/sql/migrations/20250118_add_thread_task_binding.sql`\n\n```sql\n-- Add task_id column to chat_threads\nALTER TABLE chat_threads \nADD COLUMN task_id UUID REFERENCES tasks(id) ON DELETE CASCADE;\n\n-- Create index for fast lookups\nCREATE INDEX idx_chat_threads_task_id ON chat_threads(task_id);\n\n-- Ensure one-to-one relationship (optional, depends on design)\nCREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_chat_threads_task_id_unique ON chat_threads(task_id) \nWHERE task_id IS NOT NULL;\n```\n\n**Verification Command**:\n```bash\npsql $DATABASE_URL -c \"\\d chat_threads\"\n# Should show task_id column with FK constraint\n```\n\n### Step 2: Update TypeScript Types\n**File**: `frontend/src/types/database.ts`\n\n```typescript\nexport interface ChatThread {\n  id: string\n  user_id: string\n  task_id: string | null  // NEW FIELD\n  title: string\n  created_at: string\n  updated_at: string\n}\n```\n\n### Step 3: Run Migration\n```bash\n# Development\npsql $DEV_DATABASE_URL -f backend/sql/migrations/20250118_add_thread_task_binding.sql\n\n# Verify\npsql $DEV_DATABASE_URL -c \"SELECT task_id FROM chat_threads LIMIT 1;\"\n```\n\n## Validation Checklist\n- [ ] Migration runs without errors\n- [ ] `task_id` column exists in `chat_threads`\n- [ ] Index `idx_chat_threads_task_id` created\n- [ ] TypeScript types updated\n- [ ] No existing threads broken (all `task_id` = NULL initially)\n\n## Rollback Plan\n```sql\n-- If something goes wrong:\nALTER TABLE chat_threads DROP COLUMN task_id;\nDROP INDEX IF EXISTS idx_chat_threads_task_id;\n```\n\n## Next Task\nProceed to `task-1.2-ai-tool-calling.md`\n```\n\n---\n\n#### **示例 3: `specifications/12_component_specs.md`**\n\n```markdown\n# Component Specifications\n\n## ChatWorkspace\n\n### File Path\n`frontend/src/components/chat/ChatWorkspace.tsx`\n\n### Purpose\nRoot container for split-screen chat interface.\n\n### Props Interface\n```typescript\ninterface ChatWorkspaceProps {\n  // No props - uses URL params and global state\n}\n```\n\n### State Management\n```typescript\n// Local state\nconst [isPanelOpen, setIsPanelOpen] = useState(true)\nconst [currentTaskId, setCurrentTaskId] = useState<string | null>(null)\n\n// From URL\nconst searchParams = useSearchParams()\nconst taskId = searchParams.get('task')\n```\n\n### Component Structure\n```tsx\n<div className=\"h-screen flex\">\n  <ChatContainer \n    className=\"flex-1\"\n    onTaskCreated={(taskId) => setCurrentTaskId(taskId)}\n  />\n  \n  <VideoDetailPanel\n    taskId={currentTaskId}\n    isOpen={isPanelOpen}\n    onClose={() => setIsPanelOpen(false)}\n    className=\"w-[40%]\"\n  />\n</div>\n```\n\n### Implementation Checklist\n- [ ] Create file at specified path\n- [ ] Implement responsive breakpoints (<768px hide panel)\n- [ ] Add keyboard shortcut `Cmd+\\` to toggle panel\n- [ ] Connect to URL params for deep linking\n- [ ] Add loading states\n\n### Test Commands\n```bash\n# Unit test\nnpm test -- ChatWorkspace.test.tsx\n\n# E2E test\nnpx playwright test tests/chat-workspace.spec.ts\n```\n```\n\n---\n\n### **每个 Task 文档的标准结构**\n\n所有 `tasks/` 下的文档遵循此模板：\n\n```markdown\n# Task X.Y: [Task Library Sidebar 的数据展示**\n\n```\nOption A: 简单列表（标题 + 时间）\n  ├── \"Video Title 1\" (2h ago)\n  ├── \"Video Title 2\" (1d ago)\n  └── ...\n\nOption B: 分组列表（按日期分组）\n  ├── Today\n  │   └── \"Video Title 1\"\n  ├── Yesterday\n  │   └── \"Video Title 2\"\n  └── This Week\n      └── ...\n\nOption C: 可切换视图（列表 / 网格）\n  [List View] [Grid View]\n  + 搜索框\n  + 标签筛选\n```\n\n**你的选择？** 我建议 Option B (MVP) → Option C (v2)\n\n---\n\n### **4. 移动端的交互模式**\n\n在移动端（<768px），分屏不可行，需要选择：\n\n```\nOption A: Stack 布局（Chat 在上，点击消息卡片后滑到 Video Detail）\n  ✅ 符合移动端习惯\n  ❌ 需要额外的滚动控制逻辑\n\nOption B: Tab 切换（Chat | Video Detail）\n  ✅ 实现简单\n  ❌ 用户需要来回切换\n\nOption C: Modal/Drawer（Chat 主界面，点击卡片弹出 Detail）\n  ✅ 清晰的层级关系\n  ❌ 全屏 Modal 可能感觉笨重\n```\n\n**你的选择？** 我建议 Option C（符合移动端设计规范）\n\n---\n\n### **5. 首次加载体验**\n\n用户打开 `/chat` 时，如果没有历史记录：\n\n```\nOption A: 空状态（显示引导文案 + 示例 URL）\n  \"Paste a YouTube URL to get started...\"\n  Example: https://youtube.com/watch?v=...\n\nOption B: 预加载 Demo Task（展示产品能力）\n  自动加载一个示例视频的分析结果\n\nOption C: Onboarding Tutorial（3 步引导）\n  Step 1: \"This is the chat area\"\n  Step 2: \"Paste a URL here\"\n  Step 3: \"Your video appears here\"\n```\n\n**你的选择？** 我建议 Option A（简洁、不打扰用户）\n\n---\n\n## 📝 接下来的行动计划\n\n**请你确认上述 5 个设计决策**，然后我会：\n\n1. **立即创建 P0 文档**（4 个基础文档）\n2. **根据你的决策创建 P1 前端设计文档**（约 12 个文档）\n3. **每个文档都包含**：\n   - Coding Agent 可直接执行的代码片段\n   - 明确的验证步骤\n   - 清晰的文件路径和命令\n\n创建完成后，你可以：\n- 让 Coding Agent 按顺序执行 `INDEX.md` 中的任务\n- 或者我们一起 Review 文档，调整后再开始实施\n\n**准备好了吗？请告诉我你对上述 5 个问题的选择！** 🚀",

            {
              "file": "docs/redesign/design/00_design_principles.md",
              "before": "",
              "after": "# Design Principles\n\n> **Purpose**: Define the core design philosophy for v2.0  \n> **Audience**: Designers, Frontend Developers, Coding Agents  \n> **Last Updated**: 2025-01-18\n\n---\n\n## 🎨 Core Principles\n\n### 1. **Conversation-First**\n\n**Principle**: All interactions should feel like a natural conversation, not a form submission.\n\n**Implementation**:\n- ✅ DO: Natural language input (\"Summarize https://youtu.be/...\")\n- ❌ DON'T: Multi-step forms with dropdowns\n\n**Example**:\n```\nBAD (Form-based):\n┌─────────────────────┐\n│ Video URL: [_____] │\n│ Language:  [v]     │\n│ Output:    [v]     │\n│ [Submit]           │\n└─────────────────────┘\n\nGOOD (Conversational):\n┌─────────────────────┐\n│ User: Summarize     │\n│ https://youtu.be/...│\n│                     │\n│ AI: Processing...   │\n└─────────────────────┘\n```\n\n---\n\n### 2. **Progressive Disclosure**\n\n**Principle**: Show simple views first, reveal complexity only when needed.\n\n**Implementation**:\n- Start with minimal chat interface\n- Expand to video panel when relevant\n- Hide advanced features until requested\n\n**Hierarchy**:\n```\nLevel 1: Chat input (always visible)\n  ↓\nLevel 2: Video card in messages (when URL processed)\n  ↓\nLevel 3: Detail panel (when user clicks \"View\")\n  ↓\nLevel 4: Advanced features (MindMap, exports)\n```\n\n---\n\n### 3. **Context-Aware**\n\n**Principle**: UI adapts to what the user is currently doing.\n\n**States**:\n- **Empty State**: Guidance + demo cards\n- **Processing State**: Progress indicators + estimated time\n- **Completed State**: Interactive results + Q&A prompts\n- **Error State**: Clear error messages + recovery actions\n\n---\n\n### 4. **Keyboard-First (for Power Users)**\n\n**Principle**: Every action should have a keyboard shortcut.\n\n**Core Shortcuts**:\n```\nCmd/Ctrl + K     → Open Library\nCmd/Ctrl + /     → Focus chat input\nCmd/Ctrl + \\     → Toggle video panel\nEsc              → Close panels/modals\nCmd/Ctrl + Enter → Send message\n```\n\n---\n\n### 5. **Mobile-Optimized**\n\n**Principle**: Mobile is not an afterthought; design for thumb-reach zones.\n\n**Thumb Zones**:\n```\n┌──────────────┐\n│ Hard to reach│ (Avoid primary actions here)\n│              │\n│   Easy       │ (Place input, send button)\n│   Zone       │\n│              │\n│ Easy (Bottom)│ (Place tab bar, close buttons)\n└──────────────┘\n```\n\n---\n\n## 🎯 Design Goals\n\n### Primary Goals\n1. **Reduce Time-to-Insight**: From URL paste to first Q&A in <30 seconds\n2. **Increase Engagement**: Encourage follow-up questions (3+ messages per session)\n3. **Lower Learning Curve**: New users productive in <2 minutes\n\n### Secondary Goals\n4. **Visual Consistency**: Reuse components across web/mobile\n5. **Performance**: LCP <2s, FID <100ms\n6. **Accessibility**: WCAG 2.1 AA compliant\n\n---\n\n## 🚫 Anti-Patterns to Avoid\n\n### ❌ Overloading the Chat\n**Bad**: Showing full video player + summary + script in chat messages  \n**Good**: Show compact card → Expand in panel\n\n### ❌ Modal Overuse\n**Bad**: Opening modals for every action  \n**Good**: Use inline expansion or side panels\n\n### ❌ Unclear State\n**Bad**: \"Processing...\" with no indication of progress  \n**Good**: \"Transcribing (Step 2/4, ~45s remaining)\"\n\n### ❌ Desktop-Only Features\n**Bad**: Drag-to-resize only works on desktop  \n**Good**: Alternative tap gestures on mobile\n\n---\n\n## 📏 Design Constraints\n\n### Technical Constraints\n- **Max Panel Width**: 50% of viewport (to keep chat readable)\n- **Min Chat Width**: 400px (below this, hide panel)\n- **Mobile Breakpoint**: 768px (standard MD breakpoint)\n\n### Content Constraints\n- **Max Message Length**: 4000 characters (OpenAI limit)\n- **Library List**: Show 20 items initially, lazy load more\n\n### Performance Constraints\n- **Video Panel**: Should open in <200ms\n- **Library Search**: Debounce 300ms, results <500ms\n\n---\n\n## 🎨 Visual Style Guide\n\n### Color Palette\n```\nPrimary (Chat):    #3ECF8E (Emerald Green)\nBackground:        #0A0A0A (Deep Black)\nSurface:           #1A1A1A (Dark Gray)\nBorder:            rgba(255,255,255,0.1)\nText Primary:      #FFFFFF\nText Secondary:    rgba(255,255,255,0.7)\n```\n\n### Typography\n```\nFont Family:  \"Inter\", \"Manrope\", sans-serif\nHeadings:     600 weight\nBody:         400 weight\nCode:         \"JetBrains Mono\"\n```\n\n### Spacing System\n```\nxs:  4px\nsm:  8px\nmd:  16px\nlg:  24px\nxl:  32px\n2xl: 48px\n```\n\n---\n\n## ✅ Design Validation Checklist\n\nBefore shipping any new feature, verify:\n\n- [ ] Works on mobile (test on real device, not just DevTools)\n- [ ] Keyboard navigable (tab through all interactive elements)\n- [ ] High contrast mode compatible\n- [ ] Animations are smooth (60fps)\n- [ ] Loading states are clear\n- [ ] Error messages are actionable\n\n---\n\n## 📚 Reference Examples\n\n**Inspiration Sources**:\n- [Perplexity](https://perplexity.ai) - Split-screen chat + sources\n- [ChatGPT](https://chat.openai.com) - Conversational UX\n- [Linear](https://linear.app) - Keyboard shortcuts\n- [Notion AI](https://notion.so) - Inline AI integration\n\n**Next Steps**: See `design/01_layout_specifications.md` for specific layout rules.\n",
              "additions": 211,
              "deletions": 0

              "file": "docs/redesign/reference/decisions.md",
              "before": "",
              "after": "# Architecture Decisions Record (ADR)\n\n> **Purpose**: Document key design decisions and their rationale  \n> **Format**: Each decision includes Context, Options Considered, Decision, Consequences  \n> **Last Updated**: 2025-01-18\n\n---\n\n## Decision Log\n\n### ADR-001: Split-Screen Layout (60/40 Fixed Ratio)\n\n**Status**: ✅ Accepted  \n**Date**: 2025-01-18  \n**Deciders**: Product Team\n\n**Context**:\nUser needs to simultaneously view chat conversation and video content. We evaluated different layout approaches.\n\n**Options Considered**:\n1. **Fixed 60/40**: Chat占60%，Video Panel占40%\n2. **Resizable**: 用户可拖拽调整比例\n3. **Preset Layouts**: 提供3个预设（50/50, 60/40, 70/30）\n\n**Decision**: Option 1 (Fixed 60/40)\n\n**Rationale**:\n- Simplifies initial implementation (no drag logic needed)\n- 60/40 ratio tested well in similar tools (Perplexity, Notion AI)\n- Reduces edge cases (min/max width handling)\n- Can upgrade to resizable in v2.1 if needed\n\n**Consequences**:\n- ✅ Faster development\n- ✅ Consistent UX across users\n- ❌ Less flexibility for power users\n- ⚠️ May need adjustment based on user feedback\n\n---\n\n### ADR-002: Component Extraction Strategy\n\n**Status**: ✅ Accepted  \n**Date**: 2025-01-18\n\n**Context**:\n`TaskDetailClient.tsx` is 1000+ lines and tightly coupled to the standalone task page. We need to reuse video display logic in the chat panel.\n\n**Options Considered**:\n1. **Duplicate Code**: Copy-paste logic into new `VideoDetailPanel`\n2. **Extract Shared Components**: Break `TaskDetailClient` into reusable pieces\n3. **Wrapper Component**: Keep `TaskDetailClient` as-is, wrap it in panel\n\n**Decision**: Option 2 (Extract Shared Components)\n\n**Rationale**:\n- Adheres to DRY principle\n- Makes components testable in isolation\n- Easier to maintain (single source of truth)\n- Follows React best practices\n\n**Extraction Plan**:\n```\nTaskDetailClient (monolith)\n  ↓\n  ├── VideoPlayer (extract)\n  ├── SummarySection (extract)\n  ├── ScriptTimeline (already exists)\n  └── MindMapView (extract)\n```\n\n**Consequences**:\n- ✅ Reusable components across app\n- ✅ Easier unit testing\n- ❌ Requires refactoring existing code\n- ⚠️ Risk of breaking current task page (mitigated by tests)\n\n---\n\n### ADR-003: Thread-Task Relationship (1:1 Model)\n\n**Status**: ✅ Accepted  \n**Date**: 2025-01-18\n\n**Context**:\nNeed to decide how chat threads relate to video tasks.\n\n**Options Considered**:\n1. **1:1**: One Thread = One Task (focused conversations)\n2. **1:N**: One Thread can contain multiple Tasks (comparison mode)\n\n**Decision**: Option 1 (1:1 Model)\n\n**Rationale**:\n- Simpler mental model for users\n- Easier to implement (straightforward FK relationship)\n- Aligns with \"Chat about a specific video\" UX\n- Can extend to 1:N later if comparison feature is needed\n\n**Database Design**:\n```sql\nALTER TABLE chat_threads \nADD COLUMN task_id UUID REFERENCES tasks(id);\n\n-- Optional: Enforce uniqueness\nCREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_chat_threads_task_id_unique \nON chat_threads(task_id) WHERE task_id IS NOT NULL;\n```\n\n**Consequences**:\n- ✅ Clear context (each conversation is about one video)\n- ✅ Simple data model\n- ❌ Users can't compare multiple videos in one chat (can add later)\n\n---\n\n### ADR-004: Library UI (Simple List)\n\n**Status**: ✅ Accepted  \n**Date**: 2025-01-18\n\n**Context**:\nLibrary sidebar needs to show user's processed videos.\n\n**Options Considered**:\n1. **Simple List**: Title + timestamp\n2. **Grouped List**: Group by date (Today, Yesterday, etc.)\n3. **Rich Cards**: Thumbnail + title + summary preview\n\n**Decision**: Option 1 (Simple List) for MVP\n\n**Rationale**:\n- Minimalist design matches chat-first UX\n- Fast to implement\n- Low cognitive load (focuses on titles)\n- Can upgrade to grouped/rich view later\n\n**Future Enhancement Path**:\n```\nv2.0: Simple list (title + time)\n  ↓\nv2.1: Add date grouping\n  ↓\nv2.2: Add thumbnail preview\n  ↓\nv2.3: Add tag filtering\n```\n\n**Consequences**:\n- ✅ Clean, fast interface\n- ✅ Easy to scan long lists\n- ❌ Less visual (no thumbnails)\n- ⚠️ May need search for power users with 100+ tasks\n\n---\n\n### ADR-005: Mobile UX (Modal/Drawer Pattern)\n\n**Status**: ✅ Accepted  \n**Date**: 2025-01-18\n\n**Context**:\nMobile screens (<768px) can't fit split-screen layout.\n\n**Options Considered**:\n1. **Stack Layout**: Chat on top, scroll to video details below\n2. **Tab Switching**: [Chat] [Video] tabs\n3. **Modal/Drawer**: Chat as main view, video details in modal\n\n**Decision**: Option 3 (Modal/Drawer)\n\n**Rationale**:\n- Follows mobile design standards (iOS/Android patterns)\n- Clear hierarchy (chat is primary, video is secondary)\n- No accidental scrolling issues\n- Easy to dismiss (swipe down to close)\n\n**Implementation**:\n```tsx\n// Desktop (≥768px)\n<div className=\"flex\">\n  <ChatContainer />\n  <VideoDetailPanel />\n</div>\n\n// Mobile (<768px)\n<div>\n  <ChatContainer />\n  <Sheet open={isVideoOpen}>\n    <VideoDetailPanel />\n  </Sheet>\n</div>\n```\n\n**Consequences**:\n- ✅ Native mobile feel\n- ✅ Consistent with other mobile apps\n- ❌ Requires managing modal state\n- ⚠️ Need smooth animations for good UX\n\n---\n\n### ADR-006: Empty State Design (Guidance + Demo Cards)\n\n**Status**: ✅ Accepted  \n**Date**: 2025-01-18\n\n**Context**:\nWhen user first opens chat (no messages), we need to guide them.\n\n**Options Considered**:\n1. **Blank Canvas**: Just input box, no guidance\n2. **Onboarding Tutorial**: 3-step walkthrough\n3. **Guidance + Examples**: Text prompt + demo cards\n\n**Decision**: Option 3 (Guidance + Examples)\n\n**Rationale**:\n- Balances simplicity and discoverability\n- Reuses existing `CommunityTemplates` component\n- Shows product value immediately (via demos)\n- Non-intrusive (no forced tutorial)\n\n**Design**:\n```\n┌─────────────────────────────────┐\n│  Paste a YouTube URL to start   │\n│  Example: https://youtu.be/...  │\n│                                 │\n│  ────── Community Examples ──── │\n│  [Demo Card 1] [Demo Card 2]    │\n│  [Demo Card 3] [Demo Card 4]    │\n└─────────────────────────────────┘\n```\n\n**Consequences**:\n- ✅ Clear call-to-action\n- ✅ Showcases product capabilities\n- ✅ Reduces bounce rate (engagement hook)\n- ❌ Slightly more visual noise\n\n---\n\n### ADR-007: AI Tool Calling Implementation\n\n**Status**: ✅ Accepted  \n**Date**: 2025-01-18\n\n**Context**:\nNeed to integrate video processing into chat workflow.\n\n**Options Considered**:\n1. **Vercel AI SDK Tools**: Use built-in `tools` parameter\n2. **Custom Function Calling**: Parse messages manually\n3. **Hybrid**: AI SDK for parsing, custom for execution\n\n**Decision**: Option 1 (Vercel AI SDK Tools)\n\n**Rationale**:\n- Native support in AI SDK (`useChat` hook)\n- Handles streaming automatically\n- Standard interface (easier for future LLM swaps)\n- Well-documented patterns\n\n**Implementation**:\n```typescript\nconst { messages } = useChat({\n  api: '/api/chat',\n  tools: {\n    process_video: {\n      description: 'Process a YouTube video',\n      parameters: z.object({\n        video_url: z.string().url(),\n        language: z.string().optional(),\n      }),\n      execute: async ({ video_url, language }) => {\n        // Call backend /api/process-video\n        return { task_id, status }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n})\n```\n\n**Consequences**:\n- ✅ Leverages existing infrastructure\n- ✅ Future-proof (tool calling is LLM standard)\n- ❌ Tied to AI SDK (but acceptable trade-off)\n\n---\n\n## Open Questions\n\n**Q1**: Should we support multiple URL processing in one message?  \n**Status**: ⏳ Pending  \n**Proposed Solution**: Show confirmation dialog asking user intent (separate threads vs. compare mode)\n\n**Q2**: How to handle Library pagination for users with 500+ tasks?  \n**Status**: ⏳ Pending  \n**Options**: Infinite scroll vs. Load more button vs. Virtual scrolling\n\n**Q3**: Should we preserve the standalone `/tasks/[id]` page for SEO/sharing?  \n**Status**: ⏳ Pending  \n**Impact**: Old links break vs. Maintain two views\n\n---\n\n## Future Decisions (Post-MVP)\n\n- **Keyboard Shortcuts**: Define comprehensive shortcut map (Cmd+K, Cmd+/, etc.)\n- **Drag-to-Resize**: Add resizable panel divider\n- **Offline Support**: Handle disconnected state gracefully\n- **Voice Input**: Allow voice-to-text for chat input\n\n---\n\n## Decision Review Process\n\n**When to Update This Document**:\n- Before implementing any major architectural change\n- When user feedback contradicts a decision\n- When technical constraints invalidate an option\n\n**Review Frequency**: Monthly or after each major release\n\n**Last Reviewed**: 2025-01-18\n",

              "before": "",
              "after": "# Existing Codebase Analysis\n\n> **Purpose**: Understand the current architecture before refactoring  \n> **Target Audience**: Coding Agents, Developers  \n> **Last Updated**: 2025-01-18\n\n---\n\n## 🎯 Overview\n\nThis document analyzes the **current (v1.x) architecture** to help identify:\n- What can be **reused** in v2.0\n- What needs to be **refactored**\n- What should be **deprecated**\n\n---\n\n## 📂 Current Directory Structure\n\n```\nfrontend/src/\n├── app/[lang]/\n│   ├── (main)/                       ← Protected route group\n│   │   ├── dashboard/                ✅ Keep (transform to chat)\n│   │   ├── history/                  ❌ Deprecated (merge to Library)\n│   │   ├── tasks/[id]/[slug]/        ❌ Deprecated (use chat + panel)\n│   │   └── settings/                 ✅ Keep\n│   ├── chat/                         ✅ Keep (redesign as main page)\n│   ├── login/                        ✅ Keep\n│   └── page.tsx                      ✅ Keep (landing)\n│\n├── components/\n│   ├── chat/\n│   │   └── AssistantChat.tsx         🔄 Refactor (add panel integration)\n│   ├── dashboard/\n│   │   ├── TaskForm.tsx              🔄 Move to chat input\n│   │   └── CommunityTemplates.tsx    ✅ Reuse (for empty state)\n│   ├── tasks/\n│   │   ├── VideoEmbed.tsx            ✅ Reuse (extract to shared)\n│   │   ├── AudioEmbed.tsx            ✅ Reuse\n│   │   └── TranscriptTimeline.tsx    ✅ Reuse\n│   └── layout/\n│       ├── Sidebar.tsx               🔄 Refactor (add Library trigger)\n│       └── MobileNav.tsx             ✅ Keep\n│\n└── lib/\n    ├── api.ts                        🔄 Extend (add chat endpoints)\n    └── supabase.ts                   ✅ Keep\n```\n\n---\n\n## 🔍 Key Components Analysis\n\n### 1. **TaskDetailClient** (Current Task Page)\n\n**Location**: `src/app/[lang]/(main)/tasks/[id]/[slug]/TaskDetailClient.tsx`\n\n**Current Responsibilities**:\n- Fetch task data from Supabase\n- Display video player (YouTube/Bilibili/Audio)\n- Show Summary/Script/MindMap tabs\n- Handle seekable playback\n- Realtime task updates\n\n**Reusability Assessment**:\n| Component Part | Reusable? | Action |\n|----------------|-----------|--------|\n| Video player logic | ✅ Yes | Extract to `<VideoPlayer>` |\n| Summary rendering | ✅ Yes | Extract to `<SummarySection>` |\n| Script timeline | ✅ Yes | Already separate component |\n| Tab navigation | ❌ No | Redesign for panel context |\n| Layout container | ❌ No | Replace with `<VideoDetailPanel>` |\n\n**Extraction Plan**:\n```typescript\n// Before (monolithic)\nTaskDetailClient.tsx (1000+ lines)\n\n// After (modular)\n<VideoDetailPanel>\n  <VideoPlayer />          ← Extracted\n  <SummarySection />       ← Extracted\n  <ScriptTimeline />       ← Already exists\n  <MindMapView />          ← Extracted\n</VideoDetailPanel>\n```\n\n---\n\n### 2. **AssistantChat** (Current Chat Component)\n\n**Location**: `src/components/chat/AssistantChat.tsx`\n\n**Current Features**:\n- Thread management (sidebar with thread list)\n- Message display (user + assistant)\n- AI SDK integration (`useChat` hook)\n- Thread switching\n\n**Issues**:\n- Tightly coupled to standalone `/chat` page\n- Sidebar always visible (not embeddable)\n- No integration with task processing\n\n**Refactor Plan**:\n```typescript\n// Current props\ninterface AssistantChatProps {\n  taskId?: string\n  defaultSidebarOpen?: boolean\n  className?: string\n  minimal?: boolean\n}\n\n// NEW: Add video panel integration\ninterface AssistantChatProps {\n  taskId?: string\n  onTaskCreated?: (taskId: string) => void  // NEW: Notify parent\n  onMessageWithURL?: (url: string) => void  // NEW: Handle URLs\n  hideThreadSidebar?: boolean               // NEW: For embedded mode\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n### 3. **CommunityTemplates** (Demo Cards)\n\n**Location**: `src/components/dashboard/CommunityTemplates.tsx`\n\n**Current Features**:\n- Fetches tasks where `is_demo = true`\n- Displays as grid of cards\n- Click → Navigate to task detail page\n\n**Reuse Strategy**:\n```typescript\n// Current usage (Dashboard)\n<CommunityTemplates />\n\n// New usage (Chat empty state)\n<ChatWorkspace>\n  {messages.length === 0 && (\n    <div className=\"empty-state\">\n      <h2>Get Started</h2>\n      <p>Paste a YouTube URL above...</p>\n      <CommunityTemplates \n        onTaskClick={(task) => openInPanel(task)}  // NEW: Open in panel\n      />\n    </div>\n  )}\n</ChatWorkspace>\n```\n\n---\n\n### 4. **Database Schema (Current)**\n\n**Relevant Tables**:\n\n```sql\n-- tasks table (unchanged)\nCREATE TABLE tasks (\n  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,\n  user_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),\n  video_url TEXT NOT NULL,\n  video_title TEXT,\n  thumbnail_url TEXT,\n  status TEXT CHECK (status IN ('pending', 'processing', 'completed', 'failed')),\n  progress INT DEFAULT 0,\n  is_demo BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,\n  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()\n);\n\n-- chat_threads table (needs extension)\nCREATE TABLE chat_threads (\n  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,\n  user_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),\n  title TEXT DEFAULT 'New Chat',\n  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\n  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()\n);\n\n-- chat_messages table (OK as-is)\nCREATE TABLE chat_messages (\n  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,\n  thread_id UUID REFERENCES chat_threads(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n  role TEXT CHECK (role IN ('user', 'assistant')),\n  content TEXT NOT NULL,\n  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()\n);\n```\n\n**Required Change**:\n```sql\n-- ADD: Link threads to tasks\nALTER TABLE chat_threads \nADD COLUMN task_id UUID REFERENCES tasks(id) ON DELETE SET NULL;\n\nCREATE INDEX idx_chat_threads_task_id ON chat_threads(task_id);\n```\n\n---\n\n## 🔄 Migration Considerations\n\n### Existing User Data\n\n**Scenario**: Users with existing tasks (no threads)\n\n**Solution**: Create \"placeholder\" threads for historical tasks\n\n```sql\n-- Migration script (to be executed once)\nINSERT INTO chat_threads (id, user_id, task_id, title, created_at)\nSELECT \n  gen_random_uuid(),\n  user_id,\n  id AS task_id,\n  video_title AS title,\n  created_at\nFROM tasks\nWHERE id NOT IN (SELECT task_id FROM chat_threads WHERE task_id IS NOT NULL);\n```\n\n### URL Redirects\n\n**Old URLs**:\n```\n/en/tasks/abc-123/video-title\n/en/history\n```\n\n**New Behavior**:\n```\n/en/tasks/abc-123/video-title  →  Redirect to /en/chat?task=abc-123\n/en/history                    →  Redirect to /en/chat (Library sidebar auto-opens)\n```\n\n---\n\n## 🚨 Breaking Changes\n\n### Removed Pages\n- ❌ `/dashboard` → Replaced by `/chat`\n- ❌ `/history` → Replaced by Library sidebar\n- ❌ `/tasks/[id]/[slug]` → Replaced by chat + panel\n\n### Removed Components\n- ❌ `TaskList.tsx` (History page) → Replaced by `LibrarySidebar`\n- ❌ `TaskCard.tsx` (separate card component) → Merged into Library\n\n### Behavior Changes\n- **Before**: Submit URL → Wait on task list → Click to view\n- **After**: Paste URL in chat → AI processes → Panel opens automatically\n\n---\n\n## ✅ Validation Checklist (Before Refactor)\n\nBefore starting the redesign, verify:\n\n- [ ] All current E2E tests pass (`npm run test:e2e`)\n- [ ] Database has recent backup\n- [ ] Document all custom hooks used in TaskDetailClient\n- [ ] List all Supabase queries that need updating\n- [ ] Identify all API routes that reference `/tasks/[id]`\n\n**Next Step**: Proceed to `reference/decisions.md` to understand design rationale.\n",

              "content": "# Existing Codebase Analysis\n\n> **Purpose**: Understand the current architecture before refactoring  \n> **Target Audience**: Coding Agents, Developers  \n> **Last Updated**: 2025-01-18\n\n---\n\n## 🎯 Overview\n\nThis document analyzes the **current (v1.x) architecture** to help identify:\n- What can be **reused** in v2.0\n- What needs to be **refactored**\n- What should be **deprecated**\n\n---\n\n## 📂 Current Directory Structure\n\n```\nfrontend/src/\n├── app/[lang]/\n│   ├── (main)/                       ← Protected route group\n│   │   ├── dashboard/                ✅ Keep (transform to chat)\n│   │   ├── history/                  ❌ Deprecated (merge to Library)\n│   │   ├── tasks/[id]/[slug]/        ❌ Deprecated (use chat + panel)\n│   │   └── settings/                 ✅ Keep\n│   ├── chat/                         ✅ Keep (redesign as main page)\n│   ├── login/                        ✅ Keep\n│   └── page.tsx                      ✅ Keep (landing)\n│\n├── components/\n│   ├── chat/\n│   │   └── AssistantChat.tsx         🔄 Refactor (add panel integration)\n│   ├── dashboard/\n│   │   ├── TaskForm.tsx              🔄 Move to chat input\n│   │   └── CommunityTemplates.tsx    ✅ Reuse (for empty state)\n│   ├── tasks/\n│   │   ├── VideoEmbed.tsx            ✅ Reuse (extract to shared)\n│   │   ├── AudioEmbed.tsx            ✅ Reuse\n│   │   └── TranscriptTimeline.tsx    ✅ Reuse\n│   └── layout/\n│       ├── Sidebar.tsx               🔄 Refactor (add Library trigger)\n│       └── MobileNav.tsx             ✅ Keep\n│\n└── lib/\n    ├── api.ts                        🔄 Extend (add chat endpoints)\n    └── supabase.ts                   ✅ Keep\n```\n\n---\n\n## 🔍 Key Components Analysis\n\n### 1. **TaskDetailClient** (Current Task Page)\n\n**Location**: `src/app/[lang]/(main)/tasks/[id]/[slug]/TaskDetailClient.tsx`\n\n**Current Responsibilities**:\n- Fetch task data from Supabase\n- Display video player (YouTube/Bilibili/Audio)\n- Show Summary/Script/MindMap tabs\n- Handle seekable playback\n- Realtime task updates\n\n**Reusability Assessment**:\n| Component Part | Reusable? | Action |\n|----------------|-----------|--------|\n| Video player logic | ✅ Yes | Extract to `<VideoPlayer>` |\n| Summary rendering | ✅ Yes | Extract to `<SummarySection>` |\n| Script timeline | ✅ Yes | Already separate component |\n| Tab navigation | ❌ No | Redesign for panel context |\n| Layout container | ❌ No | Replace with `<VideoDetailPanel>` |\n\n**Extraction Plan**:\n```typescript\n// Before (monolithic)\nTaskDetailClient.tsx (1000+ lines)\n\n// After (modular)\n<VideoDetailPanel>\n  <VideoPlayer />          ← Extracted\n  <SummarySection />       ← Extracted\n  <ScriptTimeline />       ← Already exists\n  <MindMapView />          ← Extracted\n</VideoDetailPanel>\n```\n\n---\n\n### 2. **AssistantChat** (Current Chat Component)\n\n**Location**: `src/components/chat/AssistantChat.tsx`\n\n**Current Features**:\n- Thread management (sidebar with thread list)\n- Message display (user + assistant)\n- AI SDK integration (`useChat` hook)\n- Thread switching\n\n**Issues**:\n- Tightly coupled to standalone `/chat` page\n- Sidebar always visible (not embeddable)\n- No integration with task processing\n\n**Refactor Plan**:\n```typescript\n// Current props\ninterface AssistantChatProps {\n  taskId?: string\n  defaultSidebarOpen?: boolean\n  className?: string\n  minimal?: boolean\n}\n\n// NEW: Add video panel integration\ninterface AssistantChatProps {\n  taskId?: string\n  onTaskCreated?: (taskId: string) => void  // NEW: Notify parent\n  onMessageWithURL?: (url: string) => void  // NEW: Handle URLs\n  hideThreadSidebar?: boolean               // NEW: For embedded mode\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n### 3. **CommunityTemplates** (Demo Cards)\n\n**Location**: `src/components/dashboard/CommunityTemplates.tsx`\n\n**Current Features**:\n- Fetches tasks where `is_demo = true`\n- Displays as grid of cards\n- Click → Navigate to task detail page\n\n**Reuse Strategy**:\n```typescript\n// Current usage (Dashboard)\n<CommunityTemplates />\n\n// New usage (Chat empty state)\n<ChatWorkspace>\n  {messages.length === 0 && (\n    <div className=\"empty-state\">\n      <h2>Get Started</h2>\n      <p>Paste a YouTube URL above...</p>\n      <CommunityTemplates \n        onTaskClick={(task) => openInPanel(task)}  // NEW: Open in panel\n      />\n    </div>\n  )}\n</ChatWorkspace>\n```\n\n---\n\n### 4. **Database Schema (Current)**\n\n**Relevant Tables**:\n\n```sql\n-- tasks table (unchanged)\nCREATE TABLE tasks (\n  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,\n  user_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),\n  video_url TEXT NOT NULL,\n  video_title TEXT,\n  thumbnail_url TEXT,\n  status TEXT CHECK (status IN ('pending', 'processing', 'completed', 'failed')),\n  progress INT DEFAULT 0,\n  is_demo BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,\n  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()\n);\n\n-- chat_threads table (needs extension)\nCREATE TABLE chat_threads (\n  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,\n  user_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),\n  title TEXT DEFAULT 'New Chat',\n  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),\n  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()\n);\n\n-- chat_messages table (OK as-is)\nCREATE TABLE chat_messages (\n  id UUID PRIMARY KEY,\n  thread_id UUID REFERENCES chat_threads(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\n  role TEXT CHECK (role IN ('user', 'assistant')),\n  content TEXT NOT NULL,\n  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()\n);\n```\n\n**Required Change**:\n```sql\n-- ADD: Link threads to tasks\nALTER TABLE chat_threads \nADD COLUMN task_id UUID REFERENCES tasks(id) ON DELETE SET NULL;\n\nCREATE INDEX idx_chat_threads_task_id ON chat_threads(task_id);\n```\n\n---\n\n## 🔄 Migration Considerations\n\n### Existing User Data\n\n**Scenario**: Users with existing tasks (no threads)\n\n**Solution**: Create \"placeholder\" threads for historical tasks\n\n```sql\n-- Migration script (to be executed once)\nINSERT INTO chat_threads (id, user_id, task_id, title, created_at)\nSELECT \n  gen_random_uuid(),\n  user_id,\n  id AS task_id,\n  video_title AS title,\n  created_at\nFROM tasks\nWHERE id NOT IN (SELECT task_id FROM chat_threads WHERE task_id IS NOT NULL);\n```\n\n### URL Redirects\n\n**Old URLs**:\n```\n/en/tasks/abc-123/video-title\n/en/history\n```\n\n**New Behavior**:\n```\n/en/tasks/abc-123/video-title  →  Redirect to /en/chat?task=abc-123\n/en/history                    →  Redirect to /en/chat (Library sidebar auto-opens)\n```\n\n---\n\n## 🚨 Breaking Changes\n\n### Removed Pages\n- ❌ `/dashboard` → Replaced by `/chat`\n- ❌ `/history` → Replaced by Library sidebar\n- ❌ `/tasks/[id]/[slug]` → Replaced by chat + panel\n\n### Removed Components\n- ❌ `TaskList.tsx` (History page) → Replaced by `LibrarySidebar`\n- ❌ `TaskCard.tsx` (separate card component) → Merged into Library\n\n### Behavior Changes\n- **Before**: Submit URL → Wait on task list → Click to view\n- **After**: Paste URL in chat → AI processes → Panel opens automatically\n\n---\n\n## ✅ Validation Checklist (Before Refactor)\n\nBefore starting the redesign, verify:\n\n- [ ] All current E2E tests pass (`npm run test:e2e`)\n- [ ] Database has recent backup\n- [ ] Document all custom hooks used in TaskDetailClient\n- [ ] List all Supabase queries that need updating\n- [ ] Identify all API routes that reference `/tasks/[id]`\n\n**Next Step**: Proceed to `reference/decisions.md` to understand design rationale.\n",

              "content": "# Architecture Decisions Record (ADR)\n\n> **Purpose**: Document key design decisions and their rationale  \n> **Format**: Each decision includes Context, Options Considered, Decision, Consequences  \n> **Last Updated**: 2025-01-18\n\n---\n\n## Decision Log\n\n### ADR-001: Split-Screen Layout (60/40 Fixed Ratio)\n\n**Status**: ✅ Accepted  \n**Date**: 2025-01-18  \n**Deciders**: Product Team\n\n**Context**:\nUser needs to simultaneously view chat conversation and video content. We evaluated different layout approaches.\n\n**Options Considered**:\n1. **Fixed 60/40**: Chat占60%，Video Panel占40%\n2. **Resizable**: 用户可拖拽调整比例\n3. **Preset Layouts**: 提供3个预设（50/50, 60/40, 70/30）\n\n**Decision**: Option 1 (Fixed 60/40)\n\n**Rationale**:\n- Simplifies initial implementation (no drag logic needed)\n- 60/40 ratio tested well in similar tools (Perplexity, Notion AI)\n- Reduces edge cases (min/max width handling)\n- Can upgrade to resizable in v2.1 if needed\n\n**Consequences**:\n- ✅ Faster development\n- ✅ Consistent UX across users\n- ❌ Less flexibility for power users\n- ⚠️ May need adjustment based on user feedback\n\n---\n\n### ADR-002: Component Extraction Strategy\n\n**Status**: ✅ Accepted  \n**Date**: 2025-01-18\n\n**Context**:\n`TaskDetailClient.tsx` is 1000+ lines and tightly coupled to the standalone task page. We need to reuse video display logic in the chat panel.\n\n**Options Considered**:\n1. **Duplicate Code**: Copy-paste logic into new `VideoDetailPanel`\n2. **Extract Shared Components**: Break `TaskDetailClient` into reusable pieces\n3. **Wrapper Component**: Keep `TaskDetailClient` as-is, wrap it in panel\n\n**Decision**: Option 2 (Extract Shared Components)\n\n**Rationale**:\n- Adheres to DRY principle\n- Makes components testable in isolation\n- Easier to maintain (single source of truth)\n- Follows React best practices\n\n**Extraction Plan**:\n```\nTaskDetailClient (monolith)\n  ↓\n  ├── VideoPlayer (extract)\n  ├── SummarySection (extract)\n  ├── ScriptTimeline (already exists)\n  └── MindMapView (extract)\n```\n\n**Consequences**:\n- ✅ Reusable components across app\n- ✅ Easier unit testing\n- ❌ Requires refactoring existing code\n- ⚠️ Risk of breaking current task page (mitigated by tests)\n\n---\n\n### ADR-003: Thread-Task Relationship (1:1 Model)\n\n**Status**: ✅ Accepted  \n**Date**: 2025-01-18\n\n**Context**:\nNeed to decide how chat threads relate to video tasks.\n\n**Options Considered**:\n1. **1:1**: One Thread = One Task (focused conversations)\n2. **1:N**: One Thread can contain multiple Tasks (comparison mode)\n\n**Decision**: Option 1 (1:1 Model)\n\n**Rationale**:\n- Simpler mental model for users\n- Easier to implement (straightforward FK relationship)\n- Aligns with \"Chat about a specific video\" UX\n- Can extend to 1:N later if comparison feature is needed\n\n**Database Design**:\n```sql\nALTER TABLE chat_threads \nADD COLUMN task_id UUID REFERENCES tasks(id);\n\n-- Optional: Enforce uniqueness\nCREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_chat_threads_task_id_unique \nON chat_threads(task_id) WHERE task_id IS NOT NULL;\n```\n\n**Consequences**:\n- ✅ Clear context (each conversation is about one video)\n- ✅ Simple data model\n- ❌ Users can't compare multiple videos in one chat (can add later)\n\n---\n\n### ADR-004: Library UI (Simple List)\n\n**Status**: ✅ Accepted  \n**Date**: 2025-01-18\n\n**Context**:\nLibrary sidebar needs to show user's processed videos.\n\n**Options Considered**:\n1. **Simple List**: Title + timestamp\n2. **Grouped List**: Group by date (Today, Yesterday, etc.)\n3. **Rich Cards**: Thumbnail + title + summary preview\n\n**Decision**: Option 1 (Simple List) for MVP\n\n**Rationale**:\n- Minimalist design matches chat-first UX\n- Fast to implement\n- Low cognitive load (focuses on titles)\n- Can upgrade to grouped/rich view later\n\n**Future Enhancement Path**:\n```\nv2.0: Simple list (title + time)\n  ↓\nv2.1: Add date grouping\n  ↓\nv2.2: Add thumbnail preview\n  ↓\nv2.3: Add tag filtering\n```\n\n**Consequences**:\n- ✅ Clean, fast interface\n- ✅ Easy to scan long lists\n- ❌ Less visual (no thumbnails)\n- ⚠️ May need search for power users with 100+ tasks\n\n---\n\n### ADR-005: Mobile UX (Modal/Drawer Pattern)\n\n**Status**: ✅ Accepted  \n**Date**: 2025-01-18\n\n**Context**:\nMobile screens (<768px) can't fit split-screen layout.\n\n**Options Considered**:\n1. **Stack Layout**: Chat on top, scroll to video details below\n2. **Tab Switching**: [Chat] [Video] tabs\n3. **Modal/Drawer**: Chat as main view, video details in modal\n\n**Decision**: Option 3 (Modal/Drawer)\n\n**Rationale**:\n- Follows mobile design standards (iOS/Android patterns)\n- Clear hierarchy (chat is primary, video is secondary)\n- No accidental scrolling issues\n- Easy to dismiss (swipe down to close)\n\n**Implementation**:\n```tsx\n// Desktop (≥768px)\n<div className=\"flex\">\n  <ChatContainer />\n  <VideoDetailPanel />\n</div>\n\n// Mobile (<768px)\n<div>\n  <ChatContainer />\n  <Sheet open={isVideoOpen}>\n    <VideoDetailPanel />\n  </Sheet>\n</div>\n```\n\n**Consequences**:\n- ✅ Native mobile feel\n- ✅ Consistent with other mobile apps\n- ❌ Requires managing modal state\n- ⚠️ Need smooth animations for good UX\n\n---\n\n### ADR-006: Empty State Design (Guidance + Demo Cards)\n\n**Status**: ✅ Accepted  \n**Date**: 2025-01-18\n\n**Context**:\nWhen user first opens chat (no messages), we need to guide them.\n\n**Options Considered**:\n1. **Blank Canvas**: Just input box, no guidance\n2. **Onboarding Tutorial**: 3-step walkthrough\n3. **Guidance + Examples**: Text prompt + demo cards\n\n**Decision**: Option 3 (Guidance + Examples)\n\n**Rationale**:\n- Balances simplicity and discoverability\n- Reuses existing `CommunityTemplates` component\n- Shows product value immediately (via demos)\n- Non-intrusive (no forced tutorial)\n\n**Design**:\n```\n┌─────────────────────────────────┐\n│  Paste a YouTube URL to start   │\n│  Example: https://youtu.be/...  │\n│                                 │\n│  ────── Community Examples ──── │\n│  [Demo Card 1] [Demo Card 2]    │\n│  [Demo Card 3] [Demo Card 4]    │\n└─────────────────────────────────┘\n```\n\n**Consequences**:\n- ✅ Clear call-to-action\n- ✅ Showcases product capabilities\n- ✅ Reduces bounce rate (engagement hook)\n- ❌ Slightly more visual noise\n\n---\n\n### ADR-007: AI Tool Calling Implementation\n\n**Status**: ✅ Accepted  \n**Date**: 2025-01-18\n\n**Context**:\nNeed to integrate video processing into chat workflow.\n\n**Options Considered**:\n1. **Vercel AI SDK Tools**: Use built-in `tools` parameter\n2. **Custom Function Calling**: Parse messages manually\n3. **Hybrid**: AI SDK for parsing, custom for execution\n\n**Decision**: Option 1 (Vercel AI SDK Tools)\n\n**Rationale**:\n- Native support in AI SDK (`useChat` hook)\n- Handles streaming automatically\n- Standard interface (easier for future LLM swaps)\n- Well-documented patterns\n\n**Implementation**:\n```typescript\nconst { messages } = useChat({\n  api: '/api/chat',\n  tools: {\n    process_video: {\n      description: 'Process a YouTube video',\n      parameters: z.object({\n        video_url: z.string().url(),\n        language: z.string().optional(),\n      }),\n      execute: async ({ video_url, language }) => {\n        // Call backend /api/process-video\n        return { task_id, status }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n})\n```\n\n**Consequences**:\n- ✅ Leverages existing infrastructure\n- ✅ Future-proof (tool calling is LLM standard)\n- ❌ Tied to AI SDK (but acceptable trade-off)\n\n---\n\n## Open Questions\n\n**Q1**: Should we support multiple URL processing in one message?  \n**Status**: ⏳ Pending  \n**Proposed Solution**: Show confirmation dialog asking user intent (separate threads vs. compare mode)\n\n**Q2**: How to handle Library pagination for users with 500+ tasks?  \n**Status**: ⏳ Pending  \n**Options**: Infinite scroll vs. Load more button vs. Virtual scrolling\n\n**Q3**: Should we preserve the standalone `/tasks/[id]` page for SEO/sharing?  \n**Status**: ⏳ Pending  \n**Impact**: Old links break vs. Maintain two views\n\n---\n\n## Future Decisions (Post-MVP)\n\n- **Keyboard Shortcuts**: Define comprehensive shortcut map (Cmd+K, Cmd+/, etc.)\n- **Drag-to-Resize**: Add resizable panel divider\n- **Offline Support**: Handle disconnected state gracefully\n- **Voice Input**: Allow voice-to-text for chat input\n\n---\n\n## Decision Review Process\n\n**When to Update This Document**:\n- Before implementing any major architectural change\n- When user feedback contradicts a decision\n- When technical constraints invalidate an option\n\n**Review Frequency**: Monthly or after each major release\n\n**Last Reviewed**: 2025-01-18\n",

          "state": {
            "status": "completed",
            "input": {
              "content": "# Design Principles\n\n> **Purpose**: Define the core design philosophy for v2.0  \n> **Audience**: Designers, Frontend Developers, Coding Agents  \n> **Last Updated**: 2025-01-18\n\n---\n\n## 🎨 Core Principles\n\n### 1. **Conversation-First**\n\n**Principle**: All interactions should feel like a natural conversation, not a form submission.\n\n**Implementation**:\n- ✅ DO: Natural language input (\"Summarize https://youtu.be/...\")\n- ❌ DON'T: Multi-step forms with dropdowns\n\n**Example**:\n```\nBAD (Form-based):\n┌─────────────────────┐\n│ Video URL: [_____] │\n│ Language:  [v]     │\n│ Output:    [v]     │\n│ [Submit]           │\n└─────────────────────┘\n\nGOOD (Conversational):\n┌─────────────────────┐\n│ User: Summarize     │\n│ https://youtu.be/...│\n│                     │\n│ AI: Processing...   │\n└─────────────────────┘\n```\n\n---\n\n### 2. **Progressive Disclosure**\n\n**Principle**: Show simple views first, reveal complexity only when needed.\n\n**Implementation**:\n- Start with minimal chat interface\n- Expand to video panel when relevant\n- Hide advanced features until requested\n\n**Hierarchy**:\n```\nLevel 1: Chat input (always visible)\n  ↓\nLevel 2: Video card in messages (when URL processed)\n  ↓\nLevel 3: Detail panel (when user clicks \"View\")\n  ↓\nLevel 4: Advanced features (MindMap, exports)\n```\n\n---\n\n### 3. **Context-Aware**\n\n**Principle**: UI adapts to what the user is currently doing.\n\n**States**:\n- **Empty State**: Guidance + demo cards\n- **Processing State**: Progress indicators + estimated time\n- **Completed State**: Interactive results + Q&A prompts\n- **Error State**: Clear error messages + recovery actions\n\n---\n\n### 4. **Keyboard-First (for Power Users)**\n\n**Principle**: Every action should have a keyboard shortcut.\n\n**Core Shortcuts**:\n```\nCmd/Ctrl + K     → Open Library\nCmd/Ctrl + /     → Focus chat input\nCmd/Ctrl + \\     → Toggle video panel\nEsc              → Close panels/modals\nCmd/Ctrl + Enter → Send message\n```\n\n---\n\n### 5. **Mobile-Optimized**\n\n**Principle**: Mobile is not an afterthought; design for thumb-reach zones.\n\n**Thumb Zones**:\n```\n┌──────────────┐\n│ Hard to reach│ (Avoid primary actions here)\n│              │\n│   Easy       │ (Place input, send button)\n│   Zone       │\n│              │\n│ Easy (Bottom)│ (Place tab bar, close buttons)\n└──────────────┘\n```\n\n---\n\n## 🎯 Design Goals\n\n### Primary Goals\n1. **Reduce Time-to-Insight**: From URL paste to first Q&A in <30 seconds\n2. **Increase Engagement**: Encourage follow-up questions (3+ messages per session)\n3. **Lower Learning Curve**: New users productive in <2 minutes\n\n### Secondary Goals\n4. **Visual Consistency**: Reuse components across web/mobile\n5. **Performance**: LCP <2s, FID <100ms\n6. **Accessibility**: WCAG 2.1 AA compliant\n\n---\n\n## 🚫 Anti-Patterns to Avoid\n\n### ❌ Overloading the Chat\n**Bad**: Showing full video player + summary + script in chat messages  \n**Good**: Show compact card → Expand in panel\n\n### ❌ Modal Overuse\n**Bad**: Opening modals for every action  \n**Good**: Use inline expansion or side panels\n\n### ❌ Unclear State\n**Bad**: \"Processing...\" with no indication of progress  \n**Good**: \"Transcribing (Step 2/4, ~45s remaining)\"\n\n### ❌ Desktop-Only Features\n**Bad**: Drag-to-resize only works on desktop  \n**Good**: Alternative tap gestures on mobile\n\n---\n\n## 📏 Design Constraints\n\n### Technical Constraints\n- **Max Panel Width**: 50% of viewport (to keep chat readable)\n- **Min Chat Width**: 400px (below this, hide panel)\n- **Mobile Breakpoint**: 768px (standard MD breakpoint)\n\n### Content Constraints\n- **Max Message Length**: 4000 characters (OpenAI limit)\n- **Library List**: Show 20 items initially, lazy load more\n\n### Performance Constraints\n- **Video Panel**: Should open in <200ms\n- **Library Search**: Debounce 300ms, results <500ms\n\n---\n\n## 🎨 Visual Style Guide\n\n### Color Palette\n```\nPrimary (Chat):    #3ECF8E (Emerald Green)\nBackground:        #0A0A0A (Deep Black)\nSurface:           #1A1A1A (Dark Gray)\nBorder:            rgba(255,255,255,0.1)\nText Primary:      #FFFFFF\nText Secondary:    rgba(255,255,255,0.7)\n```\n\n### Typography\n```\nFont Family:  \"Inter\", \"Manrope\", sans-serif\nHeadings:     600 weight\nBody:         400 weight\nCode:         \"JetBrains Mono\"\n```\n\n### Spacing System\n```\nxs:  4px\nsm:  8px\nmd:  16px\nlg:  24px\nxl:  32px\n2xl: 48px\n```\n\n---\n\n## ✅ Design Validation Checklist\n\nBefore shipping any new feature, verify:\n\n- [ ] Works on mobile (test on real device, not just DevTools)\n- [ ] Keyboard navigable (tab through all interactive elements)\n- [ ] High contrast mode compatible\n- [ ] Animations are smooth (60fps)\n- [ ] Loading states are clear\n- [ ] Error messages are actionable\n\n---\n\n## 📚 Reference Examples\n\n**Inspiration Sources**:\n- [Perplexity](https://perplexity.ai) - Split-screen chat + sources\n- [ChatGPT](https://chat.openai.com) - Conversational UX\n- [Linear](https://linear.app) - Keyboard shortcuts\n- [Notion AI](https://notion.so) - Inline AI integration\n\n**Next Steps**: See `design/01_layout_specifications.md` for specific layout rules.\n",
