\"w-[40%]\" : \"w-0 opacity-0 overflow-hidden\"\n      )}\n    >\n      <VideoDetailPanel />\n    </div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n```\n\n### Breakpoint Behavior\n\n```typescript\n// Responsive breakpoints\nconst BREAKPOINTS = {\n  mobile: 0,      // 0-767px\n  tablet: 768,    // 768-1023px\n  desktop: 1024,  // 1024px+\n}\n\n// Layout logic\nif (width >= 1024) {\n  // Desktop: Always show split-screen\n  showSplitView()\n} else if (width >= 768) {\n  // Tablet: Optional split or stack\n  showTabletView()\n} else {\n  // Mobile: Modal/drawer only\n  showMobileView()\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 📱 Tablet Layout (768px - 1023px)\n\n### Adaptive Behavior\n\n**Default**: Full-screen chat, video opens in slide-over panel\n\n```\n┌─────────────────────┐\n│ Chat (full width)   │\n│                     │\n│ [Video opens as     │\n│  slide-over panel   │\n│  from right edge]   │\n└─────────────────────┘\n```\n\n**Alternative** (User preference): 50/50 split\n\n```\n┌──────────┬──────────┐\n│  Chat    │  Video   │\n│  (50%)   │  (50%)   │\n└──────────┴──────────┘\n```\n\n### Implementation\n\n```tsx\n// Tablet-specific layout\n<div className=\"hidden md:flex lg:hidden\">\n  {mode === 'split' ? (\n    // 50/50 split\n    <div className=\"flex\">\n      <ChatContainer className=\"w-1/2\" />\n      <VideoPanel className=\"w-1/2\" />\n    </div>\n  ) : (\n    // Full + slide-over\n    <div className=\"relative\">\n      <ChatContainer className=\"w-full\" />\n      <Sheet open={isPanelOpen}>\n        <SheetContent className=\"w-[400px]\">\n          <VideoPanel />\n        </SheetContent>\n      </Sheet>\n    </div>\n  )}\n</div>\n```\n\n---\n\n## 📱 Mobile Layout (<768px)\n\n### Stack + Modal Pattern\n\n```\n┌──────────────────┐\n│ Chat Messages    │\n│ (full screen)    │\n│                  │\n│ ┌──────────────┐ │\n│ │ Video Card   │ │ ← Compact card in messages\n│ │ [Tap to View]│ │\n│ └──────────────┘ │\n│                  │\n│ [Input Box]      │\n└──────────────────┘\n\nWhen tapped:\n┌──────────────────┐\n│ ╔══════════════╗ │\n│ ║ Video Detail ║ │ ← Full-screen modal\n│ ║ (Swipe down  ║ │\n│ ║  to close)   ║ │\n│ ╚══════════════╝ │\n└──────────────────┘\n```\n\n### Implementation\n\n```tsx\n// Mobile-only view\n<div className=\"md:hidden h-screen flex flex-col\">\n  {/* Chat Messages */}\n  <div className=\"flex-1 overflow-y-auto\">\n    {messages.map(msg => (\n      msg.type === 'video' ? (\n        <VideoCardMessage \n          onClick={() => setModalOpen(true)}\n        />\n      ) : (\n        <TextMessage />\n      )\n    ))}\n  </div>\n\n  {/* Input */}\n  <ChatInput />\n\n  {/* Video Modal */}\n  <Sheet open={isModalOpen} onOpenChange={setModalOpen}>\n    <SheetContent side=\"bottom\" className=\"h-[90vh]\">\n      <VideoDetailPanel />\n    </SheetContent>\n  </Sheet>\n</div>\n```\n\n---\n\n## 🎨 Spacing & Sizing Specifications\n\n### Chat Container\n\n```css\n.chat-container {\n  padding: 16px;           /* md spacing */\n  gap: 12px;               /* Between messages */\n  max-width: none;         /* No max width constraint */\n}\n\n.chat-message {\n  max-width: 80%;          /* Messages don't span full width */\n  padding: 12px 16px;      /* Inner padding */\n  border-radius: 12px;     /* Rounded corners */\n}\n\n.chat-input {\n  height: auto;            /* Auto-grow with content */\n  min-height: 48px;        /* Minimum tap target */\n  max-height: 200px;       /* Limit for very long inputs */\n  padding: 12px 16px;      /* Comfortable typing area */\n}\n```\n\n### Video Detail Panel\n\n```css\n.video-detail-panel {\n  width: 40%;              /* Desktop: 40% of screen */\n  min-width: 320px;        /* Don't go smaller */\n  padding: 24px;           /* Spacious feel */\n}\n\n.video-player {\n  aspect-ratio: 16/9;      /* Maintain video ratio */\n  width: 100%;             /* Fill container */\n  border-radius: 8px;      /* Subtle rounding */\n}\n\n.summary-tabs {\n  margin-top: 24px;        /* Space from video */\n  gap: 8px;                /* Between tabs */\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 🔄 Animation Specifications\n\n### Panel Open/Close\n\n```tsx\n// Smooth transition\n<div \n  className={cn(\n    \"transition-all duration-300 ease-out\",\n    isPanelOpen ? \"w-[40%] opacity-100\" : \"w-0 opacity-0\"\n  )}\n/>\n```\n\n**Timing**: 300ms ease-out  \n**Properties**: width, opacity  \n**No transform** (causes layout shift)\n\n### Message Appearance\n\n```tsx\n// Fade in from bottom\n<div \n  className=\"animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-2 duration-200\"\n/>\n```\n\n**Timing**: 200ms  \n**Effect**: Fade + slight upward slide  \n**Trigger**: On message append\n\n### Modal Slide-Up (Mobile)\n\n```tsx\n// Sheet from bottom\n<SheetContent \n  side=\"bottom\"\n  className=\"animate-in slide-in-from-bottom duration-200\"\n/>\n```\n\n**Timing**: 200ms  \n**Effect**: Slide up from bottom  \n**Gesture**: Swipe down to close\n\n---\n\n## 🎯 Z-Index Layers\n\n```typescript\nconst Z_INDEX = {\n  base: 0,              // Main content\n  sticky: 10,           // Sticky headers\n  dropdown: 20,         // Dropdowns, tooltips\n  modal: 30,            // Modals, sheets\n  toast: 40,            // Notifications\n  critical: 50,         // Critical alerts\n}\n```\n\n**Usage**:\n```tsx\n<Sheet className=\"z-30\">        // Modal layer\n<Tooltip className=\"z-20\">      // Dropdown layer\n<StickyHeader className=\"z-10\"> // Sticky layer\n```\n\n---\n\n## 📐 Component Dimensions Reference\n\n| Component | Desktop | Tablet | Mobile |\n|-----------|---------|--------|--------|\n| Top Bar | 64px | 64px | 56px |\n| Chat Input | 48px min | 48px min | 56px min |\n| Video Panel | 40% width | 50% or 400px | Full screen |\n| Message Max Width | 80% | 90% | 95% |\n| Library Sidebar | 320px | 280px | 80vw |\n\n---\n\n## ✅ Implementation Checklist\n\nBefore marking layout as complete, verify:\n\n- [ ] Desktop split-screen works at 1920x1080, 1440x900, 1024x768\n- [ ] Tablet view works at 1024x768, 768x1024 (landscape/portrait)\n- [ ] Mobile view works at 375x667 (iPhone SE), 414x896 (iPhone 11)\n- [ ] Panel collapse animation is smooth (no jank)\n- [ ] Text remains readable at all screen sizes\n- [ ] Touch targets are ≥44px on mobile\n- [ ] Keyboard navigation works (tab order logical)\n\n---\n\n## 🔗 Related Documents\n\n- **Design Principles**: `design/00_design_principles.md`\n- **Component Specs**: `specifications/20_component_specs.md`\n- **User Flows**: `ux/10_user_flows.md`\n\n**Next**: See `ux/10_user_flows.md` for interaction patterns.\n",

              "after": "# Component Specifications\n\n> **Purpose**: Technical specs for all new/refactored components  \n> **Audience**: Coding Agents, Frontend Developers  \n> **Format**: TypeScript interfaces + Implementation examples  \n> **Last Updated**: 2025-01-18\n\n---\n\n## 📦 Component Hierarchy\n\n```\nChatWorkspace (New - Root Container)\n├── ChatContainer (New)\n│   ├── ChatMessages (Refactor AssistantChat)\n│   ├── MessageItem (New)\n│   │   ├── VideoCardMessage (New)\n│   │   ├── TextMessage (Exists)\n│   │   └── ProcessingMessage (New)\n│   └── ChatInput (New)\n│\n├── VideoDetailPanel (New)\n│   ├── VideoPlayer (Extract from TaskDetailClient)\n│   ├── SummarySection (Extract from TaskDetailClient)\n│   ├── ScriptTimeline (Reuse existing)\n│   └── MindMapView (Extract from TaskDetailClient)\n│\n└── LibrarySidebar (New)\n    ├── LibrarySearch (New)\n    └── TaskListItem (New)\n```\n\n---\n\n## 1. ChatWorkspace\n\n**File Path**: `frontend/src/components/chat/ChatWorkspace.tsx`\n\n### Purpose\nRoot container for the split-screen chat interface. Manages layout and state coordination between chat and video panel.\n\n### Props Interface\n```typescript\ninterface ChatWorkspaceProps {\n  // No props - uses URL params and context\n}\n```\n\n### Local State\n```typescript\nconst [isPanelOpen, setIsPanelOpen] = useState(false)\nconst [currentTaskId, setCurrentTaskId] = useState<string | null>(null)\nconst [isLibraryOpen, setIsLibraryOpen] = useState(false)\nconst [isMobile, setIsMobile] = useState(false)\n```\n\n### Implementation Template\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { useState, useEffect } from 'react'\nimport { useSearchParams } from 'next/navigation'\nimport { cn } from '@/lib/utils'\nimport { ChatContainer } from './ChatContainer'\nimport { VideoDetailPanel } from './VideoDetailPanel'\nimport { LibrarySidebar } from './LibrarySidebar'\n\nexport function ChatWorkspace() {\n  const searchParams = useSearchParams()\n  const taskId = searchParams.get('task')\n  \n  const [isPanelOpen, setIsPanelOpen] = useState(!!taskId)\n  const [currentTaskId, setCurrentTaskId] = useState<string | null>(taskId)\n  const [isLibraryOpen, setIsLibraryOpen] = useState(false)\n  const [isMobile, setIsMobile] = useState(false)\n\n  // Detect mobile\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const checkMobile = () => setIsMobile(window.innerWidth < 768)\n    checkMobile()\n    window.addEventListener('resize', checkMobile)\n    return () => window.removeEventListener('resize', checkMobile)\n  }, [])\n\n  // Open panel when task ID changes\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (taskId) {\n      setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n      setIsPanelOpen(true)\n    }\n  }, [taskId])\n\n  const handleTaskCreated = (newTaskId: string) => {\n    setCurrentTaskId(newTaskId)\n    setIsPanelOpen(true)\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"h-screen flex flex-col\">\n      {/* Top Bar */}\n      <header className=\"h-16 border-b border-white/10 flex items-center px-4 shrink-0\">\n        <button \n          onClick={() => setIsLibraryOpen(true)}\n          className=\"flex items-center gap-2\"\n        >\n          ☰ Library\n        </button>\n        <div className=\"flex-1\" />\n        {/* User menu */}\n      </header>\n\n      {/* Main Content */}\n      <div className=\"flex-1 flex overflow-hidden\">\n        <ChatContainer \n          className=\"flex-1 min-w-[400px]\"\n          onTaskCreated={handleTaskCreated}\n          onOpenPanel={(taskId) => {\n            setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n            setIsPanelOpen(true)\n          }}\n        />\n\n        {/* Desktop Panel */}\n        {!isMobile && (\n          <div \n            className={cn(\n              \"transition-all duration-300 border-l border-white/10 bg-background\",\n              isPanelOpen ? \"w-[40%]\" : \"w-0 opacity-0 overflow-hidden\"\n            )}\n          >\n            {currentTaskId && (\n              <VideoDetailPanel \n                taskId={currentTaskId}\n                onClose={() => setIsPanelOpen(false)}\n              />\n            )}\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Library Sidebar */}\n      <LibrarySidebar \n        isOpen={isLibraryOpen}\n        onClose={() => setIsLibraryOpen(false)}\n        onSelectTask={(taskId) => {\n          setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n          setIsPanelOpen(true)\n          setIsLibraryOpen(false)\n        }}\n      />\n    </div>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n### Validation\n- [ ] Renders split-screen on desktop (≥1024px)\n- [ ] Panel animates smoothly (300ms)\n- [ ] URL param `?task=xxx` auto-opens panel\n- [ ] Library sidebar opens with `Cmd+K`\n\n---\n\n## 2. ChatContainer\n\n**File Path**: `frontend/src/components/chat/ChatContainer.tsx`\n\n### Purpose\nContains chat messages and input. Integrates with AI SDK for message handling.\n\n### Props Interface\n```typescript\ninterface ChatContainerProps {\n  className?: string\n  onTaskCreated?: (taskId: string) => void\n  onOpenPanel?: (taskId: string) => void\n}\n```\n\n### Implementation Template\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { useChat } from '@ai-sdk/react'\nimport { useState } from 'react'\nimport { ChatMessages } from './ChatMessages'\nimport { ChatInput } from './ChatInput'\n\nexport function ChatContainer({ \n  className, \n  onTaskCreated,\n  onOpenPanel \n}: ChatContainerProps) {\n  const { messages, sendMessage, status } = useChat({\n    api: '/api/chat',\n    onFinish: (message) => {\n      // Check if message contains task ID\n      const taskId = extractTaskId(message)\n      if (taskId && onTaskCreated) {\n        onTaskCreated(taskId)\n      }\n    }\n  })\n\n  const handleSubmit = async (content: string) => {\n    await sendMessage({ text: content })\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className={cn(\"flex flex-col h-full\", className)}>\n      <ChatMessages \n        messages={messages}\n        onOpenPanel={onOpenPanel}\n      />\n      <ChatInput \n        onSubmit={handleSubmit}\n        disabled={status === 'streaming'}\n      />\n    </div>\n  )\n}\n\nfunction extractTaskId(message: any): string | null {\n  // Parse message for task_id in tool call result\n  // Implementation depends on AI SDK message format\n  return null\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 3. VideoCardMessage\n\n**File Path**: `frontend/src/components/chat/messages/VideoCardMessage.tsx`\n\n### Purpose\nDisplays video processing status as a card in chat messages.\n\n### Props Interface\n```typescript\ninterface VideoCardMessageProps {\n  taskId: string\n  videoUrl: string\n  title?: string\n  thumbnailUrl?: string\n  status: 'processing' | 'completed' | 'failed'\n  progress?: number\n  onViewClick?: (taskId: string) => void\n}\n```\n\n### Implementation Template\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { Card } from '@/components/ui/card'\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'\nimport { Progress } from '@/components/ui/progress'\nimport { Loader2, CheckCircle, XCircle } from 'lucide-react'\n\nexport function VideoCardMessage({\n  taskId,\n  videoUrl,\n  title,\n  thumbnailUrl,\n  status,\n  progress = 0,\n  onViewClick\n}: VideoCardMessageProps) {\n  const StatusIcon = {\n    processing: Loader2,\n    completed: CheckCircle,\n    failed: XCircle\n  }[status]\n\n  return (\n    <Card className=\"p-4 max-w-sm\">\n      {/* Thumbnail */}\n      {thumbnailUrl && (\n        <img \n          src={thumbnailUrl} \n          alt={title}\n          className=\"w-full aspect-video object-cover rounded-lg mb-3\"\n        />\n      )}\n\n      {/* Title */}\n      <h3 className=\"font-semibold mb-2 line-clamp-2\">\n        {title || 'Processing video...'}\n      </h3>\n\n      {/* Status */}\n      <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-muted-foreground mb-3\">\n        <StatusIcon className={cn(\n          \"w-4 h-4\",\n          status === 'processing' && \"animate-spin\",\n          status === 'completed' && \"text-green-500\",\n          status === 'failed' && \"text-red-500\"\n        )} />\n        <span>\n          {status === 'processing' && `Processing (${progress}%)`}\n          {status === 'completed' && 'Ready'}\n          {status === 'failed' && 'Failed'}\n        </span>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Progress Bar */}\n      {status === 'processing' && (\n        <Progress value={progress} className=\"mb-3\" />\n      )}\n\n      {/* Action Button */}\n      {status === 'completed' && onViewClick && (\n        <Button \n          onClick={() => onViewClick(taskId)}\n          className=\"w-full\"\n        >\n          View Summary\n        </Button>\n      )}\n    </Card>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 4. VideoDetailPanel\n\n**File Path**: `frontend/src/components/chat/VideoDetailPanel.tsx`\n\n### Purpose\nRight-side panel displaying video player and analysis results. Reuses extracted components from TaskDetailClient.\n\n### Props Interface\n```typescript\ninterface VideoDetailPanelProps {\n  taskId: string\n  onClose?: () => void\n  className?: string\n}\n```\n\n### Implementation Template\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { useEffect, useState } from 'react'\nimport { createClient } from '@/lib/supabase'\nimport { VideoPlayer } from '@/components/tasks/VideoPlayer'\nimport { SummarySection } from '@/components/tasks/SummarySection'\nimport { ScriptTimeline } from '@/components/tasks/ScriptTimeline'\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'\nimport { X } from 'lucide-react'\nimport { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs'\n\nexport function VideoDetailPanel({ \n  taskId, \n  onClose, \n  className \n}: VideoDetailPanelProps) {\n  const [task, setTask] = useState(null)\n  const [outputs, setOutputs] = useState([])\n  const supabase = createClient()\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    // Fetch task and outputs\n    const fetchData = async () => {\n      const { data: taskData } = await supabase\n        .from('tasks')\n        .select('*')\n        .eq('id', taskId)\n        .single()\n      \n      const { data: outputsData } = await supabase\n        .from('task_outputs')\n        .select('*')\n        .eq('task_id', taskId)\n\n      setTask(taskData)\n      setOutputs(outputsData || [])\n    }\n\n    fetchData()\n\n    // Realtime subscription\n    const channel = supabase.channel(`task_${taskId}`)\n      .on('postgres_changes', {\n        event: '*',\n        schema: 'public',\n        table: 'tasks',\n        filter: `id=eq.${taskId}`\n      }, (payload) => {\n        setTask(payload.new)\n      })\n      .subscribe()\n\n    return () => {\n      supabase.removeChannel(channel)\n    }\n  }, [taskId])\n\n  if (!task) return <div className=\"p-4\">Loading...</div>\n\n  return (\n    <div className={cn(\"h-full flex flex-col\", className)}>\n      {/* Header */}\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-white/10\">\n        <h2 className=\"font-semibold truncate\">{task.video_title}</h2>\n        {onClose && (\n          <Button variant=\"ghost\" size=\"icon\" onClick={onClose}>\n            <X className=\"w-4 h-4\" />\n          </Button>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Content */}\n      <div className=\"flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 space-y-4\">\n        <VideoPlayer \n          videoUrl={task.video_url}\n          title={task.video_title}\n          coverUrl={task.thumbnail_url}\n        />\n\n        <Tabs defaultValue=\"summary\">\n          <TabsList>\n            <TabsTrigger value=\"summary\">Summary</TabsTrigger>\n            <TabsTrigger value=\"script\">Script</TabsTrigger>\n          </TabsList>\n\n          <TabsContent value=\"summary\">\n            <SummarySection \n              outputs={outputs}\n              taskTitle={task.video_title}\n            />\n          </TabsContent>\n\n          <TabsContent value=\"script\">\n            <ScriptTimeline \n              scriptRawContent={outputs.find(o => o.kind === 'script_raw')?.content}\n            />\n          </TabsContent>\n        </Tabs>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 5. LibrarySidebar\n\n**File Path**: `frontend/src/components/chat/LibrarySidebar.tsx`\n\n### Purpose\nSlide-out sidebar showing user's task history.\n\n### Props Interface\n```typescript\ninterface LibrarySidebarProps {\n  isOpen: boolean\n  onClose: () => void\n  onSelectTask: (taskId: string) => void\n}\n```\n\n### Implementation Template\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { useEffect, useState } from 'react'\nimport { createClient } from '@/lib/supabase'\nimport { Sheet, SheetContent, SheetHeader, SheetTitle } from '@/components/ui/sheet'\nimport { Input } from '@/components/ui/input'\nimport { Search } from 'lucide-react'\n\nexport function LibrarySidebar({ \n  isOpen, \n  onClose, \n  onSelectTask \n}: LibrarySidebarProps) {\n  const [tasks, setTasks] = useState([])\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('')\n  const supabase = createClient()\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (isOpen) {\n      fetchTasks()\n    }\n  }, [isOpen])\n\n  const fetchTasks = async () => {\n    const { data } = await supabase\n      .from('tasks')\n      .select('*')\n      .eq('status', 'completed')\n      .order('created_at', { ascending: false })\n      .limit(20)\n\n    setTasks(data || [])\n  }\n\n  const filteredTasks = tasks.filter(task =>\n    task.video_title?.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())\n  )\n\n  return (\n    <Sheet open={isOpen} onOpenChange={onClose}>\n      <SheetContent side=\"left\" className=\"w-[320px] p-0\">\n        <SheetHeader className=\"p-4 border-b\">\n          <SheetTitle>Library</SheetTitle>\n        </SheetHeader>\n\n        {/* Search */}\n        <div className=\"p-4\">\n          <div className=\"relative\">\n            <Search className=\"absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground\" />\n            <Input\n              placeholder=\"Search videos...\"\n              value={searchQuery}\n              onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}\n              className=\"pl-9\"\n            />\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Task List */}\n        <div className=\"overflow-y-auto\">\n          {filteredTasks.map(task => (\n            <button\n              key={task.id}\n              onClick={() => {\n                onSelectTask(task.id)\n                onClose()\n              }}\n              className=\"w-full text-left p-4 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors border-b border-white/5\"\n            >\n              <div className=\"font-medium truncate\">{task.video_title}</div>\n              <div className=\"text-sm text-muted-foreground\">\n                {new Date(task.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}\n              </div>\n            </button>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      </SheetContent>\n    </Sheet>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## ✅ Component Checklist\n\n**Before marking any component as complete**:\n\n- [ ] TypeScript types defined and exported\n- [ ] Props documented with JSDoc comments\n- [ ] Responsive behavior implemented (mobile/desktop)\n- [ ] Loading states handled\n- [ ] Error states handled\n- [ ] Accessibility attributes added (aria-*, role)\n- [ ] Unit tests written (if applicable)\n- [ ] Integrated with parent component\n\n**Next**: See `tasks/phase-2-frontend/task-2.1-chat-workspace.md` to start implementation.\n",

              "file": "docs/redesign/ux/10_user_flows.md",
              "before": "",
              "after": "# User Flows\n\n> **Purpose**: Complete user journey maps for v2.0  \n> **Format**: Mermaid diagrams + step-by-step descriptions  \n> **Last Updated**: 2025-01-18\n\n---\n\n## 🎯 Core User Flows\n\n### Flow 1: New User First-Time Experience\n\n**Goal**: User successfully processes their first video\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TD\n    A[Land on /chat] --> B{Authenticated?}\n    B -->|No| C[Redirect to /login]\n    B -->|Yes| D[Show Empty State]\n    \n    D --> E[Display Guidance Text]\n    E --> F[Show Community Demo Cards]\n    \n    F --> G{User Action}\n    G -->|Paste URL| H[User Types YouTube URL]\n    G -->|Click Demo| I[Open Demo in Panel]\n    \n    H --> J[AI Detects URL]\n    J --> K[Show Processing Card]\n    K --> L[Backend Creates Task]\n    L --> M[Realtime Updates Card]\n    M --> N[Card Shows Completed]\n    N --> O[Panel Auto-Opens]\n    O --> P[User Sees Video + Summary]\n    \n    P --> Q[User Asks Follow-up Question]\n    Q --> R[AI Answers Using Context]\n    R --> S[Success: Engaged User]\n```\n\n**Step-by-Step Breakdown**:\n\n1. **Landing** (0s)\n   - URL: `/chat`\n   - UI: Empty chat with guidance text\n   - Action: Read \"Paste a YouTube URL to start...\"\n\n2. **Discover** (5-10s)\n   - UI: Scroll down, see Community Demo Cards\n   - Option A: Click demo → Skip to step 7\n   - Option B: Paste own URL → Continue to step 3\n\n3. **Submission** (10-15s)\n   - User pastes: `https://youtube.com/watch?v=abc123`\n   - UI: Input shows URL with preview thumbnail\n   - Action: Press Enter or click Send\n\n4. **Processing Starts** (15-16s)\n   - AI sends message: \"I'll analyze this video for you\"\n   - UI: Shows processing card with spinner\n   - Backend: Creates task, starts workflow\n\n5. **Progress Updates** (16-45s)\n   - Card updates: \"Downloading... (Step 1/4)\"\n   - Card updates: \"Transcribing... (Step 2/4)\"\n   - Card updates: \"Summarizing... (Step 3/4)\"\n   - Realtime: Supabase pushes status changes\n\n6. **Completion** (45-50s)\n   - Card shows: \"✓ Ready\"\n   - Button appears: \"View Summary\"\n   - Panel auto-opens on right side\n\n7. **Exploration** (50s+)\n   - User sees video player + summary tabs\n   - User clicks keypoint → Video seeks to timestamp\n   - User asks: \"What was the main conclusion?\"\n   - AI responds using summary context\n\n**Success Criteria**:\n- ✅ User completes flow in <2 minutes\n- ✅ User sends ≥1 follow-up question\n- ✅ User doesn't encounter errors\n\n---\n\n### Flow 2: Returning User - Access Past Videos\n\n**Goal**: User finds and reopens a previously processed video\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TD\n    A[Open /chat] --> B[See Recent Threads]\n    \n    B --> C{Find Video?}\n    C -->|In Recent| D[Click Thread in List]\n    C -->|Not Recent| E[Click Library Button]\n    \n    E --> F[Library Sidebar Opens]\n    F --> G{Search or Browse?}\n    G -->|Search| H[Type in Search Box]\n    G -->|Browse| I[Scroll Through List]\n    \n    H --> J[Results Filter Live]\n    J --> K[Click Result]\n    \n    I --> K\n    D --> K\n    \n    K --> L[Load Thread Messages]\n    L --> M[Open Video Panel]\n    M --> N[Resume Conversation]\n```\n\n**Step-by-Step**:\n\n1. **Open Chat** (0s)\n   - URL: `/chat`\n   - UI: Shows last active thread (if any)\n\n2. **Trigger Library** (2s)\n   - Click \"☰ Library\" button (or press `Cmd+K`)\n   - Sidebar slides in from left\n\n3. **Find Video** (5-15s)\n   - **Option A - Browse**: Scroll through chronological list\n   - **Option B - Search**: Type title/keyword\n   - List shows: Title + Timestamp + Platform icon\n\n4. **Open** (15s)\n   - Click desired video entry\n   - Library sidebar closes\n   - Thread loads (if exists) OR creates new thread\n   - Panel opens with video details\n\n5. **Continue** (20s+)\n   - User asks new questions about the video\n   - AI has full context from original analysis\n\n---\n\n### Flow 3: Multi-URL Handling\n\n**Goal**: User pastes multiple YouTube URLs, system handles gracefully\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TD\n    A[User Types Message with 2+ URLs] --> B[Frontend Detects Multiple URLs]\n    B --> C[Show Confirmation Dialog]\n    \n    C --> D{User Choice}\n    D -->|Process Separately| E[Create 2 Tasks + 2 Threads]\n    D -->|Compare Together| F[Create 2 Tasks + 1 Thread]\n    D -->|Cancel| G[Return to Input]\n    \n    E --> H1[Thread 1 Active]\n    E --> H2[Thread 2 Created]\n    H1 --> I[User Can Switch Threads]\n    \n    F --> J[Both Videos in Same Chat]\n    J --> K[AI Can Compare Content]\n```\n\n**Dialog UI**:\n```\n┌─────────────────────────────────────┐\n│ Detected 2 video links:             │\n│ • How AI Works (5:32)               │\n│ • Machine Learning Intro (12:15)    │\n│                                     │\n│ How should I process them?          │\n│ ⚪ Separately (2 conversations)      │\n│ ⚪ Together (compare in one chat)    │\n│                                     │\n│ [Cancel] [Confirm]                  │\n└─────────────────────────────────────┘\n```\n\n---\n\n### Flow 4: Error Recovery\n\n**Goal**: User encounters error, system guides them to recovery\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TD\n    A[User Submits URL] --> B[Processing Starts]\n    B --> C{Error Occurs}\n    \n    C -->|Invalid URL| D[Show: URL Not Supported]\n    C -->|Network Fail| E[Show: Connection Lost]\n    C -->|Quota Exceeded| F[Show: Upgrade Prompt]\n    \n    D --> G[Suggest Valid Format]\n    E --> H[Retry Button]\n    F --> I[Link to Pricing]\n    \n    G --> J[User Corrects URL]\n    H --> K[Auto-Retry Backend]\n    I --> L[User Upgrades Plan]\n    \n    J --> M[Success]\n    K --> M\n    L --> M\n```\n\n**Error Messages** (User-Friendly):\n\n| Error Type | Message | Recovery Action |\n|------------|---------|-----------------|\n| Invalid URL | \"This doesn't look like a YouTube URL. Try: https://youtube.com/watch?v=...\" | Show format example |\n| Private Video | \"This video is private. Please check the link and try again.\" | Suggest checking permissions |\n| Network Error | \"Connection lost. Retrying in 3s...\" | Auto-retry 3 times |\n| Quota Exceeded | \"You've used all 5 free videos this month. Upgrade to Pro?\" | Show upgrade CTA |\n| Processing Failed | \"Something went wrong. Our team has been notified. Try again in a few minutes.\" | Manual retry button |\n\n---\n\n## 📱 Mobile-Specific Flows\n\n### Flow 5: Mobile Video Viewing\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TD\n    A[User on Mobile] --> B[Paste URL in Chat]\n    B --> C[Processing Card Appears]\n    C --> D[Tap Video Card]\n    \n    D --> E[Sheet Slides Up from Bottom]\n    E --> F[Video Player Fills Screen]\n    F --> G{User Action}\n    \n    G -->|Swipe Down| H[Close Sheet, Back to Chat]\n    G -->|Tap Summary Tab| I[Switch to Summary View]\n    G -->|Ask Question| J[Input Appears at Bottom]\n    \n    J --> K[Question Posted to Chat]\n    K --> H[Sheet Closes, Shows Answer]\n```\n\n**Mobile Gestures**:\n- **Swipe Down**: Close video detail sheet\n- **Swipe Left/Right**: Switch between Summary/Script tabs\n- **Long Press**: Copy text from summary\n- **Double Tap**: Zoom video (if native player)\n\n---\n\n## 🎯 Edge Cases & Alternate Paths\n\n### Edge Case 1: Very Long Video (>2 hours)\n\n**Flow**:\n1. User submits 3-hour lecture\n2. System detects duration\n3. Shows warning: \"This video is 3h long. Processing may take 5-10 minutes.\"\n4. User confirms or cancels\n5. If confirmed: Show extended progress bar with estimated time\n\n### Edge Case 2: Unsupported Platform\n\n**Flow**:\n1. User pastes Vimeo URL (not supported yet)\n2. System shows: \"Currently only YouTube, Bilibili, and Xiaoyuzhou are supported.\"\n3. Offers: \"Request support for Vimeo?\"\n4. If yes: Opens feedback form\n\n### Edge Case 3: Duplicate URL in Same Thread\n\n**Flow**:\n1. User pastes URL already processed in current thread\n2. System detects duplicate\n3. Shows: \"You already analyzed this video in this chat. Would you like to open it again?\"\n4. If yes: Opens panel without reprocessing\n\n---\n\n## ✅ Flow Validation Criteria\n\n**Each flow should**:\n- Have ≤5 user actions to complete\n- Provide feedback within 200ms of each action\n- Offer clear recovery path for errors\n- Work identically on desktop and mobile (except gestures)\n\n**Next**: See `ux/11_wireframes.md` for visual layouts of these flows.\n",
              "additions": 286,
              "deletions": 0

              "content": "# Layout Specifications\n\n> **Purpose**: Define exact layout rules for coding agents  \n> **Target**: Frontend developers implementing split-screen interface  \n> **Last Updated**: 2025-01-18\n\n---\n\n## 🖥️ Desktop Layout (≥1024px)\n\n### Overall Structure\n\n```\n┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐\n│ Top Bar (64px fixed height)                            │\n├──────────────────────┬──────────────────────────────────┤\n│                      │                                  │\n│   Chat Container     │   Video Detail Panel             │\n│   (60% width)        │   (40% width)                    │\n│   flex-1             │   w-[40%]                        │\n│                      │                                  │\n│   Min: 400px         │   Collapsible                    │\n│   Max: none          │   When closed: w-0               │\n│                      │                                  │\n└──────────────────────┴──────────────────────────────────┘\n```\n\n### CSS Implementation\n\n```tsx\n// ChatWorkspace.tsx\n<div className=\"h-screen flex flex-col\">\n  {/* Top Bar */}\n  <header className=\"h-16 border-b border-white/10 flex items-center px-4\">\n    <button onClick={() => setLibraryOpen(true)}>☰ Library</button>\n    <div className=\"flex-1\" />\n    <UserMenu />\n  </header>\n\n  {/* Main Content */}\n  <div className=\"flex-1 flex overflow-hidden\">\n    {/* Chat Container (60%) */}\n    <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-[400px] flex flex-col\">\n      <ChatMessages />\n      <ChatInput />\n    </div>\n\n    {/* Video Panel (40%) */}\n    <div \n      className={cn(\n        \"transition-all duration-300 border-l border-white/10\",\n        isPanelOpen ? \"w-[40%]\" : \"w-0 opacity-0 overflow-hidden\"\n      )}\n    >\n      <VideoDetailPanel />\n    </div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n```\n\n### Breakpoint Behavior\n\n```typescript\n// Responsive breakpoints\nconst BREAKPOINTS = {\n  mobile: 0,      // 0-767px\n  tablet: 768,    // 768-1023px\n  desktop: 1024,  // 1024px+\n}\n\n// Layout logic\nif (width >= 1024) {\n  // Desktop: Always show split-screen\n  showSplitView()\n} else if (width >= 768) {\n  // Tablet: Optional split or stack\n  showTabletView()\n} else {\n  // Mobile: Modal/drawer only\n  showMobileView()\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 📱 Tablet Layout (768px - 1023px)\n\n### Adaptive Behavior\n\n**Default**: Full-screen chat, video opens in slide-over panel\n\n```\n┌─────────────────────┐\n│ Chat (full width)   │\n│                     │\n│ [Video opens as     │\n│  slide-over panel   │\n│  from right edge]   │\n└─────────────────────┘\n```\n\n**Alternative** (User preference): 50/50 split\n\n```\n┌──────────┬──────────┐\n│  Chat    │  Video   │\n│  (50%)   │  (50%)   │\n└──────────┴──────────┘\n```\n\n### Implementation\n\n```tsx\n// Tablet-specific layout\n<div className=\"hidden md:flex lg:hidden\">\n  {mode === 'split' ? (\n    // 50/50 split\n    <div className=\"flex\">\n      <ChatContainer className=\"w-1/2\" />\n      <VideoPanel className=\"w-1/2\" />\n    </div>\n  ) : (\n    // Full + slide-over\n    <div className=\"relative\">\n      <ChatContainer className=\"w-full\" />\n      <Sheet open={isPanelOpen}>\n        <SheetContent className=\"w-[400px]\">\n          <VideoPanel />\n        </SheetContent>\n      </Sheet>\n    </div>\n  )}\n</div>\n```\n\n---\n\n## 📱 Mobile Layout (<768px)\n\n### Stack + Modal Pattern\n\n```\n┌──────────────────┐\n│ Chat Messages    │\n│ (full screen)    │\n│                  │\n│ ┌──────────────┐ │\n│ │ Video Card   │ │ ← Compact card in messages\n│ │ [Tap to View]│ │\n│ └──────────────┘ │\n│                  │\n│ [Input Box]      │\n└──────────────────┘\n\nWhen tapped:\n┌──────────────────┐\n│ ╔══════════════╗ │\n│ ║ Video Detail ║ │ ← Full-screen modal\n│ ║ (Swipe down  ║ │\n│ ║  to close)   ║ │\n│ ╚══════════════╝ │\n└──────────────────┘\n```\n\n### Implementation\n\n```tsx\n// Mobile-only view\n<div className=\"md:hidden h-screen flex flex-col\">\n  {/* Chat Messages */}\n  <div className=\"flex-1 overflow-y-auto\">\n    {messages.map(msg => (\n      msg.type === 'video' ? (\n        <VideoCardMessage \n          onClick={() => setModalOpen(true)}\n        />\n      ) : (\n        <TextMessage />\n      )\n    ))}\n  </div>\n\n  {/* Input */}\n  <ChatInput />\n\n  {/* Video Modal */}\n  <Sheet open={isModalOpen} onOpenChange={setModalOpen}>\n    <SheetContent side=\"bottom\" className=\"h-[90vh]\">\n      <VideoDetailPanel />\n    </SheetContent>\n  </Sheet>\n</div>\n```\n\n---\n\n## 🎨 Spacing & Sizing Specifications\n\n### Chat Container\n\n```css\n.chat-container {\n  padding: 16px;           /* md spacing */\n  gap: 12px;               /* Between messages */\n  max-width: none;         /* No max width constraint */\n}\n\n.chat-message {\n  max-width: 80%;          /* Messages don't span full width */\n  padding: 12px 16px;      /* Inner padding */\n  border-radius: 12px;     /* Rounded corners */\n}\n\n.chat-input {\n  height: auto;            /* Auto-grow with content */\n  min-height: 48px;        /* Minimum tap target */\n  max-height: 200px;       /* Limit for very long inputs */\n  padding: 12px 16px;      /* Comfortable typing area */\n}\n```\n\n### Video Detail Panel\n\n```css\n.video-detail-panel {\n  width: 40%;              /* Desktop: 40% of screen */\n  min-width: 320px;        /* Don't go smaller */\n  padding: 24px;           /* Spacious feel */\n}\n\n.video-player {\n  aspect-ratio: 16/9;      /* Maintain video ratio */\n  width: 100%;             /* Fill container */\n  border-radius: 8px;      /* Subtle rounding */\n}\n\n.summary-tabs {\n  margin-top: 24px;        /* Space from video */\n  gap: 8px;                /* Between tabs */\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 🔄 Animation Specifications\n\n### Panel Open/Close\n\n```tsx\n// Smooth transition\n<div \n  className={cn(\n    \"transition-all duration-300 ease-out\",\n    isPanelOpen ? \"w-[40%] opacity-100\" : \"w-0 opacity-0\"\n  )}\n/>\n```\n\n**Timing**: 300ms ease-out  \n**Properties**: width, opacity  \n**No transform** (causes layout shift)\n\n### Message Appearance\n\n```tsx\n// Fade in from bottom\n<div \n  className=\"animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-2 duration-200\"\n/>\n```\n\n**Timing**: 200ms  \n**Effect**: Fade + slight upward slide  \n**Trigger**: On message append\n\n### Modal Slide-Up (Mobile)\n\n```tsx\n// Sheet from bottom\n<SheetContent \n  side=\"bottom\"\n  className=\"animate-in slide-in-from-bottom duration-200\"\n/>\n```\n\n**Timing**: 200ms  \n**Effect**: Slide up from bottom  \n**Gesture**: Swipe down to close\n\n---\n\n## 🎯 Z-Index Layers\n\n```typescript\nconst Z_INDEX = {\n  base: 0,              // Main content\n  sticky: 10,           // Sticky headers\n  dropdown: 20,         // Dropdowns, tooltips\n  modal: 30,            // Modals, sheets\n  toast: 40,            // Notifications\n  critical: 50,         // Critical alerts\n}\n```\n\n**Usage**:\n```tsx\n<Sheet className=\"z-30\">        // Modal layer\n<Tooltip className=\"z-20\">      // Dropdown layer\n<StickyHeader className=\"z-10\"> // Sticky layer\n```\n\n---\n\n## 📐 Component Dimensions Reference\n\n| Component | Desktop | Tablet | Mobile |\n|-----------|---------|--------|--------|\n| Top Bar | 64px | 64px | 56px |\n| Chat Input | 48px min | 48px min | 56px min |\n| Video Panel | 40% width | 50% or 400px | Full screen |\n| Message Max Width | 80% | 90% | 95% |\n| Library Sidebar | 320px | 280px | 80vw |\n\n---\n\n## ✅ Implementation Checklist\n\nBefore marking layout as complete, verify:\n\n- [ ] Desktop split-screen works at 1920x1080, 1440x900, 1024x768\n- [ ] Tablet view works at 1024x768, 768x1024 (landscape/portrait)\n- [ ] Mobile view works at 375x667 (iPhone SE), 414x896 (iPhone 11)\n- [ ] Panel collapse animation is smooth (no jank)\n- [ ] Text remains readable at all screen sizes\n- [ ] Touch targets are ≥44px on mobile\n- [ ] Keyboard navigation works (tab order logical)\n\n---\n\n## 🔗 Related Documents\n\n- **Design Principles**: `design/00_design_principles.md`\n- **Component Specs**: `specifications/20_component_specs.md`\n- **User Flows**: `ux/10_user_flows.md`\n\n**Next**: See `ux/10_user_flows.md` for interaction patterns.\n",

              "content": "# User Flows\n\n> **Purpose**: Complete user journey maps for v2.0  \n> **Format**: Mermaid diagrams + step-by-step descriptions  \n> **Last Updated**: 2025-01-18\n\n---\n\n## 🎯 Core User Flows\n\n### Flow 1: New User First-Time Experience\n\n**Goal**: User successfully processes their first video\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TD\n    A[Land on /chat] --> B{Authenticated?}\n    B -->|No| C[Redirect to /login]\n    B -->|Yes| D[Show Empty State]\n    \n    D --> E[Display Guidance Text]\n    E --> F[Show Community Demo Cards]\n    \n    F --> G{User Action}\n    G -->|Paste URL| H[User Types YouTube URL]\n    G -->|Click Demo| I[Open Demo in Panel]\n    \n    H --> J[AI Detects URL]\n    J --> K[Show Processing Card]\n    K --> L[Backend Creates Task]\n    L --> M[Realtime Updates Card]\n    M --> N[Card Shows Completed]\n    N --> O[Panel Auto-Opens]\n    O --> P[User Sees Video + Summary]\n    \n    P --> Q[User Asks Follow-up Question]\n    Q --> R[AI Answers Using Context]\n    R --> S[Success: Engaged User]\n```\n\n**Step-by-Step Breakdown**:\n\n1. **Landing** (0s)\n   - URL: `/chat`\n   - UI: Empty chat with guidance text\n   - Action: Read \"Paste a YouTube URL to start...\"\n\n2. **Discover** (5-10s)\n   - UI: Scroll down, see Community Demo Cards\n   - Option A: Click demo → Skip to step 7\n   - Option B: Paste own URL → Continue to step 3\n\n3. **Submission** (10-15s)\n   - User pastes: `https://youtube.com/watch?v=abc123`\n   - UI: Input shows URL with preview thumbnail\n   - Action: Press Enter or click Send\n\n4. **Processing Starts** (15-16s)\n   - AI sends message: \"I'll analyze this video for you\"\n   - UI: Shows processing card with spinner\n   - Backend: Creates task, starts workflow\n\n5. **Progress Updates** (16-45s)\n   - Card updates: \"Downloading... (Step 1/4)\"\n   - Card updates: \"Transcribing... (Step 2/4)\"\n   - Card updates: \"Summarizing... (Step 3/4)\"\n   - Realtime: Supabase pushes status changes\n\n6. **Completion** (45-50s)\n   - Card shows: \"✓ Ready\"\n   - Button appears: \"View Summary\"\n   - Panel auto-opens on right side\n\n7. **Exploration** (50s+)\n   - User sees video player + summary tabs\n   - User clicks keypoint → Video seeks to timestamp\n   - User asks: \"What was the main conclusion?\"\n   - AI responds using summary context\n\n**Success Criteria**:\n- ✅ User completes flow in <2 minutes\n- ✅ User sends ≥1 follow-up question\n- ✅ User doesn't encounter errors\n\n---\n\n### Flow 2: Returning User - Access Past Videos\n\n**Goal**: User finds and reopens a previously processed video\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TD\n    A[Open /chat] --> B[See Recent Threads]\n    \n    B --> C{Find Video?}\n    C -->|In Recent| D[Click Thread in List]\n    C -->|Not Recent| E[Click Library Button]\n    \n    E --> F[Library Sidebar Opens]\n    F --> G{Search or Browse?}\n    G -->|Search| H[Type in Search Box]\n    G -->|Browse| I[Scroll Through List]\n    \n    H --> J[Results Filter Live]\n    J --> K[Click Result]\n    \n    I --> K\n    D --> K\n    \n    K --> L[Load Thread Messages]\n    L --> M[Open Video Panel]\n    M --> N[Resume Conversation]\n```\n\n**Step-by-Step**:\n\n1. **Open Chat** (0s)\n   - URL: `/chat`\n   - UI: Shows last active thread (if any)\n\n2. **Trigger Library** (2s)\n   - Click \"☰ Library\" button (or press `Cmd+K`)\n   - Sidebar slides in from left\n\n3. **Find Video** (5-15s)\n   - **Option A - Browse**: Scroll through chronological list\n   - **Option B - Search**: Type title/keyword\n   - List shows: Title + Timestamp + Platform icon\n\n4. **Open** (15s)\n   - Click desired video entry\n   - Library sidebar closes\n   - Thread loads (if exists) OR creates new thread\n   - Panel opens with video details\n\n5. **Continue** (20s+)\n   - User asks new questions about the video\n   - AI has full context from original analysis\n\n---\n\n### Flow 3: Multi-URL Handling\n\n**Goal**: User pastes multiple YouTube URLs, system handles gracefully\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TD\n    A[User Types Message with 2+ URLs] --> B[Frontend Detects Multiple URLs]\n    B --> C[Show Confirmation Dialog]\n    \n    C --> D{User Choice}\n    D -->|Process Separately| E[Create 2 Tasks + 2 Threads]\n    D -->|Compare Together| F[Create 2 Tasks + 1 Thread]\n    D -->|Cancel| G[Return to Input]\n    \n    E --> H1[Thread 1 Active]\n    E --> H2[Thread 2 Created]\n    H1 --> I[User Can Switch Threads]\n    \n    F --> J[Both Videos in Same Chat]\n    J --> K[AI Can Compare Content]\n```\n\n**Dialog UI**:\n```\n┌─────────────────────────────────────┐\n│ Detected 2 video links:             │\n│ • How AI Works (5:32)               │\n│ • Machine Learning Intro (12:15)    │\n│                                     │\n│ How should I process them?          │\n│ ⚪ Separately (2 conversations)      │\n│ ⚪ Together (compare in one chat)    │\n│                                     │\n│ [Cancel] [Confirm]                  │\n└─────────────────────────────────────┘\n```\n\n---\n\n### Flow 4: Error Recovery\n\n**Goal**: User encounters error, system guides them to recovery\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TD\n    A[User Submits URL] --> B[Processing Starts]\n    B --> C{Error Occurs}\n    \n    C -->|Invalid URL| D[Show: URL Not Supported]\n    C -->|Network Fail| E[Show: Connection Lost]\n    C -->|Quota Exceeded| F[Show: Upgrade Prompt]\n    \n    D --> G[Suggest Valid Format]\n    E --> H[Retry Button]\n    F --> I[Link to Pricing]\n    \n    G --> J[User Corrects URL]\n    H --> K[Auto-Retry Backend]\n    I --> L[User Upgrades Plan]\n    \n    J --> M[Success]\n    K --> M\n    L --> M\n```\n\n**Error Messages** (User-Friendly):\n\n| Error Type | Message | Recovery Action |\n|------------|---------|-----------------|\n| Invalid URL | \"This doesn't look like a YouTube URL. Try: https://youtube.com/watch?v=...\" | Show format example |\n| Private Video | \"This video is private. Please check the link and try again.\" | Suggest checking permissions |\n| Network Error | \"Connection lost. Retrying in 3s...\" | Auto-retry 3 times |\n| Quota Exceeded | \"You've used all 5 free videos this month. Upgrade to Pro?\" | Show upgrade CTA |\n| Processing Failed | \"Something went wrong. Our team has been notified. Try again in a few minutes.\" | Manual retry button |\n\n---\n\n## 📱 Mobile-Specific Flows\n\n### Flow 5: Mobile Video Viewing\n\n```mermaid\ngraph TD\n    A[User on Mobile] --> B[Paste URL in Chat]\n    B --> C[Processing Card Appears]\n    C --> D[Tap Video Card]\n    \n    D --> E[Sheet Slides Up from Bottom]\n    E --> F[Video Player Fills Screen]\n    F --> G{User Action}\n    \n    G -->|Swipe Down| H[Close Sheet, Back to Chat]\n    G -->|Tap Summary Tab| I[Switch to Summary View]\n    G -->|Ask Question| J[Input Appears at Bottom]\n    \n    J --> K[Question Posted to Chat]\n    K --> H[Sheet Closes, Shows Answer]\n```\n\n**Mobile Gestures**:\n- **Swipe Down**: Close video detail sheet\n- **Swipe Left/Right**: Switch between Summary/Script tabs\n- **Long Press**: Copy text from summary\n- **Double Tap**: Zoom video (if native player)\n\n---\n\n## 🎯 Edge Cases & Alternate Paths\n\n### Edge Case 1: Very Long Video (>2 hours)\n\n**Flow**:\n1. User submits 3-hour lecture\n2. System detects duration\n3. Shows warning: \"This video is 3h long. Processing may take 5-10 minutes.\"\n4. User confirms or cancels\n5. If confirmed: Show extended progress bar with estimated time\n\n### Edge Case 2: Unsupported Platform\n\n**Flow**:\n1. User pastes Vimeo URL (not supported yet)\n2. System shows: \"Currently only YouTube, Bilibili, and Xiaoyuzhou are supported.\"\n3. Offers: \"Request support for Vimeo?\"\n4. If yes: Opens feedback form\n\n### Edge Case 3: Duplicate URL in Same Thread\n\n**Flow**:\n1. User pastes URL already processed in current thread\n2. System detects duplicate\n3. Shows: \"You already analyzed this video in this chat. Would you like to open it again?\"\n4. If yes: Opens panel without reprocessing\n\n---\n\n## ✅ Flow Validation Criteria\n\n**Each flow should**:\n- Have ≤5 user actions to complete\n- Provide feedback within 200ms of each action\n- Offer clear recovery path for errors\n- Work identically on desktop and mobile (except gestures)\n\n**Next**: See `ux/11_wireframes.md` for visual layouts of these flows.\n"

ChatWorkspace\n\n**File Path**: `frontend/src/components/chat/ChatWorkspace.tsx`\n\n### Purpose\nRoot container for the split-screen chat interface. Manages layout and state coordination between chat and video panel.\n\n### Props Interface\n```typescript\ninterface ChatWorkspaceProps {\n  // No props - uses URL params and context\n}\n```\n\n### Local State\n```typescript\nconst [isPanelOpen, setIsPanelOpen] = useState(false)\nconst [currentTaskId, setCurrentTaskId] = useState<string | null>(null)\nconst [isLibraryOpen, setIsLibraryOpen] = useState(false)\nconst [isMobile, setIsMobile] = useState(false)\n```\n\n### Implementation Template\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { useState, useEffect } from 'react'\nimport { useSearchParams } from 'next/navigation'\nimport { cn } from '@/lib/utils'\nimport { ChatContainer } from './ChatContainer'\nimport { VideoDetailPanel } from './VideoDetailPanel'\nimport { LibrarySidebar } from './LibrarySidebar'\n\nexport function ChatWorkspace() {\n  const searchParams = useSearchParams()\n  const taskId = searchParams.get('task')\n  \n  const [isPanelOpen, setIsPanelOpen] = useState(!!taskId)\n  const [currentTaskId, setCurrentTaskId] = useState<string | null>(taskId)\n  const [isLibraryOpen, setIsLibraryOpen] = useState(false)\n  const [isMobile, setIsMobile] = useState(false)\n\n  // Detect mobile\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const checkMobile = () => setIsMobile(window.innerWidth < 768)\n    checkMobile()\n    window.addEventListener('resize', checkMobile)\n    return () => window.removeEventListener('resize', checkMobile)\n  }, [])\n\n  // Open panel when task ID changes\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (taskId) {\n      setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n      setIsPanelOpen(true)\n    }\n  }, [taskId])\n\n  const handleTaskCreated = (newTaskId: string) => {\n    setCurrentTaskId(newTaskId)\n    setIsPanelOpen(true)\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"h-screen flex flex-col\">\n      {/* Top Bar */}\n      <header className=\"h-16 border-b border-white/10 flex items-center px-4 shrink-0\">\n        <button \n          onClick={() => setIsLibraryOpen(true)}\n          className=\"flex items-center gap-2\"\n        >\n          ☰ Library\n        </button>\n        <div className=\"flex-1\" />\n        {/* User menu */}\n      </header>\n\n      {/* Main Content */}\n      <div className=\"flex-1 flex overflow-hidden\">\n        <ChatContainer \n          className=\"flex-1 min-w-[400px]\"\n          onTaskCreated={handleTaskCreated}\n          onOpenPanel={(taskId) => {\n            setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n            setIsPanelOpen(true)\n          }}\n        />\n\n        {/* Desktop Panel */}\n        {!isMobile && (\n          <div \n            className={cn(\n              \"transition-all duration-300 border-l border-white/10 bg-background\",\n              isPanelOpen ? \"w-[40%]\" : \"w-0 opacity-0 overflow-hidden\"\n            )}\n          >\n            {currentTaskId && (\n              <VideoDetailPanel \n                taskId={currentTaskId}\n                onClose={() => setIsPanelOpen(false)}\n              />\n            )}\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Library Sidebar */}\n      <LibrarySidebar \n        isOpen={isLibraryOpen}\n        onClose={() => setIsLibraryOpen(false)}\n        onSelectTask={(taskId) => {\n          setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n          setIsPanelOpen(true)\n          setIsLibraryOpen(false)\n        }}\n      />\n    </div>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n### Validation\n- [ ] Renders split-screen on desktop (≥1024px)\n- [ ] Panel animates smoothly (300ms)\n- [ ] URL param `?task=xxx` auto-opens panel\n- [ ] Library sidebar opens with `Cmd+K`\n\n---\n\n## 2. ChatContainer\n\n**File Path**: `frontend/src/components/chat/ChatContainer.tsx`\n\n### Purpose\nContains chat messages and input. Integrates with AI SDK for message handling.\n\n### Props Interface\n```typescript\ninterface ChatContainerProps {\n  className?: string\n  onTaskCreated?: (taskId: string) => void\n  onOpenPanel?: (taskId: string) => void\n}\n```\n\n### Implementation Template\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { useChat } from '@ai-sdk/react'\nimport { useState } from 'react'\nimport { ChatMessages } from './ChatMessages'\nimport { ChatInput } from './ChatInput'\n\nexport function ChatContainer({ \n  className, \n  onTaskCreated,\n  onOpenPanel \n}: ChatContainerProps) {\n  const { messages, sendMessage, status } = useChat({\n    api: '/api/chat',\n    onFinish: (message) => {\n      // Check if message contains task ID\n      const taskId = extractTaskId(message)\n      if (taskId && onTaskCreated) {\n        onTaskCreated(taskId)\n      }\n    }\n  })\n\n  const handleSubmit = async (content: string) => {\n    await sendMessage({ text: content })\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className={cn(\"flex flex-col h-full\", className)}>\n      <ChatMessages \n        messages={messages}\n        onOpenPanel={onOpenPanel}\n      />\n      <ChatInput \n        onSubmit={handleSubmit}\n        disabled={status === 'streaming'}\n      />\n    </div>\n  )\n}\n\nfunction extractTaskId(message: any): string | null {\n  // Parse message for task_id in tool call result\n  // Implementation depends on AI SDK message format\n  return null\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 3. VideoCardMessage\n\n**File Path**: `frontend/src/components/chat/messages/VideoCardMessage.tsx`\n\n### Purpose\nDisplays video processing status as a card in chat messages.\n\n### Props Interface\n```typescript\ninterface VideoCardMessageProps {\n  taskId: string\n  videoUrl: string\n  title?: string\n  thumbnailUrl?: string\n  status: 'processing' | 'completed' | 'failed'\n  progress?: number\n  onViewClick?: (taskId: string) => void\n}\n```\n\n### Implementation Template\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { Card } from '@/components/ui/card'\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'\nimport { Progress } from '@/components/ui/progress'\nimport { Loader2, CheckCircle, XCircle } from 'lucide-react'\n\nexport function VideoCardMessage({\n  taskId,\n  videoUrl,\n  title,\n  thumbnailUrl,\n  status,\n  progress = 0,\n  onViewClick\n}: VideoCardMessageProps) {\n  const StatusIcon = {\n    processing: Loader2,\n    completed: CheckCircle,\n    failed: XCircle\n  }[status]\n\n  return (\n    <Card className=\"p-4 max-w-sm\">\n      {/* Thumbnail */}\n      {thumbnailUrl && (\n        <img \n          src={thumbnailUrl} \n          alt={title}\n          className=\"w-full aspect-video object-cover rounded-lg mb-3\"\n        />\n      )}\n\n      {/* Title */}\n      <h3 className=\"font-semibold mb-2 line-clamp-2\">\n        {title || 'Processing video...'}\n      </h3>\n\n      {/* Status */}\n      <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-muted-foreground mb-3\">\n        <StatusIcon className={cn(\n          \"w-4 h-4\",\n          status === 'processing' && \"animate-spin\",\n          status === 'completed' && \"text-green-500\",\n          status === 'failed' && \"text-red-500\"\n        )} />\n        <span>\n          {status === 'processing' && `Processing (${progress}%)`}\n          {status === 'completed' && 'Ready'}\n          {status === 'failed' && 'Failed'}\n        </span>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Progress Bar */}\n      {status === 'processing' && (\n        <Progress value={progress} className=\"mb-3\" />\n      )}\n\n      {/* Action Button */}\n      {status === 'completed' && onViewClick && (\n        <Button \n          onClick={() => onViewClick(taskId)}\n          className=\"w-full\"\n        >\n          View Summary\n        </Button>\n      )}\n    </Card>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 4. VideoDetailPanel\n\n**File Path**: `frontend/src/components/chat/VideoDetailPanel.tsx`\n\n### Purpose\nRight-side panel displaying video player and analysis results. Reuses extracted components from TaskDetailClient.\n\n### Props Interface\n```typescript\ninterface VideoDetailPanelProps {\n  taskId: string\n  onClose?: () => void\n  className?: string\n}\n```\n\n### Implementation Template\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { useEffect, useState } from 'react'\nimport { createClient } from '@/lib/supabase'\nimport { VideoPlayer } from '@/components/tasks/VideoPlayer'\nimport { SummarySection } from '@/components/tasks/SummarySection'\nimport { ScriptTimeline } from '@/components/tasks/ScriptTimeline'\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'\nimport { X } from 'lucide-react'\nimport { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs'\n\nexport function VideoDetailPanel({ \n  taskId, \n  onClose, \n  className \n}: VideoDetailPanelProps) {\n  const [task, setTask] = useState(null)\n  const [outputs, setOutputs] = useState([])\n  const supabase = createClient()\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    // Fetch task and outputs\n    const fetchData = async () => {\n      const { data: taskData } = await supabase\n        .from('tasks')\n        .select('*')\n        .eq('id', taskId)\n        .single()\n      \n      const { data: outputsData } = await supabase\n        .from('task_outputs')\n        .select('*')\n        .eq('task_id', taskId)\n\n      setTask(taskData)\n      setOutputs(outputsData || [])\n    }\n\n    fetchData()\n\n    // Realtime subscription\n    const channel = supabase.channel(`task_${taskId}`)\n      .on('postgres_changes', {\n        event: '*',\n        schema: 'public',\n        table: 'tasks',\n        filter: `id=eq.${taskId}`\n      }, (payload) => {\n        setTask(payload.new)\n      })\n      .subscribe()\n\n    return () => {\n      supabase.removeChannel(channel)\n    }\n  }, [taskId])\n\n  if (!task) return <div className=\"p-4\">Loading...</div>\n\n  return (\n    <div className={cn(\"h-full flex flex-col\", className)}>\n      {/* Header */}\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-white/10\">\n        <h2 className=\"font-semibold truncate\">{task.video_title}</h2>\n        {onClose && (\n          <Button variant=\"ghost\" size=\"icon\" onClick={onClose}>\n            <X className=\"w-4 h-4\" />\n          </Button>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Content */}\n      <div className=\"flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 space-y-4\">\n        <VideoPlayer \n          videoUrl={task.video_url}\n          title={task.video_title}\n          coverUrl={task.thumbnail_url}\n        />\n\n        <Tabs defaultValue=\"summary\">\n          <TabsList>\n            <TabsTrigger value=\"summary\">Summary</TabsTrigger>\n            <TabsTrigger value=\"script\">Script</TabsTrigger>\n          </TabsList>\n\n          <TabsContent value=\"summary\">\n            <SummarySection \n              outputs={outputs}\n              taskTitle={task.video_title}\n            />\n          </TabsContent>\n\n          <TabsContent value=\"script\">\n            <ScriptTimeline \n              scriptRawContent={outputs.find(o => o.kind === 'script_raw')?.content}\n            />\n          </TabsContent>\n        </Tabs>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 5. LibrarySidebar\n\n**File Path**: `frontend/src/components/chat/LibrarySidebar.tsx`\n\n### Purpose\nSlide-out sidebar showing user's task history.\n\n### Props Interface\n```typescript\ninterface LibrarySidebarProps {\n  isOpen: boolean\n  onClose: () => void\n  onSelectTask: (taskId: string) => void\n}\n```\n\n### Implementation Template\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { useEffect, useState } from 'react'\nimport { createClient } from '@/lib/supabase'\nimport { Sheet, SheetContent, SheetHeader, SheetTitle } from '@/components/ui/sheet'\nimport { Input } from '@/components/ui/input'\nimport { Search } from 'lucide-react'\n\nexport function LibrarySidebar({ \n  isOpen, \n  onClose, \n  onSelectTask \n}: LibrarySidebarProps) {\n  const [tasks, setTasks] = useState([])\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('')\n  const supabase = createClient()\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (isOpen) {\n      fetchTasks()\n    }\n  }, [isOpen])\n\n  const fetchTasks = async () => {\n    const { data } = await supabase\n      .from('tasks')\n      .select('*')\n      .eq('status', 'completed')\n      .order('created_at', { ascending: false })\n      .limit(20)\n\n    setTasks(data || [])\n  }\n\n  const filteredTasks = tasks.filter(task =>\n    task.video_title?.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())\n  )\n\n  return (\n    <Sheet open={isOpen} onOpenChange={onClose}>\n      <SheetContent side=\"left\" className=\"w-[320px] p-0\">\n        <SheetHeader className=\"p-4 border-b\">\n          <SheetTitle>Library</SheetTitle>\n        </SheetHeader>\n\n        {/* Search */}\n        <div className=\"p-4\">\n          <div className=\"relative\">\n            <Search className=\"absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground\" />\n            <Input\n              placeholder=\"Search videos...\"\n              value={searchQuery}\n              onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}\n              className=\"pl-9\"\n            />\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Task List */}\n        <div className=\"overflow-y-auto\">\n          {filteredTasks.map(task => (\n            <button\n              key={task.id}\n              onClick={() => {\n                onSelectTask(task.id)\n                onClose()\n              }}\n              className=\"w-full text-left p-4 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors border-b border-white/5\"\n            >\n              <div className=\"font-medium truncate\">{task.video_title}</div>\n              <div className=\"text-sm text-muted-foreground\">\n                {new Date(task.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}\n              </div>\n            </button>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      </SheetContent>\n    </Sheet>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## ✅ Component Checklist\n\n**Before marking any component as complete**:\n\n- [ ] TypeScript types defined and exported\n- [ ] Props documented with JSDoc comments\n-               "file": "docs/redesign/reference/decisions.md",
              "before": "# Architecture Decisions Record (ADR)\n\n> **Purpose**: Document key design decisions and their rationale  \n> **Format**: Each decision includes Context, Options Considered, Decision, Consequences  \n> **Last Updated**: 2025-01-18\n\n---\n\n## Decision Log\n\n### ADR-001: Split-Screen Layout (60/40 Fixed Ratio)\n\n**Status**: ✅ Accepted  \n**Date**: 2025-01-18  \n**Deciders**: Product Team\n\n**Context**:\nUser needs to simultaneously view chat conversation and video content. We evaluated different layout approaches.\n\n**Options Considered**:\n1. **Fixed 60/40**: Chat占60%，Video Panel占40%\n2. **Resizable**: 用户可拖拽调整比例\n3. **Preset Layouts**: 提供3个预设（50/50, 60/40, 70/30）\n\n**Decision**: Option 1 (Fixed 60/40)\n\n**Rationale**:\n- Simplifies initial implementation (no drag logic needed)\n- 60/40 ratio tested well in similar tools (Perplexity, Notion AI)\n- Reduces edge cases (min/max width handling)\n- Can upgrade to resizable in v2.1 if needed\n\n**Consequences**:\n- ✅ Faster development\n- ✅ Consistent UX across users\n- ❌ Less flexibility for power users\n- ⚠️ May need adjustment based on user feedback\n\n---\n\n### ADR-002: Component Extraction Strategy\n\n**Status**: ✅ Accepted  \n**Date**: 2025-01-18\n\n**Context**:\n`TaskDetailClient.tsx` is 1000+ lines and tightly coupled to the standalone task page. We need to reuse video display logic in the chat panel.\n\n**Options Considered**:\n1. **Duplicate Code**: Copy-paste logic into new `VideoDetailPanel`\n2. **Extract Shared Components**: Break `TaskDetailClient` into reusable pieces\n3. **Wrapper Component**: Keep `TaskDetailClient` as-is, wrap it in panel\n\n**Decision**: Option 2 (Extract Shared Components)\n\n**Rationale**:\n- Adheres to DRY principle\n- Makes components testable in isolation\n- Easier to maintain (single source of truth)\n- Follows React best practices\n\n**Extraction Plan**:\n```\nTaskDetailClient (monolith)\n  ↓\n  ├── VideoPlayer (extract)\n  ├── SummarySection (extract)\n  ├── ScriptTimeline (already exists)\n  └── MindMapView (extract)\n```\n\n**Consequences**:\n- ✅ Reusable components across app\n- ✅ Easier unit testing\n- ❌ Requires refactoring existing code\n- ⚠️ Risk of breaking current task page (mitigated by tests)\n\n---\n\n### ADR-003: Thread-Task Relationship (1:1 Model)\n\n**Status**: ✅ Accepted  \n**Date**: 2025-01-18\n\n**Context**:\nNeed to decide how chat threads relate to video tasks.\n\n**Options Considered**:\n1. **1:1**: One Thread = One Task (focused conversations)\n2. **1:N**: One Thread can contain multiple Tasks (comparison mode)\n\n**Decision**: Option 1 (1:1 Model)\n\n**Rationale**:\n- Simpler mental model for users\n- Easier to implement (straightforward FK relationship)\n- Aligns with \"Chat about a specific video\" UX\n- Can extend to 1:N later if comparison feature is needed\n\n**Database Design**:\n```sql\nALTER TABLE chat_threads \nADD COLUMN task_id UUID REFERENCES tasks(id);\n\n-- Optional: Enforce uniqueness\nCREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_chat_threads_task_id_unique \nON chat_threads(task_id) WHERE task_id IS NOT NULL;\n```\n\n**Consequences**:\n- ✅ Clear context (each conversation is about one video)\n- ✅ Simple data model\n- ❌ Users can't compare multiple videos in one chat (can add later)\n\n---\n\n### ADR-004: Library UI (Simple List)\n\n**Status**: ✅ Accepted  \n**Date**: 2025-01-18\n\n**Context**:\nLibrary sidebar needs to show user's processed videos.\n\n**Options Considered**:\n1. **Simple List**: Title + timestamp\n2. **Grouped List**: Group by date (Today, Yesterday, etc.)\n3. **Rich Cards**: Thumbnail + title + summary preview\n\n**Decision**: Option 1 (Simple List) for MVP\n\n**Rationale**:\n- Minimalist design matches chat-first UX\n- Fast to implement\n- Low cognitive load (focuses on titles)\n- Can upgrade to grouped/rich view later\n\n**Future Enhancement Path**:\n```\nv2.0: Simple list (title + time)\n  ↓\nv2.1: Add date grouping\n  ↓\nv2.2: Add thumbnail preview\n  ↓\nv2.3: Add tag filtering\n```\n\n**Consequences**:\n- ✅ Clean, fast interface\n- ✅ Easy to scan long lists\n- ❌ Less visual (no thumbnails)\n- ⚠️ May need search for power users with 100+ tasks\n\n---\n\n### ADR-005: Mobile UX (Modal/Drawer Pattern)\n\n**Status**: ✅ Accepted  \n**Date**: 2025-01-18\n\n**Context**:\nMobile screens (<768px) can't fit split-screen layout.\n\n**Options Considered**:\n1. **Stack Layout**: Chat on top, scroll to video details below\n2. **Tab Switching**: [Chat] [Video] tabs\n3. **Modal/Drawer**: Chat as main view, video details in modal\n\n**Decision**: Option 3 (Modal/Drawer)\n\n**Rationale**:\n- Follows mobile design standards (iOS/Android patterns)\n- Clear hierarchy (chat is primary, video is secondary)\n- No accidental scrolling issues\n- Easy to dismiss (swipe down to close)\n\n**Implementation**:\n```tsx\n// Desktop (≥768px)\n<div className=\"flex\">\n  <ChatContainer />\n  <VideoDetailPanel />\n</div>\n\n// Mobile (<768px)\n<div>\n  <ChatContainer />\n  <Sheet open={isVideoOpen}>\n    <VideoDetailPanel />\n  </Sheet>\n</div>\n```\n\n**Consequences**:\n- ✅ Native mobile feel\n- ✅ Consistent with other mobile apps\n- ❌ Requires managing modal state\n- ⚠️ Need smooth animations for good UX\n\n---\n\n### ADR-006: Empty State Design (Guidance + Demo Cards)\n\n**Status**: ✅ Accepted  \n**Date**: 2025-01-18\n\n**Context**:\nWhen user first opens chat (no messages), we need to guide them.\n\n**Options Considered**:\n1. **Blank Canvas**: Just input box, no guidance\n2. **Onboarding Tutorial**: 3-step walkthrough\n3. **Guidance + Examples**: Text prompt + demo cards\n\n**Decision**: Option 3 (Guidance + Examples)\n\n**Rationale**:\n- Balances simplicity and discoverability\n- Reuses existing `CommunityTemplates` component\n- Shows product value immediately (via demos)\n- Non-intrusive (no forced tutorial)\n\n**Design**:\n```\n┌─────────────────────────────────┐\n│  Paste a YouTube URL to start   │\n│  Example: https://youtu.be/...  │\n│                                 │\n│  ────── Community Examples ──── │\n│  [Demo Card 1] [Demo Card 2]    │\n│  [Demo Card 3] [Demo Card 4]    │\n└─────────────────────────────────┘\n```\n\n**Consequences**:\n- ✅ Clear call-to-action\n- ✅ Showcases product capabilities\n- ✅ Reduces bounce rate (engagement hook)\n- ❌ Slightly more visual noise\n\n---\n\n### ADR-007: AI Tool Calling Implementation\n\n**Status**: ✅ Accepted  \n**Date**: 2025-01-18\n\n**Context**:\nNeed to integrate video processing into chat workflow.\n\n**Options Considered**:\n1. **Vercel AI SDK Tools**: Use built-in `tools` parameter\n2. **Custom Function Calling**: Parse messages manually\n3. **Hybrid**: AI SDK for parsing, custom for execution\n\n**Decision**: Option 1 (Vercel AI SDK Tools)\n\n**Rationale**:\n- Native support in AI SDK (`useChat` hook)\n- Handles streaming automatically\n- Standard interface (easier for future LLM swaps)\n- Well-documented patterns\n\n**Implementation**:\n```typescript\nconst { messages } = useChat({\n  api: '/api/chat',\n  tools: {\n    process_video: {\n      description: 'Process a YouTube video',\n      parameters: z.object({\n        video_url: z.string().url(),\n        language: z.string().optional(),\n      }),\n      execute: async ({ video_url, language }) => {\n        // Call backend /api/process-video\n        return { task_id, status }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n})\n```\n\n**Consequences**:\n- ✅ Leverages existing infrastructure\n- ✅ Future-proof (tool calling is LLM standard)\n- ❌ Tied to AI SDK (but acceptable trade-off)\n\n---\n\n## Open Questions\n\n**Q1**: Should we support multiple URL processing in one message?  \n**Status**: ⏳ Pending  \n**Proposed Solution**: Show confirmation dialog asking user intent (separate threads vs. compare mode)\n\n**Q2**: How to handle Library pagination for users with 500+ tasks?  \n**Status**: ⏳ Pending  \n**Options**: Infinite scroll vs. Load more button vs. Virtual scrolling\n\n**Q3**: Should we preserve the standalone `/tasks/[id]` page for SEO/sharing?  \n**Status**: ⏳ Pending  \n**Impact**: Old links break vs. Maintain two views\n\n---\n\n## Future Decisions (Post-MVP)\n\n- **Keyboard Shortcuts**: Define comprehensive shortcut map (Cmd+K, Cmd+/, etc.)\n- **Drag-to-Resize**: Add resizable panel divider\n- **Offline Support**: Handle disconnected state gracefully\n- **Voice Input**: Allow voice-to-text for chat input\n\n---\n\n## Decision Review Process\n\n**When to Update This Document**:\n- Before implementing any major architectural change\n- When user feedback contradicts a decision\n- When technical constraints invalidate an option\n\n**Review Frequency**: Monthly or after each major release\n\n**Last Reviewed**: 2025-01-18\n",
              "after": "# Architecture Decisions Record (ADR)\n\n> **Purpose**: Document key design decisions and their rationale  \n> **Format**: Each decision includes Context, Options Considered, Decision, Consequences  \n> **Last Updated**: 2025-01-18\n\n---\n\n## Decision Log\n\n### ADR-001: Split-Screen Layout (60/40 Fixed Ratio)\n\n**Status**: ✅ Accepted  \n**Date**: 2025-01-18  \n**Deciders**: Product Team\n\n**Context**:\nUser needs to simultaneously view chat conversation and video content. Path**:\n```\nv2.0: Simple list (title + time)\n  ↓\nv2.1: Add date grouping\n  ↓\nv2.2: Add thumbnail preview\n  ↓\nv2.3: Add tag filtering\n```\n\n**Consequences**:\n- ✅ Clean, fast interface\n- ✅ Easy to scan long lists\n- ❌ Less visual (no thumbnails)\n- ⚠️ May need search for power users with 100+ tasks\n\n---\n\n### ADR-005: Mobile UX (Modal/Drawer Pattern)\n\n**Status**: ✅ Accepted  \n**Date**: 2025-01-18\n\n**Context**:\nMobile screens (<768px) can't fit split-screen layout.\n\n**Options Considered**:\n1. **Stack Layout**: Chat on top, scroll to video details below\n2. **Tab Switching**: [Chat] [Video] tabs\n3. **Modal/Drawer**: Chat as main view, video details in modal\n\n**Decision**: Option 3 (Modal/Drawer)\n\n**Rationale**:\n- Follows mobile design standards (iOS/Android patterns)\n- Clear hierarchy (chat is primary, video is secondary)\n- No accidental scrolling issues\n- Easy to dismiss (swipe down to close)\n\n**Implementation**:\n```tsx\n// Desktop (≥768px)\n<div className=\"flex\">\n  <ChatContainer />\n  <VideoDetailPanel />\n</div>\n\n// Mobile (<768px)\n<div>\n  <ChatContainer />\n  <Sheet open={isVideoOpen}>\n    <VideoDetailPanel />\n  </Sheet>\n</div>\n```\n\n**Consequences**:\n- ✅ Native mobile feel\n- ✅ Consistent with other mobile apps\n- ❌ Requires managing modal state\n- ⚠️ Need smooth animations for good UX\n\n---\n\n### ADR-006: Empty State Design (Guidance + Demo Cards)\n\n**Status**: ✅ Accepted  \n**Date**: 2025-01-18\n\n**Context**:\nWhen user first opens chat (no messages), we need to guide them.\n\n**Options Considered**:\n1. **Blank Canvas**: Just input box, no guidance\n2. **Onboarding Tutorial**: 3-step walkthrough\n3. **Guidance + Examples**: Text prompt + demo cards\n\n**Decision**: Option 3 (Guidance + Examples)\n\n**Rationale**:\n- Balances simplicity and discoverability\n- Reuses existing `CommunityTemplates` component\n- Shows product value immediately (via demos)\n- Non-intrusive (no forced tutorial)\n\n**Design**:\n```\n┌─────────────────────────────────┐\n│  Paste a YouTube URL to start   │\n│  Example: https://youtu.be/...  │\n│                                 │\n│  ────── Community Examples ──── │\n│  [Demo Card 1] [Demo Card 2]    │\n│  [Demo Card 3] [Demo Card 4]    │\n└─────────────────────────────────┘\n```\n\n**Consequences**:\n- ✅ Clear call-to-action\n- ✅ Showcases product capabilities\n- ✅ Reduces bounce rate (engagement hook)\n- ❌ Slightly more visual noise\n\n---\n\n### ADR-007: Multi-URL Handling Strategy\n\n**Status**: ✅ Accepted  \n**Date**: 2025-01-18\n\n**Context**:\nUsers may paste multiple YouTube URLs in a single message. We need to define how the system handles this scenario.\n\n**Options Considered**:\n1. **Process All Simultaneously**: Create multiple tasks in parallel\n2. **Process Separately**: Create multiple threads, one per URL\n3. **Ask User to Choose One**: Only allow one URL per thread\n\n**Decision**: Option 3 (One URL Per Thread)\n\n**Rationale**:\n- Enforces clear context (one conversation = one video)\n- Prevents confusion in chat history\n- Aligns with 1:1 Thread-Task relationship (ADR-003)\n- Simpler implementation (no batch processing logic)\n- Users can create multiple threads if needed\n\n**User Experience**:\nWhen multiple URLs detected:\n```\n┌────────────────────────────────────┐\n│ ⚠️  Multiple URLs Detected         │\n│                                    │\n│ I can only process one video per   │\n│ conversation. Which one would you  │\n│ like me to analyze?                │\n│                                    │\n│ 1️⃣ https://youtube.com/watch?v=A  │\n│ 2️⃣ https://youtube.com/watch?v=B  │\n│                                    │\n│ Reply with 1 or 2, or paste a      │\n│ single URL to start fresh.         │\n└────────────────────────────────────┘\n```\n\n**Consequences**:\n- ✅ Clear, predictable behavior\n- ✅ No ambiguity in chat context\n- ✅ Simpler state management\n- ❌ Users must create separate threads for multiple videos (acceptable)\n\n---\n\n### ADR-008: AI Tool Calling Implementation\n\n**Status**: ✅ Accepted  \n**Date**: 2025-01-18\n\n**Context**:\nNeed to integrate video processing into chat workflow.\n\n**Options Considered**:\n1. **Vercel AI SDK Tools**: Use built-in `tools` parameter\n2. **Custom Function Calling**: Parse messages manually\n3. **Hybrid**: AI SDK for parsing, custom for execution\n\n**Decision**: Option 1 (Vercel AI SDK Tools)\n\n**Rationale**:\n- Native support in AI SDK (`useChat` hook)\n- Handles streaming automatically\n- Standard interface (easier for future LLM swaps)\n- Well-documented patterns\n\n**Implementation**:\n```typescript\nconst { messages } = useChat({\n  api: '/api/chat',\n  tools: {\n    process_video: {\n      description: 'Process a YouTube video',\n      parameters: z.object({\n        video_url: z.string().url(),\n        language: z.string().optional(),\n      }),\n      execute: async ({ video_url, language }) => {\n        // Call backend /api/process-video\n        return { task_id, status }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n})\n```\n\n**Consequences**:\n- ✅ Leverages existing infrastructure\n- ✅ Future-proof (tool calling is LLM standard)\n- ❌ Tied to AI SDK (but acceptable trade-off)\n\n---\n\n## Open Questions\n\n**Q1**: How to handle Library pagination for users with 500+ tasks?  \n**Status**: ⏳ Pending  \n**Options**: Infinite scroll vs. Load more button vs. Virtual scrolling\n\n**Q2**: Should we preserve the standalone `/tasks/[id]` page for SEO/sharing?  \n**Status**: ⏳ Pending  \n**Impact**: Old links break vs. Maintain two views\n\n**Q3**: Should we add \"Compare Videos\" feature in future?  \n**Status**: ⏳ Pending  \n**Note**: Currently enforcing one URL per thread. If users request comparison, we could add a dedicated \"Compare\" mode in v2.1\n\n---\n\n## Future Decisions (Post-MVP)\n\n- **Keyboard Shortcuts**: Define comprehensive shortcut map (Cmd+K, Cmd+/, etc.)\n- **Drag-to-Resize**: Add resizable panel divider\n- **Offline Support**: Handle disconnected state gracefully\n- **Voice Input**: Allow voice-to-text for chat input\n\n---\n\n## Decision Review Process\n\n**When to Update This Document**:\n- Before implementing any major architectural change\n- When user feedback contradicts a decision\n- When technical constraints invalidate an option\n\n**Review Frequency**: Monthly or after each major release\n\n**Last Reviewed**: 2025-01-18\n",
