VideoDetailPanel\n00329| \n00330| **File Path**: `frontend/src/components/chat/VideoDetailPanel.tsx`\n00331| \n00332| ### Purpose\n00333| Right-side panel displaying video player and analysis results. Reuses extracted components from TaskDetailClient.\n00334| \n00335| ### Props Interface\n00336| ```typescript\n00337| interface VideoDetailPanelProps {\n00338|   taskId: string\n00339|   onClose?: () => void\n00340|   className?: string\n00341| }\n00342| ```\n00343| \n00344| ### Implementation Template\n00345| ```typescript\n00346| 'use client'\n00347| \n00348| import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'\n00349| import { createClient } from '@/lib/supabase'\n00350| import { VideoPlayer } from '@/components/tasks/VideoPlayer'\n00351| import { SummarySection } from '@/components/tasks/SummarySection'\n00352| import { ScriptTimeline } from '@/components/tasks/ScriptTimeline'\n00353| import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'\n00354| import { X } from 'lucide-react'\n00355| import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs'\n00356| \n00357| export function VideoDetailPanel({ \n00358|   taskId, \n00359|   onClose, \n00360|   className \n00361| }: VideoDetailPanelProps) {\n00362|   const [task, setTask] = useState(null)\n00363|   const [outputs, setOutputs] = useState([])\n00364|   const supabase = createClient()\n00365| \n00366|   useEffect(() => {\n00367|     // Fetch task and outputs\n00368|     const fetchData = async () => {\n00369|       const { data: taskData } = await supabase\n00370|         .from('tasks')\n00371|         .select('*')\n00372|         .eq('id', taskId)\n00373|         .single()\n00374|       \n00375|       const { data: outputsData } = await supabase\n00376|         .from('task_outputs')\n00377|         .select('*')\n00378|         .eq('task_id', taskId)\n00379| \n00380|       setTask(taskData)\n00381|       setOutputs(outputsData || [])\n00382|     }\n00383| \n00384|     fetchData()\n00385| \n00386|     // Realtime subscription\n00387|     const channel = supabase.channel(`task_${taskId}`)\n00388|       .on('postgres_changes', {\n00389|         event: '*',\n00390|         schema: 'public',\n00391|         table: 'tasks',\n00392|         filter: `id=eq.${taskId}`\n00393|       }, (payload) => {\n00394|         setTask(payload.new)\n00395|       })\n00396|       .subscribe()\n00397| \n00398|     return () => {\n00399|       supabase.removeChannel(channel)\n00400|     }\n00401|   }, [taskId])\n00402| \n00403|   if (!task) return <div className=\"p-4\">Loading...</div>\n00404| \n00405|   return (\n00406|     <div className={cn(\"h-full flex flex-col\", className)}>\n00407|       {/* Header */}\n00408|       <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-white/10\">\n00409|         <h2 className=\"font-semibold truncate\">{task.video_title}</h2>\n00410|         {onClose && (\n00411|           <Button variant=\"ghost\" size=\"icon\" onClick={onClose}>\n00412|             <X className=\"w-4 h-4\" />\n00413|           </Button>\n00414|         )}\n00415|       </div>\n00416| \n00417|       {/* Content */}\n00418|       <div className=\"flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 space-y-4\">\n00419|         <VideoPlayer \n00420|           videoUrl={task.video_url}\n00421|           title={task.video_title}\n00422|           coverUrl={task.thumbnail_url}\n00423|         />\n00424| \n00425|         <Tabs defaultValue=\"summary\">\n00426|           <TabsList>\n00427|             <TabsTrigger value=\"summary\">Summary</TabsTrigger>\n00428|             <TabsTrigger value=\"script\">Script</TabsTrigger>\n00429|           </TabsList>\n00430| \n00431|           <TabsContent value=\"summary\">\n00432|             <SummarySection \n00433|               outputs={outputs}\n00434|               taskTitle={task.video_title}\n00435|             />\n00436|           </TabsContent>\n00437| \n00438|           <TabsContent value=\"script\">\n00439|             <ScriptTimeline \n00440|               scriptRawContent={outputs.find(o => o.kind === 'script_raw')?.content}\n00441|             />\n00442|           </TabsContent>\n00443|         </Tabs>\n00444|       </div>\n00445|     </div>\n00446|   )\n00447| }\n00448| ```\n00449| \n00450| ---\n00451| \n00452| ## 5. LibrarySidebar\n00453| \n00454| **File Path**: `frontend/src/components/chat/LibrarySidebar.tsx`\n00455| \n00456| ### Purpose\n00457| Slide-out sidebar showing user's task history.\n00458| \n00459| ### Props Interface\n00460| ```typescript\n00461| interface LibrarySidebarProps {\n00462|   isOpen: boolean\n00463|   onClose: () => void\n00464|   onSelectTask: (taskId: string) => void\n00465| }\n00466| ```\n00467| \n00468| ### Implementation Template\n00469| ```typescript\n00470| 'use client'\n00471| \n00472| import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'\n00473| import { createClient } from '@/lib/supabase'\n00474| import { Sheet, SheetContent, SheetHeader, SheetTitle } from '@/components/ui/sheet'\n00475| import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input'\n00476| import { Search } from 'lucide-react'\n00477| \n00478| export function LibrarySidebar({ \n00479|   isOpen, \n00480|   onClose, \n00481|   onSelectTask \n00482| }: LibrarySidebarProps) {\n00483|   const [tasks, setTasks] = useState([])\n00484|   const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('')\n00485|   const supabase = createClient()\n00486| \n00487|   useEffect(() => {\n00488|     if (isOpen) {\n00489|       fetchTasks()\n00490|     }\n00491|   }, [isOpen])\n00492| \n00493|   const fetchTasks = async () => {\n00494|     const { data } = await supabase\n00495|       .from('tasks')\n00496|       .select('*')\n00497|       .eq('status', 'completed')\n00498|       .order('created_at', { ascending: false })\n00499|       .limit(20)\n00500| \n00501|     setTasks(data || [])\n00502|   }\n00503| \n00504|   const filteredTasks = tasks.filter(task =>\n00505|     task.video_title?.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())\n00506|   )\n00507| \n00508|   return (\n00509|     <Sheet open={isOpen} onOpenChange={onClose}>\n00510|       <SheetContent side=\"left\" className=\"w-[320px] p-0\">\n00511|         <SheetHeader className=\"p-4 border-b\">\n00512|           <SheetTitle>Library</SheetTitle>\n00513|         </SheetHeader>\n00514| \n00515|         {/* Search */}\n00516|         <div className=\"p-4\">\n00517|           <div className=\"relative\">\n00518|             <Search className=\"absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground\" />\n00519|             <Input\n00520|               placeholder=\"Search videos...\"\n00521|               value={searchQuery}\n00522|               onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}\n00523|               className=\"pl-9\"\n00524|             />\n00525|           </div>\n00526|         </div>\n00527| \n00528|         {/* Task List */}\n00529|         <div className=\"overflow-y-auto\">\n00530|           {filteredTasks.map(task => (\n00531|             <button\n00532|               key={task.id}\n00533|               onClick={() => {\n00534|                 onSelectTask(task.id)\n00535|                 onClose()\n00536|               }}\n00537|               className=\"w-full text-left p-4 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors border-b border-white/5\"\n00538|             >\n00539|               <div className=\"font-medium truncate\">{task.video_title}</div>\n00540|               <div className=\"text-sm text-muted-foreground\">\n00541|                 {new Date(task.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}\n00542|               </div>\n00543|             </button>\n00544|           ))}\n00545|         </div>\n00546|       </SheetContent>\n00547|     </Sheet>\n00548|   )\n00549| }\n00550| ```\n00551| \n00552| ---\n00553| \n00554| ## ✅ Component Checklist\n00555| \n00556| **Before marking any component as complete**:\n00557| \n00558| - [ ] TypeScript types defined and exported\n00559| - [ ] Props documented with JSDoc comments\n00560| - [ ] Responsive behavior implemented (mobile/desktop)\n00561| - [ ] Loading states handled\n00562| - [ ] Error states handled\n00563| - [ ] Accessibility attributes added (aria-*, role)\n00564| - [ ] Unit tests written (if applicable)\n00565| - [ ] Integrated with parent component\n00566| \n00567| **Next**: See `tasks/phase-2-frontend/task-2.1-chat-workspace.md` to start implementation.\n00568| \n\n(End of file - total               "content": "# Task 2.1: Create ChatWorkspace Container\n\n> **Phase**: 2 - Frontend Implementation  \n> **Priority**: Critical  \n> **Estimated Time**: 1.5 hours  \n> **Dependencies**: Task 2.0 (Setup Workspace)\n\n---\n\n## 🎯 Objective\n\nCreate the root ChatWorkspace container that manages the split-screen layout, state coordination between chat and video panel, and responsive behavior.\n\n---\n\n## 📋 Prerequisites\n\n- [x] Task 2.0 completed\n- [x] Directory structure created (`components/chat/`)\n- [x] Type definitions exist (`types/chat.ts`)\n- [x] URL utilities created (`lib/url-utils.ts`)\n\n**Verification Command**:\n```bash\ncd frontend/src\nls components/chat/\nls types/chat.ts\nls lib/url-utils.ts\n```\n\n---\n\n## 🔨 Implementation Steps\n\n### Step 1: Create ChatWorkspace Component\n\n**File**: `frontend/src/components/chat/ChatWorkspace.tsx`\n\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { useState, useEffect } from 'react'\nimport { useSearchParams, useRouter } from 'next/navigation'\nimport { cn } from '@/lib/utils'\nimport { ChatContainer } from './ChatContainer'\nimport { VideoDetailPanel } from './VideoDetailPanel'\nimport { LibrarySidebar } from './LibrarySidebar'\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'\nimport { Menu, X } from 'lucide-react'\n\nexport function ChatWorkspace() {\n  const searchParams = useSearchParams()\n  const router = useRouter()\n  const taskId = searchParams.get('task')\n  \n  // State management\n  const [isPanelOpen, setIsPanelOpen] = useState(!!taskId)\n  const [currentTaskId, setCurrentTaskId] = useState<string | null>(taskId)\n  const [isLibraryOpen, setIsLibraryOpen] = useState(false)\n  const [isMobile, setIsMobile] = useState(false)\n\n  // Detect mobile viewport\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const checkMobile = () => setIsMobile(window.innerWidth < 1024)\n    checkMobile()\n    window.addEventListener('resize', checkMobile)\n    return () => window.removeEventListener('resize', checkMobile)\n  }, [])\n\n  // Sync with URL params\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (taskId && taskId !== currentTaskId) {\n      setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n      setIsPanelOpen(true)\n    }\n  }, [taskId])\n\n  // Handle task creation from chat\n  const handleTaskCreated = (newTaskId: string) => {\n    setCurrentTaskId(newTaskId)\n    setIsPanelOpen(true)\n    \n    // Update URL without navigation\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(searchParams.toString())\n    params.set('task', newTaskId)\n    router.push(`?${params.toString()}`, { scroll: false })\n  }\n\n  // Handle panel close\n  const handleClosePanel = () => {\n    setIsPanelOpen(false)\n    \n    // Remove task param from URL\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(searchParams.toString())\n    params.delete('task')\n    const newUrl = params.toString() ? `?${params.toString()}` : ''\n    router.push(newUrl, { scroll: false })\n  }\n\n  // Handle task selection from library\n  const handleSelectTask = (taskId: string) => {\n    setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n    setIsPanelOpen(true)\n    setIsLibraryOpen(false)\n    \n    // Update URL\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(searchParams.toString())\n    params.set('task', taskId)\n    router.push(`?${params.toString()}`, { scroll: false })\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"h-screen flex flex-col bg-background\">\n      {/* Top Bar */}\n      <header className=\"h-16 border-b border-white/10 flex items-center px-4 shrink-0\">\n        <Button\n          variant=\"ghost\"\n          size=\"sm\"\n          onClick={() => setIsLibraryOpen(true)}\n          className=\"gap-2\"\n        >\n          <Menu className=\"w-4 h-4\" />\n          <span className=\"hidden md:inline\">Library</span>\n        </Button>\n\n        <div className=\"flex-1\" />\n\n        {/* Close panel button (desktop only, when panel is open) */}\n        {!isMobile && isPanelOpen && (\n          <Button\n            variant=\"ghost\"\n            size=\"sm\"\n            onClick={handleClosePanel}\n            className=\"gap-2\"\n          >\n            <X className=\"w-4 h-4\" />\n            Close Panel\n          </Button>\n        )}\n      </header>\n\n      {/* Main Content Area */}\n      <div className=\"flex-1 flex overflow-hidden\">\n        {/* Chat Container (Left Side) */}\n        <ChatContainer\n          className={cn(\n            \"flex-1 min-w-[320px]\",\n            // On desktop, limit width when panel is open\n            !isMobile && isPanelOpen && \"max-w-[60%]\"\n          )}\n          onTaskCreated={handleTaskCreated}\n          onOpenPanel={(taskId) => {\n            setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n            setIsPanelOpen(true)\n          }}\n        />\n\n        {/* Video Detail Panel (Right Side - Desktop Only) */}\n        {!isMobile && (\n          <div\n            className={cn(\n              \"transition-all duration-300 ease-out border-l border-white/10 bg-background\",\n              isPanelOpen ? \"w-[40%] opacity-100\" : \"w-0 opacity-0 overflow-hidden\"\n            )}\n          >\n            {currentTaskId && isPanelOpen && (\n              <VideoDetailPanel\n                taskId={currentTaskId}\n                onClose={handleClosePanel}\n              />\n            )}\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Library Sidebar (Slide-out from left) */}\n      <LibrarySidebar\n        isOpen={isLibraryOpen}\n        onClose={() => setIsLibraryOpen(false)}\n        onSelectTask={handleSelectTask}\n      />\n\n      {/* Mobile Video Modal */}\n      {isMobile && currentTaskId && isPanelOpen && (\n        <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-background\">\n          <VideoDetailPanel\n            taskId={currentTaskId}\n            onClose={() => setIsPanelOpen(false)}\n          />\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </div>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n**Verification**:\n```bash\n# Check TypeScript compilation\ncd frontend\nnpx tsc --noEmit\n```\n\n---\n\n### Step 2: Create ChatContainer Component (Stub)\n\n**File**: `frontend/src/components/chat/ChatContainer.tsx`\n\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { cn } from '@/lib/utils'\n\ninterface ChatContainerProps {\n  className?: string\n  onTaskCreated?: (taskId: string) => void\n  onOpenPanel?: (taskId: string) => void\n}\n\nexport function ChatContainer({\n  className,\n  onTaskCreated,\n  onOpenPanel\n}: ChatContainerProps) {\n  return (\n    <div className={cn(\"flex flex-col h-full\", className)}>\n      {/* Messages Area */}\n      <div className=\"flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4\">\n        <div className=\"text-center text-muted-foreground\">\n          ChatContainer placeholder\n          <br />\n          <small>Will be implemented in Task 2.4</small>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Input Area */}\n      <div className=\"p-4 border-t border-white/10\">\n        <input\n          type=\"text\"\n          placeholder=\"Paste a YouTube URL to start...\"\n          className=\"w-full px-4 py-2 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-lg\"\n          disabled\n        />\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n**Verification**:\n```bash\nnpx tsc --noEmit\n```\n\n---\n\n### Step 3: Create VideoDetailPanel Component (Stub)\n\n**File**: `frontend/src/components/chat/VideoDetailPanel.tsx`\n\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { cn } from '@/lib/utils'\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'\nimport { X } from 'lucide-react'\n\ninterface VideoDetailPanelProps {\n  taskId: string\n  onClose?: () => void\n  className?: string\n}\n\nexport function VideoDetailPanel({\n  taskId,\n  onClose,\n  className\n}: VideoDetailPanelProps) {\n  return (\n    <div className={cn(\"h-full flex flex-col\", className)}>\n      {/* Header */}\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-white/10 shrink-0\">\n        <h2 className=\"font-semibold\">Video Detail</h2>\n        {onClose && (\n          <Button variant=\"ghost\" size=\"icon\" onClick={onClose}>\n            <X className=\"w-4 h-4\" />\n          </Button>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Content */}\n      <div className=\"flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4\">\n        <div className=\"text-muted-foreground\">\n          VideoDetailPanel for task: {taskId}\n          <br />\n          <small>Will be implemented in Task 2.2</small>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n**Verification**:\n```bash\nnpx tsc --noEmit\n```\n\n---\n\n### Step 4: Create LibrarySidebar Component (Stub)\n\n**File**: `frontend/src/components/chat/LibrarySidebar.tsx`\n\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { Sheet, SheetContent, SheetHeader, SheetTitle } from '@/components/ui/sheet'\n\ninterface LibrarySidebarProps {\n  isOpen: boolean\n  onClose: () => void\n  onSelectTask: (taskId: string) => void\n}\n\nexport function LibrarySidebar({\n  isOpen,\n  onClose,\n  onSelectTask\n}: LibrarySidebarProps) {\n  return (\n    <Sheet open={isOpen} onOpenChange={onClose}>\n      <SheetContent side=\"left\" className=\"w-[320px] p-0\">\n        <SheetHeader className=\"p-4 border-b border-white/10\">\n          <SheetTitle>Library</SheetTitle>\n        </SheetHeader>\n\n        <div className=\"p-4 text-muted-foreground text-sm\">\n          LibrarySidebar placeholder\n          <br />\n          <small>Will be implemented in Task 2.3</small>\n        </div>\n      </SheetContent>\n    </Sheet>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n**Verification**:\n```bash\nnpx tsc --noEmit\n```\n\n---\n\n### better UX:\n\n```typescript\n// Add inside ChatWorkspace component\nuseEffect(() => {\n  const handleKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {\n    // Cmd/Ctrl + K to open library\n    if ((e.metaKey || e.ctrlKey) && e.key === 'k') {\n      e.preventDefault()\n      setIsLibraryOpen(true)\n    }\n\n    // Escape to close panel (desktop only)\n    if (e.key === 'Escape' && !isMobile && isPanelOpen) {\n      handleClosePanel()\n    }\n  }\n\n  window.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown)\n  return () => window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown)\n}, [isMobile, isPanelOpen])\n```\n\n**Verification**:\n```bash\n# Test in browser\n# Press Cmd+K → Library should open\n# Press Escape (with panel open) → Panel should close\n```\n\n---\n\n## ✅ Validation               "file": "docs/redesign/design/00_design_principles.md",
              "before": "# Design Principles\n\n> **Purpose**: Define the core design philosophy for v2.0  \n> **Audience**: Designers, Frontend Developers, Coding Agents  \n> **Last Updated**: 2025-01-18\n\n---\n\n## 🎨 Core Principles\n\n### 1. **Conversation-First**\n\n**Principle**: All interactions should feel like a natural conversation, not a form submission.\n\n**Implementation**:\n- ✅ DO: Natural language input (\"Summarize https://youtu.be/...\")\n- ❌ DON'T: Multi-step forms with dropdowns\n\n**Example**:\n```\nBAD (Form-based):\n┌─────────────────────┐\n│ Video URL: [_____] │\n│ Language:  [v]     │\n│ Output:    [v]     │\n│ [Submit]           │\n└─────────────────────┘\n\nGOOD (Conversational):\n┌─────────────────────┐\n│ User: Summarize     │\n│ https://youtu.be/...│\n│                     │\n│ AI: Processing...   │\n└─────────────────────┘\n```\n\n---\n\n### 2. **Progressive Disclosure**\n\n**Principle**: Show simple views first, reveal complexity only when needed.\n\n**Implementation**:\n- Start with minimal chat interface\n- Expand to video panel when relevant\n- Hide advanced features until requested\n\n**Hierarchy**:\n```\nLevel 1: Chat input (always visible)\n  ↓\nLevel 2: Video card in messages (when URL processed)\n  ↓\nLevel 3: Detail panel (when user clicks \"View\")\n  ↓\nLevel 4: Advanced features (MindMap, exports)\n```\n\n---\n\n### 3. **Context-Aware**\n\n**Principle**: UI adapts to what the user is currently doing.\n\n**States**:\n- **Empty State**: Guidance + demo cards\n- **Processing State**: Progress indicators + estimated time\n- **Completed State**: Interactive results + Q&A prompts\n- **Error State**: Clear error messages + recovery actions\n\n---\n\n### 4. **Keyboard-First (for Power Users)**\n\n**Principle**: Every action should have a keyboard shortcut.\n\n**Core Shortcuts**:\n```\nCmd/Ctrl + K     → Open Library\nCmd/Ctrl + /     → Focus chat input\nCmd/Ctrl + \\     → Toggle video panel\nEsc              → Close panels/modals\nCmd/Ctrl + Enter → Send message\n```\n\n---\n\n### 5. **Mobile-Optimized**\n\n**Principle**: Mobile is not an afterthought; design for thumb-reach zones.\n\n**Thumb Zones**:\n```\n┌──────────────┐\n│ Hard to reach│ (Avoid primary actions here)\n│              │\n│   Easy       │ (Place input, send button)\n│   Zone       │\n│              │\n│ Easy (Bottom)│ (Place tab bar, close buttons)\n└──────────────┘\n```\n\n---\n\n## 🎯 Design Goals\n\n### Primary Goals\n1. **Reduce Time-to-Insight**: From URL paste to first Q&A in <30 seconds\n2. **Increase Engagement**: Encourage follow-up questions (3+ messages per session)\n3. **Lower Learning Curve**: New users productive in <2 minutes\n\n### Secondary Goals\n4. **Visual Consistency**: Reuse components across web/mobile\n5. **Performance**: LCP <2s, FID <100ms\n6. **Accessibility**: WCAG 2.1 AA compliant\n\n---\n\n## 🚫 Anti-Patterns to Avoid\n\n### ❌ Overloading the Chat\n**Bad**: Showing full video player + summary + script in chat messages  \n**Good**: Show compact card → Expand in panel\n\n### ❌ Modal Overuse\n**Bad**: Opening modals for every action  \n**Good**: Use inline expansion or side panels\n\n### ❌ Unclear State\n**Bad**: \"Processing...\" with no indication of progress  \n**Good**: \"Transcribing (Step 2/4, ~45s remaining)\"\n\n### ❌ Desktop-Only Features\n**Bad**: Drag-to-resize only works on desktop  \n**Good**: Alternative tap gestures on mobile\n\n---\n\n## 📏 Design Constraints\n\n### Technical Constraints\n- **Max Panel Width**: 50% of viewport (to keep chat readable)\n- **Min Chat Width**: 400px (below this, hide panel)\n- **Mobile Breakpoint**: 768px (standard MD breakpoint)\n\n### Content Constraints\n- **Max Message Length**: 4000 characters (OpenAI limit)\n- **Library List**: Show 20 items initially, lazy load more\n\n### Performance Constraints\n- **Video Panel**: Should open in <200ms\n- **Library Search**: Debounce 300ms, results <500ms\n\n---\n\n## 🎨 Visual Style Guide\n\n### Color Palette\n```\nPrimary (Chat):    #3ECF8E (Emerald Green)\nBackground:        #0A0A0A (Deep Black)\nSurface:           #1A1A1A (Dark Gray)\nBorder:            rgba(255,255,255,0.1)\nText Primary:      #FFFFFF\nText Secondary:    rgba(255,255,255,0.7)\n```\n\n### Typography\n```\nFont Family:  \"Inter\", \"Manrope\", sans-serif\nHeadings:     600 weight\nBody:         400 weight\nCode:         \"JetBrains Mono\"\n```\n\n### Spacing System\n```\nxs:  4px\nsm:  8px\nmd:  16px\nlg:  24px\nxl:  32px\n2xl: 48px\n```\n\n---\n\n## ✅ Design Validation Checklist\n\nBefore shipping any new feature, verify:\n\n- [ ] Works on mobile (test on real device, not just DevTools)\n- [ ] Keyboard navigable (tab through all interactive elements)\n- [ ] High contrast mode compatible\n- [ ] Animations are smooth (60fps)\n- [ ] Loading states are clear\n- [ ] Error messages are actionable\n\n---\n\n## 📚 Reference Examples\n\n**Inspiration Sources**:\n- [Perplexity](https://perplexity.ai) - Split-screen chat + sources\n- [ChatGPT](https://chat.openai.com) - Conversational UX\n- [Linear](https://linear.app) - Keyboard shortcuts\n- [Notion AI](https://notion.so) - Inline AI integration\n\n**Next Steps**: See `design/01_layout_specifications.md` for specific layout rules.\n",
              "after": "# Design Principles\n\n> **Purpose**: Define the core design philosophy for v2.0  \n> **Audience**: Designers, Frontend Developers, Coding Agents  \n> **Last Updated**: 2025-01-18\n\n---\n\n## 🎨 Core Principles\n\n### 1. **Conversation-First**\n\n**Principle**: All interactions should feel like a natural conversation, not a form submission.\n\n**Implementation**:\n- ✅ DO: Natural language input (\"Summarize https://youtu.be/...\")\n- ❌ DON'T: Multi-step forms with dropdowns\n\n**Example**:\n```\nBAD (Form-based):\n┌─────────────────────┐\n│ Video URL: [_____] │\n│ Language:  [v]     │\n│ Output:    [v]     │\n│ [Submit]           │\n└─────────────────────┘\n\nGOOD (Conversational):\n┌─────────────────────┐\n│ User: Summarize     │\n│ https://youtu.be/...│\n│                     │\n│ AI: Processing...   │\n└─────────────────────┘\n```\n\n---\n\n### 2. **Progressive Disclosure**\n\n**Principle**: Show simple views first, reveal complexity only when needed.\n\n**Implementation**:\n- Start with minimal chat interface\n- Expand to video panel when relevant\n- Hide advanced features until requested\n\n**Hierarchy**:\n```\nLevel 1: Chat input (always visible)\n  ↓\nLevel 2: Video card in messages (when URL processed)\n  ↓\nLevel 3: Detail panel (when user clicks \"View\")\n  ↓\nLevel 4: Advanced features (MindMap, exports)\n```\n\n---\n\n### 3. **Context-Aware**\n\n**Principle**: UI adapts to what the user is currently doing.\n\n**States**:\n- **Empty State**: Guidance + demo cards\n- **Processing State**: Progress indicators + estimated time\n- **Completed State**: Interactive results + Q&A prompts\n- **Error State**: Clear error messages + recovery actions\n\n---\n\n### 4. **Keyboard-First (for Power Users)** — *Deferred to Post-MVP*\n\n> ⚠️ **NOTE**: Keyboard shortcuts are **NOT** part of the initial release (MVP). This section is for future reference only. Focus on mouse/touch interactions first.\n\n**Principle**: Every action should have a keyboard shortcut.\n\n**Core Shortcuts** (Post-MVP):\n```\nCmd/Ctrl + K     → Open Library\nCmd/Ctrl + /     → Focus chat input\nCmd/Ctrl + \\     → Toggle video panel\nEsc              → Close panels/modals\nCmd/Ctrl + Enter → Send message\n```\n\n**Implementation Priority**: Low (Post-launch enhancement)\n\n---\n\n### 5. **Mobile-Optimized**\n\n**Principle**: Mobile is not an afterthought; design for thumb-reach zones.\n\n**Thumb Zones**:\n```\n┌──────────────┐\n│ Hard to reach│ (Avoid primary actions here)\n│              │\n│   Easy       │ (Place input, send button)\n│   Zone       │\n│              │\n│ Easy (Bottom)│ (Place tab bar, close buttons)\n└──────────────┘\n```\n\n---\n\n## 🎯 Design Goals\n\n### Primary Goals\n1. **Reduce Time-to-Insight**: From URL paste to first Q&A in <30 seconds\n2. **Increase Engagement**: Encourage follow-up questions (3+ messages per session)\n3. **Lower Learning Curve**: New users productive in <2 minutes\n\n### Secondary Goals\n4. **Visual Consistency**: Reuse components across web/mobile\n5. **Performance**: LCP <2s, FID <100ms\n6. **Accessibility**: WCAG 2.1 AA compliant\n\n---\n\n## 🚫 Anti-Patterns to Avoid\n\n### ❌ Overloading the Chat\n**Bad**: Showing full video player + summary + script in chat messages  \n**Good**: Show compact card → Expand in panel\n\n### ❌ Modal Overuse\n**Bad**: Opening modals for every action  \n**Good**: Use inline expansion or side panels\n\n### ❌ Unclear State\n**Bad**: \"Processing...\" with no indication of progress  \n**Good**: \"Transcribing (Step 2/4, ~45s remaining)\"\n\n### ❌ Desktop-Only Features\n**Bad**: Drag-to-resize only works on desktop  \n**Good**: Alternative tap gestures on mobile\n\n---\n\n## 📏 Design Constraints\n\n### Technical Constraints\n- **Max Panel Width**: 50% of viewport (to keep chat readable)\n- **Min Chat Width**: 400px (below this, hide panel)\n- **Mobile Breakpoint**: 768px (standard MD breakpoint)\n\n### Content Constraints\n- **Max Message Length**: 4000 characters (OpenAI limit)\n- **Library List**: Show 20 items initially, lazy load more\n\n### Performance Constraints\n- **Video Panel**: Should open in <200ms\n- **Library Search**: Debounce 300ms, results <500ms\n\n---\n\n## 🎨 Visual Style Guide\n\n### Color Palette\n```\nPrimary (Chat):    #3ECF8E (Emerald Green)\nBackground:        #0A0A0A (Deep Black)\nSurface:           #1A1A1A (Dark Gray)\nBorder:            rgba(255,255,255,0.1)\nText Primary:      #FFFFFF\nText Secondary:    rgba(255,255,255,0.7)\n```\n\n### Typography\n```\nFont Family:  \"Inter\", \"Manrope\", sans-serif\nHeadings:     600               "before": "# Component Specifications\n\n> **Purpose**: Technical specs for all new/refactored components  \n> **Audience**: Coding Agents, Frontend Developers  \n> **Format**: TypeScript interfaces + Implementation examples  \n> **Last Updated**: 2025-01-18\n\n---\n\n## 📦 Component Hierarchy\n\n```\nChatWorkspace (New - Root Container)\n├── ChatContainer (New)\n│   ├── ChatMessages (Refactor AssistantChat)\n│   ├── MessageItem (New)\n│   │   ├── VideoCardMessage (New)\n│   │   ├── TextMessage (Exists)\n│   │   └── ProcessingMessage (New)\n│   └── ChatInput (New)\n│\n├── VideoDetailPanel (New)\n│   ├── VideoPlayer (Extract from TaskDetailClient)\n│   ├── SummarySection (Extract from TaskDetailClient)\n│   ├── ScriptTimeline (Reuse existing)\n│   └── MindMapView (Extract from TaskDetailClient)\n│\n└── LibrarySidebar (New)\n    ├── LibrarySearch (New)\n    └── TaskListItem (New)\n```\n\n---\n\n## 1. ChatWorkspace\n\n**File Path**: `frontend/src/components/chat/ChatWorkspace.tsx`\n\n### Purpose\nRoot container for the split-screen chat interface. Manages layout and state coordination between chat and video panel.\n\n### Props Interface\n```typescript\ninterface ChatWorkspaceProps {\n  // No props - uses URL params and context\n}\n```\n\n### Local State\n```typescript\nconst [isPanelOpen, setIsPanelOpen] = useState(false)\nconst [currentTaskId, setCurrentTaskId] = useState<string | null>(null)\nconst [isLibraryOpen, setIsLibraryOpen] = useState(false)\nconst [isMobile, setIsMobile] = useState(false)\n```\n\n### Implementation Template\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { useState, useEffect } from 'react'\nimport { useSearchParams } from 'next/navigation'\nimport { cn } from '@/lib/utils'\nimport { ChatContainer } from './ChatContainer'\nimport { VideoDetailPanel } from './VideoDetailPanel'\nimport { LibrarySidebar } from './LibrarySidebar'\n\nexport function ChatWorkspace() {\n  const searchParams = useSearchParams()\n  const taskId = searchParams.get('task')\n  \n  const [isPanelOpen, setIsPanelOpen] = useState(!!taskId)\n  const [currentTaskId, setCurrentTaskId] = useState<string | null>(taskId)\n  const [isLibraryOpen, setIsLibraryOpen] = useState(false)\n  const [isMobile, setIsMobile] = useState(false)\n\n  // Detect mobile\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const checkMobile = () => setIsMobile(window.innerWidth < 768)\n    checkMobile()\n    window.addEventListener('resize', checkMobile)\n    return () => window.removeEventListener('resize', checkMobile)\n  }, [])\n\n  // Open panel when task ID changes\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (taskId) {\n      setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n      setIsPanelOpen(true)\n    }\n  }, [taskId])\n\n  const handleTaskCreated = (newTaskId: string) => {\n    setCurrentTaskId(newTaskId)\n    setIsPanelOpen(true)\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"h-screen flex flex-col\">\n      {/* Top Bar */}\n      <header className=\"h-16 border-b border-white/10 flex items-center px-4 shrink-0\">\n        <button \n          onClick={() => setIsLibraryOpen(true)}\n          className=\"flex items-center gap-2\"\n        >\n          ☰ Library\n        </button>\n        <div className=\"flex-1\" />\n        {/* User menu */}\n      </header>\n\n      {/* Main Content */}\n      <div className=\"flex-1 flex overflow-hidden\">\n        <ChatContainer \n          className=\"flex-1 min-w-[400px]\"\n          onTaskCreated={handleTaskCreated}\n          onOpenPanel={(taskId) => {\n            setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n            setIsPanelOpen(true)\n          }}\n        />\n\n        {/* Desktop Panel */}\n        {!isMobile && (\n          <div \n            className={cn(\n              \"transition-all duration-300 border-l border-white/10 bg-background\",\n              isPanelOpen ? \"w-[40%]\" : \"w-0 opacity-0 overflow-hidden\"\n            )}\n          >\n            {currentTaskId && (\n              <VideoDetailPanel \n                taskId={currentTaskId}\n                onClose={() => setIsPanelOpen(false)}\n              />\n            )}\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Library Sidebar */}\n      <LibrarySidebar \n        isOpen={isLibraryOpen}\n        onClose={() => setIsLibraryOpen(false)}\n        onSelectTask={(taskId) => {\n          setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n          setIsPanelOpen(true)\n          setIsLibraryOpen(false)\n        }}\n      />\n    </div>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n### Validation\n- [ ] Renders split-screen on desktop (≥1024px)\n- [ ] Panel animates smoothly (300ms)\n- [ ] URL param `?task=xxx` auto-opens panel\n- [ ] Library sidebar opens with `Cmd+K`\n\n---\n\n## 2. ChatContainer\n\n**File Path**: `frontend/src/components/chat/ChatContainer.tsx`\n\n### Purpose\nContains chat messages and input. Integrates with AI SDK for message handling.\n\n### Props Interface\n```typescript\ninterface ChatContainerProps {\n  className?: string\n  onTaskCreated?: (taskId: string) => void\n  onOpenPanel?: (taskId: string) => void\n}\n```\n\n### Implementation Template\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { useChat } from '@ai-sdk/react'\nimport { useState } from 'react'\nimport { ChatMessages } from './ChatMessages'\nimport { ChatInput } from './ChatInput'\n\nexport function ChatContainer({ \n  className, \n  onTaskCreated,\n  onOpenPanel \n}: ChatContainerProps) {\n  const { messages, sendMessage, status } = useChat({\n    api: '/api/chat',\n    onFinish: (message) => {\n      // Check if message contains task ID\n      const taskId = extractTaskId(message)\n      if (taskId && onTaskCreated) {\n        onTaskCreated(taskId)\n      }\n    }\n  })\n\n  const handleSubmit = async (content: string) => {\n    await sendMessage({ text: content })\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className={cn(\"flex flex-col h-full\", className)}>\n      <ChatMessages \n        messages={messages}\n        onOpenPanel={onOpenPanel}\n      />\n      <ChatInput \n        onSubmit={handleSubmit}\n        disabled={status === 'streaming'}\n      />\n    </div>\n  )\n}\n\nfunction extractTaskId(message: any): string | null {\n  // Parse message for task_id in tool call result\n  // Implementation depends on AI SDK message format\n  return null\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 3. VideoCardMessage\n\n**File Path**: `frontend/src/components/chat/messages/VideoCardMessage.tsx`\n\n### Purpose\nDisplays video processing status as a card in chat messages.\n\n### Props Interface\n```typescript\ninterface VideoCardMessageProps {\n  taskId: string\n  videoUrl: string\n  title?: string\n  thumbnailUrl?: string\n  status: 'processing' | 'completed' | 'failed'\n  progress?: number\n  onViewClick?: (taskId: string) => void\n}\n```\n\n### Implementation Template\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { Card } from '@/components/ui/card'\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'\nimport { Progress } from '@/components/ui/progress'\nimport { Loader2, CheckCircle, XCircle } from 'lucide-react'\n\nexport function VideoCardMessage({\n  taskId,\n  videoUrl,\n  title,\n  thumbnailUrl,\n  status,\n  progress = 0,\n  onViewClick\n}: VideoCardMessageProps) {\n  const StatusIcon = {\n    processing: Loader2,\n    completed: CheckCircle,\n    failed: XCircle\n  }[status]\n\n  return (\n    <Card className=\"p-4 max-w-sm\">\n      {/* Thumbnail */}\n      {thumbnailUrl && (\n        <img \n          src={thumbnailUrl} \n          alt={title}\n          className=\"w-full aspect-video object-cover rounded-lg mb-3\"\n        />\n      )}\n\n      {/* Title */}\n      <h3 className=\"font-semibold mb-2 line-clamp-2\">\n        {title || 'Processing video...'}\n      </h3>\n\n      {/* Status */}\n      <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-muted-foreground mb-3\">\n        <StatusIcon className={cn(\n          \"w-4 h-4\",\n          status === 'processing' && \"animate-spin\",\n          status === 'completed' && \"text-green-500\",\n          status === 'failed' && \"text-red-500\"\n        )} />\n        <span>\n          {status === 'processing' && `Processing (${progress}%)`}\n          {status === 'completed' && 'Ready'}\n          {status === 'failed' && 'Failed'}\n        </span>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Progress Bar */}\n      {status === 'processing' && (\n        <Progress value={progress} className=\"mb-3\" />\n      )}\n\n      {/* Action Button */}\n      {status === 'completed' && onViewClick && (\n        <Button \n          onClick={() => onViewClick(taskId)}\n          className=\"w-full\"\n        >\n          View Summary\n        </Button>\n      )}\n    </Card>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 4. VideoDetailPanel\n\n**File Path**: `frontend/src/components/chat/VideoDetailPanel.tsx`\n\n### Purpose\nRight-side panel displaying video player and analysis results. Reuses extracted components from TaskDetailClient.\n\n### Props Interface\n```typescript\ninterface VideoDetailPanelProps {\n  taskId: string\n  onClose?: () => void\n  className?: string\n}\n```\n\n### Implementation Template\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { useEffect, useState } from 'react'\nimport { createClient } from '@/lib/supabase'\nimport { VideoPlayer } from '@/components/tasks/VideoPlayer'\nimport { SummarySection } from '@/components/tasks/SummarySection'\nimport { ScriptTimeline } from '@/components/tasks/ScriptTimeline'\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'\nimport { X } from 'lucide-react'\nimport { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs'\n\nexport function VideoDetailPanel({ \n  taskId, \n  onClose, \n  className \n}: VideoDetailPanelProps) {\n  const [task, setTask] = useState(null)\n  const [outputs, setOutputs] = useState([])\n  const supabase = createClient()\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    // Fetch task and outputs\n    const fetchData = async () => {\n      const { data: taskData } = await supabase\n        .from('tasks')\n        .select('*')\n        .eq('id', taskId)\n        .single()\n      \n      const { data: outputsData } = await supabase\n        .from('task_outputs')\n        .select('*')\n        .eq('task_id', taskId)\n\n      setTask(taskData)\n      setOutputs(outputsData || [])\n    }\n\n    fetchData()\n\n    // Realtime subscription\n    const channel = supabase.channel(`task_${taskId}`)\n      .on('postgres_changes', {\n        event: '*',\n        schema: 'public',\n        table: 'tasks',\n        filter: `id=eq.${taskId}`\n      }, (payload) => {\n        setTask(payload.new)\n      })\n      .subscribe()\n\n    return () => {\n      supabase.removeChannel(channel)\n    }\n  }, [taskId])\n\n  if (!task) return <div className=\"p-4\">Loading...</div>\n\n  return (\n    <div className={cn(\"h-full flex flex-col\", className)}>\n      {/* Header */}\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-white/10\">\n        <h2 className=\"font-semibold truncate\">{task.video_title}</h2>\n        {onClose && (\n          <Button variant=\"ghost\" size=\"icon\" onClick={onClose}>\n            <X className=\"w-4 h-4\" />\n          </Button>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Content */}\n      <div className=\"flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 space-y-4\">\n        <VideoPlayer \n          videoUrl={task.video_url}\n          title={task.video_title}\n          coverUrl={task.thumbnail_url}\n        />\n\n        <Tabs defaultValue=\"summary\">\n          <TabsList>\n            <TabsTrigger value=\"summary\">Summary</TabsTrigger>\n            <TabsTrigger value=\"script\">Script</TabsTrigger>\n          </TabsList>\n\n          <TabsContent value=\"summary\">\n            <SummarySection \n              outputs={outputs}\n              taskTitle={task.video_title}\n            />\n          </TabsContent>\n\n          <TabsContent value=\"script\">\n            <ScriptTimeline \n              scriptRawContent={outputs.find(o => o.kind === 'script_raw')?.content}\n            />\n          </TabsContent>\n        </Tabs>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 5. LibrarySidebar\n\n**File Path**: `frontend/src/components/chat/LibrarySidebar.tsx`\n\n### Purpose\nSlide-out sidebar showing user's task history.\n\n### Props Interface\n```typescript\ninterface LibrarySidebarProps {\n  isOpen: boolean\n  onClose: () => void\n  onSelectTask: (taskId: string) => void\n}\n```\n\n### Implementation Template\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { useEffect, useState } from 'react'\nimport { createClient } from '@/lib/supabase'\nimport { Sheet, SheetContent, SheetHeader, SheetTitle } from '@/components/ui/sheet'\nimport { Input } from '@/components/ui/input'\nimport { Search } from 'lucide-react'\n\nexport function LibrarySidebar({ \n  isOpen, \n  onClose, \n  onSelectTask \n}: LibrarySidebarProps) {\n  const [tasks, setTasks] = useState([])\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('')\n  const supabase = createClient()\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (isOpen) {\n      fetchTasks()\n    }\n  }, [isOpen])\n\n  const fetchTasks = async () => {\n    const { data } = await supabase\n      .from('tasks')\n      .select('*')\n      .eq('status', 'completed')\n      .order('created_at', { ascending: false })\n      .limit(20)\n\n    setTasks(data || [])\n  }\n\n  const filteredTasks = tasks.filter(task =>\n    task.video_title?.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())\n  )\n\n  return (\n    <Sheet open={isOpen} onOpenChange={onClose}>\n      <SheetContent side=\"left\" className=\"w-[320px] p-0\">\n        <SheetHeader className=\"p-4 border-b\">\n          <SheetTitle>Library</SheetTitle>\n        </SheetHeader>\n\n        {/* Search */}\n        <div className=\"p-4\">\n          <div className=\"relative\">\n            <Search className=\"absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground\" />\n            <Input\n              placeholder=\"Search videos...\"\n              value={searchQuery}\n              onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}\n              className=\"pl-9\"\n            />\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Task List */}\n        <div className=\"overflow-y-auto\">\n          {filteredTasks.map(task => (\n            <button\n              key={task.id}\n              onClick={() => {\n                onSelectTask(task.id)\n                onClose()\n              }}\n              className=\"w-full text-left p-4 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors border-b border-white/5\"\n            >\n              <div className=\"font-medium truncate\">{task.video_title}</div>\n              <div className=\"text-sm text-muted-foreground\">\n                {new Date(task.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}\n              </div>\n            </button>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      </SheetContent>\n    </Sheet>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## ✅ Component Checklist\n\n**Before marking any component as complete**:\n\n- [ ] TypeScript types defined and exported\n- [ ] Props documented with JSDoc comments\n-               "after": "# Component Specifications\n\n> **Purpose**: Technical specs for all new/refactored components  \n> **Audience**: Coding Agents, Frontend Developers  \n> **Format**: TypeScript interfaces + Implementation examples  \n> **Last Updated**: 2025-01-18\n\n---\n\n## ⚠️ Critical Dependency: AI SDK v6\n\n**IMPORTANT**: This project uses **AI SDK v6** (Vercel AI SDK). All implementations MUST use v6 APIs.\n\n```bash\n# Required packages (v6 ONLY)\nnpm install ai@^4.0.0 @ai-sdk/react@^1.0.0 @ai-sdk/openai@^1.0.0\n```\n\n**v6 Import Pattern**:\n```typescript\n// ✅ CORRECT - AI SDK v6\nimport { useChat } from '@ai-sdk/react'\n\n// ❌ WRONG - Old v3 pattern (DO NOT USE)\nimport { useChat } from 'ai/react'\n```\n\n**Key v6 Changes**:\n- `useChat` returns `{ messages, sendMessage, status }` (not `handleSubmit`)\n- Use `sendMessage({ content: string })` instead of form submission\n- `status` values: `'idle' | 'streaming' | 'error'`\n\n---\n\n## 📦 Component Hierarchy\n\n```\nChatWorkspace (New - Root Container)\n├── ChatContainer (New)\n│   ├── ChatMessages (Refactor AssistantChat)\n│   ├── MessageItem (New)\n│   │   ├── VideoCardMessage (New)\n│   │   ├── TextMessage (Exists)\n│   │   └── ProcessingMessage (New)\n│   └── ChatInput (New)\n│\n├── VideoDetailPanel (New)\n│   ├── VideoPlayer (Extract from TaskDetailClient)\n│   ├── SummarySection (Extract from TaskDetailClient)\n│   ├── ScriptTimeline (Reuse existing)\n│   └── MindMapView (Extract from TaskDetailClient)\n│\n└── LibrarySidebar (New)\n    ├── LibrarySearch (New)\n    └── TaskListItem (New)\n```\n\n---\n\n## 1. ChatWorkspace\n\n**File Path**: `frontend/src/components/chat/ChatWorkspace.tsx`\n\n### Purpose\nRoot container for the split-screen chat interface. Manages layout and state coordination between chat and video panel.\n\n### Props Interface\n```typescript\ninterface ChatWorkspaceProps {\n  // No props - uses URL params and context\n}\n```\n\n### Local State\n```typescript\nconst [isPanelOpen, setIsPanelOpen] = useState(false)\nconst [currentTaskId, setCurrentTaskId] = useState<string | null>(null)\nconst [isLibraryOpen, setIsLibraryOpen] = useState(false)\nconst [isMobile, setIsMobile] = useState(false)\n```\n\n### Implementation Template\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { useState, useEffect } from 'react'\nimport { useSearchParams } from 'next/navigation'\nimport { cn } from '@/lib/utils'\nimport { ChatContainer } from './ChatContainer'\nimport { VideoDetailPanel } from './VideoDetailPanel'\nimport { LibrarySidebar } from './LibrarySidebar'\n\nexport function ChatWorkspace() {\n  const searchParams = useSearchParams()\n  const taskId = searchParams.get('task')\n  \n  const [isPanelOpen, setIsPanelOpen] = useState(!!taskId)\n  const [currentTaskId, setCurrentTaskId] = useState<string | null>(taskId)\n  const [isLibraryOpen, setIsLibraryOpen] = useState(false)\n  const [isMobile, setIsMobile] = useState(false)\n\n  // Detect mobile\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const checkMobile = () => setIsMobile(window.innerWidth < 768)\n    checkMobile()\n    window.addEventListener('resize', checkMobile)\n    return () => window.removeEventListener('resize', checkMobile)\n  }, [])\n\n  // Open panel when task ID changes\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (taskId) {\n      setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n      setIsPanelOpen(true)\n    }\n  }, [taskId])\n\n  const handleTaskCreated = (newTaskId: string) => {\n    setCurrentTaskId(newTaskId)\n    setIsPanelOpen(true)\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"h-screen flex flex-col\">\n      {/* Top Bar */}\n      <header className=\"h-16 border-b border-white/10 flex items-center px-4 shrink-0\">\n        <button \n          onClick={() => setIsLibraryOpen(true)}\n          className=\"flex items-center gap-2\"\n        >\n          ☰ Library\n        </button>\n        <div className=\"flex-1\" />\n        {/* User menu */}\n      </header>\n\n      {/* Main Content */}\n      <div className=\"flex-1 flex overflow-hidden\">\n        <ChatContainer \n          className=\"flex-1 min-w-[400px]\"\n          onTaskCreated={handleTaskCreated}\n          onOpenPanel={(taskId) => {\n            setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n            setIsPanelOpen(true)\n          }}\n        />\n\n        {/* Desktop Panel */}\n        {!isMobile && (\n          <div \n            className={cn(\n              \"transition-all duration-300 border-l border-white/10 bg-background\",\n              isPanelOpen ? \"w-[40%]\" : \"w-0 opacity-0 overflow-hidden\"\n            )}\n          >\n            {currentTaskId && (\n              <VideoDetailPanel \n                taskId={currentTaskId}\n                onClose={() => setIsPanelOpen(false)}\n              />\n            )}\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Library Sidebar */}\n      <LibrarySidebar \n        isOpen={isLibraryOpen}\n        onClose={() => setIsLibraryOpen(false)}\n        onSelectTask={(taskId) => {\n          setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n          setIsPanelOpen(true)\n          setIsLibraryOpen(false)\n        }}\n      />\n    </div>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n### Validation\n- [ ] Renders split-screen on desktop (≥1024px)\n- [ ] Panel animates smoothly (300ms)\n- [ ] URL param `?task=xxx` auto-opens panel\n\n---\n\n## 2. ChatContainer\n\n**File Path**: `frontend/src/components/chat/ChatContainer.tsx`\n\n### Purpose\nContains chat messages and input. Integrates with AI SDK **v6** for message handling.\n\n### Props Interface\n```typescript\ninterface ChatContainerProps {\n  className?: string\n  onTaskCreated?: (taskId: string) => void\n  onOpenPanel?: (taskId: string) => void\n}\n```\n\n### Implementation Template (AI SDK v6)\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { useChat } from '@ai-sdk/react'  // ⚠️ MUST use @ai-sdk/react (v6)\nimport { useState } from 'react'\nimport { ChatMessages } from './ChatMessages'\nimport { ChatInput } from './ChatInput'\nimport { cn } from '@/lib/utils'\n\nexport function ChatContainer({ \n  className, \n  onTaskCreated,\n  onOpenPanel \n}: ChatContainerProps) {\n  // AI SDK v6 useChat hook\n  const { messages, append, isLoading, error } = useChat({\n    api: '/api/chat',\n    onFinish: (message) => {\n      // Check if message contains task ID\n      const taskId = extractTaskId(message)\n      if (taskId && onTaskCreated) {\n        onTaskCreated(taskId)\n      }\n    }\n  })\n\n  const handleSubmit = async (content: string) => {\n    // v6 API: use append() to add user message\n    await append({ role: 'user', content })\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className={cn(\"flex flex-col h-full\", className)}>\n      <ChatMessages \n        messages={messages}\n        onOpenPanel={onOpenPanel}\n      />\n      <ChatInput \n        onSubmit={handleSubmit}\n        disabled={isLoading}\n        error={error?.message}\n      />\n    </div>\n  )\n}\n\nfunction extractTaskId(message: any): string | null {\n  // Parse message for task_id in tool call result\n  // Implementation depends on AI SDK message format\n  return null\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 3. VideoCardMessage\n\n**File Path**: `frontend/src/components/chat/messages/VideoCardMessage.tsx`\n\n### Purpose\nDisplays video processing status as a card in chat messages.\n\n### Props Interface\n```typescript\ninterface VideoCardMessageProps {\n  taskId: string\n  videoUrl: string\n  title?: string\n  thumbnailUrl?: string\n  status: 'processing' | 'completed' | 'failed'\n  progress?: number\n  onViewClick?: (taskId: string) => void\n}\n```\n\n### Implementation Template\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { Card } from '@/components/ui/card'\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'\nimport { Progress } from '@/components/ui/progress'\nimport { Loader2, CheckCircle, XCircle } from 'lucide-react'\n\nexport function VideoCardMessage({\n  taskId,\n  videoUrl,\n  title,\n  thumbnailUrl,\n  status,\n  progress = 0,\n  onViewClick\n}: VideoCardMessageProps) {\n  const StatusIcon = {\n    processing: Loader2,\n    completed: CheckCircle,\n    failed: XCircle\n  }[status]\n\n  return (\n    <Card className=\"p-4 max-w-sm\">\n      {/* Thumbnail */}\n      {thumbnailUrl && (\n        <img \n          src={thumbnailUrl} \n          alt={title}\n          className=\"w-full aspect-video object-cover rounded-lg mb-3\"\n        />\n      )}\n\n      {/* Title */}\n      <h3 className=\"font-semibold mb-2 line-clamp-2\">\n        {title || 'Processing video...'}\n      </h3>\n\n      {/* Status */}\n      <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-muted-foreground mb-3\">\n        <StatusIcon className={cn(\n          \"w-4 h-4\",\n          status === 'processing' && \"animate-spin\",\n          status === 'completed' && \"text-green-500\",\n          status === 'failed' && \"text-red-500\"\n        )} />\n        <span>\n          {status === 'processing' && `Processing (${progress}%)`}\n          {status === 'completed' && 'Ready'}\n          {status === 'failed' && 'Failed'}\n        </span>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Progress Bar */}\n      {status === 'processing' && (\n        <Progress value={progress} className=\"mb-3\" />\n      )}\n\n      {/* Action Button */}\n      {status === 'completed' && onViewClick && (\n        <Button \n          onClick={() => onViewClick(taskId)}\n          className=\"w-full\"\n        >\n          View Summary\n        </Button>\n      )}\n    </Card>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 4. VideoDetailPanel\n\n**File Path**: `frontend/src/components/chat/VideoDetailPanel.tsx`\n\n### Purpose\nRight-side panel displaying video player and analysis results. Reuses extracted components from TaskDetailClient.\n\n### Props Interface\n```typescript\ninterface VideoDetailPanelProps {\n  taskId: string\n  onClose?: () => void\n  className?: string\n}\n```\n\n### Implementation Template\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { useEffect, useState } from 'react'\nimport { createClient } from '@/lib/supabase'\nimport { VideoPlayer } from '@/components/tasks/VideoPlayer'\nimport { SummarySection } from '@/components/tasks/SummarySection'\nimport { ScriptTimeline } from '@/components/tasks/ScriptTimeline'\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'\nimport { X } from 'lucide-react'\nimport { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs'\n\nexport function VideoDetailPanel({ \n  taskId, \n  onClose, \n  className \n}: VideoDetailPanelProps) {\n  const [task, setTask] = useState(null)\n  const [outputs, setOutputs] = useState([])\n  const supabase = createClient()\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    // Fetch task and outputs\n    const fetchData = async () => {\n      const { data: taskData } = await supabase\n        .from('tasks')\n        .select('*')\n        .eq('id', taskId)\n        .single()\n      \n      const { data: outputsData } = await supabase\n        .from('task_outputs')\n        .select('*')\n        .eq('task_id', taskId)\n\n      setTask(taskData)\n      setOutputs(outputsData || [])\n    }\n\n    fetchData()\n\n    // Realtime subscription\n    const channel = supabase.channel(`task_${taskId}`)\n      .on('postgres_changes', {\n        event: '*',\n        schema: 'public',\n        table: 'tasks',\n        filter: `id=eq.${taskId}`\n      }, (payload) => {\n        setTask(payload.new)\n      })\n      .subscribe()\n\n    return () => {\n      supabase.removeChannel(channel)\n    }\n  }, [taskId])\n\n  if (!task) return <div className=\"p-4\">Loading...</div>\n\n  return (\n    <div className={cn(\"h-full flex flex-col\", className)}>\n      {/* Header */}\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-white/10\">\n        <h2 className=\"font-semibold truncate\">{task.video_title}</h2>\n        {onClose && (\n          <Button variant=\"ghost\" size=\"icon\" onClick={onClose}>\n            <X className=\"w-4 h-4\" />\n          </Button>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Content */}\n      <div className=\"flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 space-y-4\">\n        <VideoPlayer \n          videoUrl={task.video_url}\n          title={task.video_title}\n          coverUrl={task.thumbnail_url}\n        />\n\n        <Tabs defaultValue=\"summary\">\n          <TabsList>\n            <TabsTrigger value=\"summary\">Summary</TabsTrigger>\n            <TabsTrigger value=\"script\">Script</TabsTrigger>\n          </TabsList>\n\n          <TabsContent value=\"summary\">\n            <SummarySection \n              outputs={outputs}\n              taskTitle={task.video_title}\n            />\n          </TabsContent>\n\n          <TabsContent value=\"script\">\n            <ScriptTimeline \n              scriptRawContent={outputs.find(o => o.kind === 'script_raw')?.content}\n            />\n          </TabsContent>\n        </Tabs>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 5. LibrarySidebar\n\n**File Path**: `frontend/src/components/chat/LibrarySidebar.tsx`\n\n### Purpose\nSlide-out sidebar showing user's task history.\n\n### Props Interface\n```typescript\ninterface open={isOpen} onOpenChange={onClose}>\n      <SheetContent side=\"left\" className=\"w-[320px] p-0\">\n        <SheetHeader className=\"p-4 border-b\">\n          <SheetTitle>Library</SheetTitle>\n        </SheetHeader>\n\n        {/* Search */}\n        <div className=\"p-4\">\n          <div className=\"relative\">\n            <Search className=\"absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground\">\n                {new Date(task.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}\n              </div>\n            </button>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      </SheetContent>\n    </Sheet>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## ✅ Component Checklist\n\n**Before marking any component as complete**:\n\n- [ ] TypeScript types defined and exported\n- [ ] Props documented with JSDoc comments\n- `frontend/src/types/chat.ts`\n\n```typescript\n// Chat-related type definitions\nexport interface ChatThread {\n  id: string\n  user_id: string\n  task_id: string | null\n  title: string\n  created_at: string\n  updated_at: string\n}\n\nexport interface ChatMessage {\n  id: string\n  thread_id: string\n  role: 'user' | 'assistant'\n  content: string\n  created_at: string\n}\n\nexport interface Task {\n  id: string\n  user_id: string\n  video_url: string\n  video_title: string\n  thumbnail_url?: string\n  status: 'pending' | 'processing' | 'completed' | 'failed'\n  progress: number\n  created_at: string\n}\n\nexport interface TaskOutput {\n  id: string\n  task_id: string\n  kind: string\n  locale?: string\n  status: string\n  progress: number\n  content: string\n  error_message?: string\n}\n\nexport interface MediaController {\n  seek: (seconds: number) => void\n}\n```\n\n**Verification**:\n```bash\n# Check TypeScript compilation\nnpm run build\n# Should complete without errors\n```\n\n---\n\n### Step 4: Create Utility Functions\n\n**File**: `frontend/src/lib/url-utils.ts`\n\n```typescript\n/**\n * Utility functions for URL detection and validation\n */\n\nconst YOUTUBE_REGEX = /(?:https?:\\/\\/)?(?:www\\.)?(?:youtube\\.com\\/watch\\?v=|youtu\\.be\\/)([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})/g\nconst BILIBILI_REGEX = /(?:https?:\\/\\/)?(?:www\\.)?bilibili\\.com\\/video\\/(BV[a-zA-Z0-9]+)/g\n\n/**\n * Detect all YouTube URLs in a string\n */\nexport function detectYouTubeURLs(text: string): string[] {\n  const matches = text.matchAll(YOUTUBE_REGEX)\n  return Array.from(matches, m => m[0])\n}\n\n/**\n * Detect all Bilibili URLs in a string\n */\nexport function detectBilibiliURLs(text: string): string[] {\n  const matches = text.matchAll(BILIBILI_REGEX)\n  return Array.from(matches, m => m[0])\n}\n\n/**\n * Detect all video URLs (YouTube + Bilibili)\n */\nexport function detectVideoURLs(text: string): string[] {\n  return [\n    ...detectYouTubeURLs(text),\n    ...detectBilibiliURLs(text)\n  ]\n}\n\n/**\n * Check if text contains multiple video URLs\n */\nexport function hasMultipleURLs(text: string): boolean {\n  return detectVideoURLs(text).length > 1\n}\n\n/**\n * Extract video ID from YouTube URL\n */\nexport function extractYouTubeID(url: string): string | null {\n  const match = url.match(YOUTUBE_REGEX)\n  return match ? match[1] : null\n}\n```\n\n**Verification**:\n```bash\n# Create test file\ncat > frontend/src/lib/__tests__/url-utils.test.ts << 'EOF'\nimport { detectVideoURLs, hasMultipleURLs } from '../url-utils'\n\ntest('detects single YouTube URL', () => {\n  const text = \"Check this out: https://youtube.com/watch?v=abc123\"\n  expect(detectVideoURLs(text)).toHaveLength(1)\n  expect(hasMultipleURLs(text)).toBe(false)\n})\n\ntest('detects multiple URLs', () => {\n  const text = \"https://youtube.com/watch?v=abc123 and https://youtube.com/watch?v=def456\"\n  expect(detectVideoURLs(text)).toHaveLength(2)\n  expect(hasMultipleURLs(text)).toBe(true)\n})\nEOF\n\n# Run tests\nnpm test -- url-utils.test.ts\n```\n\n---\n\n### Step 5: Update Supabase Types (if needed)\n\n**File**: `frontend/src/types/database.ts`\n\nAdd or verify chat-related tables:\n\n```typescript\nexport interface // NEW: Link to tasks\n          title: string\n          created_at: string\n          updated_at: string\n        }\n        Insert: {\n          id?: string\n          user_id: string\n /(?:https?:\\/\\/)?(?:www\\.)?(?:youtube\\.com\\/watch\\?v=|youtu\\.be\\/)([a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11})/g\nconst BILIBILI_REGEX = /(?:https?:\\/\\/)?(?:www\\.)?bilibili\\.com\\/video\\/(BV[a-zA-Z0-9]+)/g\n\n/**\n * Detect all YouTube URLs in a string\n */\nexport function detectYouTubeURLs(text: string): string[] {\n  const matches = text.matchAll(YOUTUBE_REGEX)\n  return Array.from(matches, m => m[0])\n}\n\n/**\n * Detect all Bilibili URLs in a string\n */\nexport function detectBilibiliURLs(text: string): string[] {\n  const matches = text.matchAll(BILIBILI_REGEX)\n  return Array.from(matches, m => m[0])\n}\n\n/**\n * Detect all video URLs (YouTube + Bilibili)\n */\nexport function detectVideoURLs(text: string): string[] {\n  return [\n    ...detectYouTubeURLs(text),\n    ...detectBilibiliURLs(text)\n  ]\n}\n\n/**\n * Check if text contains multiple video URLs\n */\nexport function hasMultipleURLs(text: string): boolean {\n  return detectVideoURLs(text).length > 1\n}\n\n/**\n * Extract video ID from YouTube URL\n */\nexport function extractYouTubeID(url: string): string | null {\n  const match = url.match(YOUTUBE_REGEX)\n  return match ? match[1] : null\n}\n```\n\n**Verification**:\n```bash\n# Create test file\ncat > frontend/src/lib/__tests__/url-utils.test.ts << 'EOF'\nimport { expect(detectVideoURLs(text)).toHaveLength(1)\n  expect(hasMultipleURLs(text)).toBe(false)\n})\n\ntest('detects multiple URLs', () => {\n  const text = \"https://youtube.com/watch?v=abc123 and https://youtube.com/watch?v=def456\"\n  expect(detectVideoURLs(text)).toHaveLength(2)\n  expect(hasMultipleURLs(text)).toBe(true)\n})\nEOF\n\n# Run tests\nnpm test --               "before": "# Task 2.1: Create ChatWorkspace Container\n\n> **Phase**: 2 - Frontend Implementation  \n> **Priority**: Critical  \n> **Estimated Time**: 1.5 hours  \n> **Dependencies**: Task 2.0 (Setup Workspace)\n\n---\n\n## 🎯 Objective\n\nCreate the root ChatWorkspace container that manages the split-screen layout, state coordination between chat and video panel, and responsive behavior.\n\n---\n\n## 📋 Prerequisites\n\n- [x] Task 2.0 completed\n- [x] Directory structure created (`components/chat/`)\n- [x] Type definitions exist (`types/chat.ts`)\n- [x] URL utilities created (`lib/url-utils.ts`)\n\n**Verification Command**:\n```bash\ncd frontend/src\nls components/chat/\nls types/chat.ts\nls lib/url-utils.ts\n```\n\n---\n\n## 🔨 Implementation Steps\n\n### Step 1: Create ChatWorkspace Component\n\n**File**: `frontend/src/components/chat/ChatWorkspace.tsx`\n\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { useState, useEffect } from 'react'\nimport { useSearchParams, useRouter } from 'next/navigation'\nimport { cn } from '@/lib/utils'\nimport { ChatContainer } from './ChatContainer'\nimport { VideoDetailPanel } from './VideoDetailPanel'\nimport { LibrarySidebar } from './LibrarySidebar'\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'\nimport { Menu, X } from 'lucide-react'\n\nexport function ChatWorkspace() {\n  const searchParams = useSearchParams()\n  const router = useRouter()\n  const taskId = searchParams.get('task')\n  \n  // State management\n  const [isPanelOpen, setIsPanelOpen] = useState(!!taskId)\n  const [currentTaskId, setCurrentTaskId] = useState<string | null>(taskId)\n  const [isLibraryOpen, setIsLibraryOpen] = useState(false)\n  const [isMobile, setIsMobile] = useState(false)\n\n  // Detect mobile viewport\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const checkMobile = () => setIsMobile(window.innerWidth < 1024)\n    checkMobile()\n    window.addEventListener('resize', checkMobile)\n    return () => window.removeEventListener('resize', checkMobile)\n  }, [])\n\n  // Sync with URL params\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (taskId && taskId !== currentTaskId) {\n      setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n      setIsPanelOpen(true)\n    }\n  }, [taskId])\n\n  // Handle task creation from chat\n  const handleTaskCreated = (newTaskId: string) => {\n    setCurrentTaskId(newTaskId)\n    setIsPanelOpen(true)\n    \n    // Update URL without navigation\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(searchParams.toString())\n    params.set('task', newTaskId)\n    router.push(`?${params.toString()}`, { scroll: false })\n  }\n\n  // Handle panel close\n  const handleClosePanel = () => {\n    setIsPanelOpen(false)\n    \n    // Remove task param from URL\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(searchParams.toString())\n    params.delete('task')\n    const newUrl = params.toString() ? `?${params.toString()}` : ''\n    router.push(newUrl, { scroll: false })\n  }\n\n  // Handle task selection from library\n  const handleSelectTask = (taskId: string) => {\n    setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n    setIsPanelOpen(true)\n    setIsLibraryOpen(false)\n    \n    // Update URL\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(searchParams.toString())\n    params.set('task', taskId)\n    router.push(`?${params.toString()}`, { scroll: false })\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"h-screen flex flex-col bg-background\">\n      {/* Top Bar */}\n      <header className=\"h-16 border-b border-white/10 flex items-center px-4 shrink-0\">\n        <Button\n          variant=\"ghost\"\n          size=\"sm\"\n          onClick={() => setIsLibraryOpen(true)}\n          className=\"gap-2\"\n        >\n          <Menu className=\"w-4 h-4\" />\n          <span className=\"hidden md:inline\">Library</span>\n        </Button>\n\n        <div className=\"flex-1\" />\n\n        {/* Close panel button (desktop only, when panel is open) */}\n        {!isMobile && isPanelOpen && (\n          <Button\n            variant=\"ghost\"\n            size=\"sm\"\n            onClick={handleClosePanel}\n            className=\"gap-2\"\n          >\n            <X className=\"w-4 h-4\" />\n            Close Panel\n          </Button>\n        )}\n      </header>\n\n      {/* Main Content Area */}\n      <div className=\"flex-1 flex overflow-hidden\">\n        {/* Chat Container (Left Side) */}\n        <ChatContainer\n          className={cn(\n            \"flex-1 min-w-[320px]\",\n            // On desktop, limit width when panel is open\n            !isMobile && isPanelOpen && \"max-w-[60%]\"\n          )}\n          onTaskCreated={handleTaskCreated}\n          onOpenPanel={(taskId) => {\n            setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n            setIsPanelOpen(true)\n          }}\n        />\n\n        {/* Video Detail Panel (Right Side - Desktop Only) */}\n        {!isMobile && (\n          <div\n            className={cn(\n              \"transition-all duration-300 ease-out border-l border-white/10 bg-background\",\n              isPanelOpen ? \"w-[40%] opacity-100\" : \"w-0 opacity-0 overflow-hidden\"\n            )}\n          >\n            {currentTaskId && isPanelOpen && (\n              <VideoDetailPanel\n                taskId={currentTaskId}\n                onClose={handleClosePanel}\n              />\n            )}\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Library Sidebar (Slide-out from left) */}\n      <LibrarySidebar\n        isOpen={isLibraryOpen}\n        onClose={() => setIsLibraryOpen(false)}\n        onSelectTask={handleSelectTask}\n      />\n\n      {/* Mobile Video Modal */}\n      {isMobile && currentTaskId && isPanelOpen && (\n        <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-background\">\n          <VideoDetailPanel\n            taskId={currentTaskId}\n            onClose={() => setIsPanelOpen(false)}\n          />\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </div>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n**Verification**:\n```bash\n# Check TypeScript compilation\ncd frontend\nnpx tsc --noEmit\n```\n\n---\n\n### Step 2: Create ChatContainer Component (Stub)\n\n**File**: `frontend/src/components/chat/ChatContainer.tsx`\n\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { cn } from '@/lib/utils'\n\ninterface ChatContainerProps {\n  className?: string\n  onTaskCreated?: (taskId: string) => void\n  onOpenPanel?: (taskId: string) => void\n}\n\nexport function ChatContainer({\n  className,\n  onTaskCreated,\n  onOpenPanel\n}: ChatContainerProps) {\n  return (\n    <div          ChatContainer placeholder\n          <br />\n          <small>Will be implemented in Task 2.4</small>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Input Area */}\n      <div className=\"p-4 border-t border-white/10\">\n        <input\n          type=\"text\"\n          placeholder=\"Paste a YouTube URL to start...\"\n          className=\"w-full px-4 py-2 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-lg\"\n          disabled\n        />\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n**Verification**:\n```bash\nnpx tsc --noEmit\n```\n\n---\n\n### Step 3: Create VideoDetailPanel better UX:\n\n```typescript\n// Add inside ChatWorkspace component\nuseEffect(() => {\n  const handleKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {\n    // Cmd/Ctrl + K to open library\n    if ((e.metaKey || e.ctrlKey) && e.key === 'k') {\n      e.preventDefault()\n      setIsLibraryOpen(true)\n    }\n\n    // Escape to close panel (desktop only)\n    if (e.key === 'Escape' && !isMobile && isPanelOpen) {\n      handleClosePanel()\n    }\n  }\n\n  window.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown)\n  return () => window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown)\n}, [isMobile, isPanelOpen])\n```\n\n**Verification**:\n```bash\n# Test in browser\n# Press Cmd+K → Library should open\n# Press Escape (with panel open) → Panel should close\n```\n\n---\n\n## ✅ Validation Ensure no circular state updates.\n\n**Issue**: Panel animation is janky  \n**Solution**: Check that parent container has `overflow-hidden` class. Ensure no heavy computations during animation.\n\n**Issue**: Mobile modal doesn't show  \n**Solution**: Verify z-index is set correctly. Check that `isMobile` detection works.\n\n---\n\n## 📝 Next Steps\n\nOnce all validation checks pass:\n\n**Proceed to**: `task-2.2-video-detail-panel.md`\n\nThis task will implement the full VideoDetailPanel with video player and tabs.\n\n---\n\n## 📚 Reference\n\n- **Design Spec**: `design/01_layout_specifications.md` (Lines 9-60)\n- **Component Spec**: `specifications/20_component_specs.md` (Lines 35-155)\n- **User Flows**: `ux/10_user_flows.md`\n\n---\n\n## 🎯 Success Criteria\n\n**Definition of Done**:\n- ChatWorkspace component renders correctly\n- Split-screen layout works on desktop (1024px+)\n- Panel animation is smooth (300ms ease-out)\n- Mobile view uses full-screen (no split)\n- URL params sync with panel state\n- All stubs are in place for next tasks\n- Zero TypeScript errors\n- Zero console errors in browser\n",
              "after": "# Task 2.1: Create ChatWorkspace Container\n\n> **Phase**: 2 - Frontend Implementation  \n> **Priority**: Critical  \n> **Estimated Time**: 1.5 hours  \n> **Dependencies**: Task 2.0 (Setup Workspace)\n\n---\n\n## 🎯 Objective\n\nCreate the root ChatWorkspace container that manages the split-screen layout, state coordination between chat and video panel, and responsive behavior.\n\n---\n\n## 📋 Prerequisites\n\n- [x] Task 2.0 completed\n- [x] Directory structure created (`components/chat/`)\n- [x] Type definitions exist (`types/chat.ts`)\n- [x] URL utilities created (`lib/url-utils.ts`)\n\n**Verification Command**:\n```bash\ncd frontend/src\nls components/chat/\nls types/chat.ts\nls lib/url-utils.ts\n```\n\n---\n\n## 🔨 Implementation Steps\n\n### Step 1: Create ChatWorkspace Component\n\n**File**: `frontend/src/components/chat/ChatWorkspace.tsx`\n\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { useState, useEffect } from 'react'\nimport { useSearchParams, useRouter } from 'next/navigation'\nimport { cn } from '@/lib/utils'\nimport { ChatContainer } from './ChatContainer'\nimport { VideoDetailPanel } from './VideoDetailPanel'\nimport { LibrarySidebar } from './LibrarySidebar'\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'\nimport { Menu, X } from 'lucide-react'\n\nexport function ChatWorkspace() {\n  const searchParams = useSearchParams()\n  const router = useRouter()\n  const taskId = searchParams.get('task')\n  \n  // State management\n  const [isPanelOpen, setIsPanelOpen] = useState(!!taskId)\n  const [currentTaskId, setCurrentTaskId] = useState<string | null>(taskId)\n  const [isLibraryOpen, setIsLibraryOpen] = useState(false)\n  const [isMobile, setIsMobile] = useState(false)\n\n  // Detect mobile viewport\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const checkMobile = () => setIsMobile(window.innerWidth < 1024)\n    checkMobile()\n    window.addEventListener('resize', checkMobile)\n    return () => window.removeEventListener('resize', checkMobile)\n  }, [])\n\n  // Sync with URL params\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (taskId && taskId !== currentTaskId) {\n      setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n      setIsPanelOpen(true)\n    }\n  }, [taskId])\n\n  // Handle task creation from chat\n  const handleTaskCreated = (newTaskId: string) => {\n    setCurrentTaskId(newTaskId)\n    setIsPanelOpen(true)\n    \n    // Update URL without navigation\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(searchParams.toString())\n    params.set('task', newTaskId)\n    router.push(`?${params.toString()}`, { scroll: false })\n  }\n\n  // Handle panel close\n  const handleClosePanel = () => {\n    setIsPanelOpen(false)\n    \n    // Remove task param from URL\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(searchParams.toString())\n    params.delete('task')\n    const newUrl = params.toString() ? `?${params.toString()}` : ''\n    router.push(newUrl, { scroll: false })\n  }\n\n  // Handle task selection from library\n  const handleSelectTask = (taskId: string) => {\n    setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n    setIsPanelOpen(true)\n    setIsLibraryOpen(false)\n    \n    // Update URL\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(searchParams.toString())\n    params.set('task', taskId)\n    router.push(`?${params.toString()}`, { scroll: false })\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"h-screen flex flex-col bg-background\">\n      {/* Top Bar */}\n      <header className=\"h-16 border-b border-white/10 flex items-center px-4 shrink-0\">\n        <Button\n          variant=\"ghost\"\n          size=\"sm\"\n          onClick={() => setIsLibraryOpen(true)}\n          className=\"gap-2\"\n        >\n          <Menu className=\"w-4 h-4\" />\n          <span className=\"hidden md:inline\">Library</span>\n        </Button>\n\n        <div className=\"flex-1\" />\n\n        {/* Close panel button (desktop only, when panel is open) */}\n        {!isMobile && isPanelOpen && (\n          <Button\n            variant=\"ghost\"\n            size=\"sm\"\n            onClick={handleClosePanel}\n            className=\"gap-2\"\n          >\n            <X className=\"w-4 h-4\" />\n            Close Panel\n          </Button>\n        )}\n      </header>\n\n      {/* Main Content Area */}\n      <div className=\"flex-1 flex overflow-hidden\">\n        {/* Chat Container (Left Side) */}\n        <ChatContainer\n          className={cn(\n            \"flex-1 min-w-[320px]\",\n            // On desktop, limit width when panel is open\n            !isMobile && isPanelOpen && \"max-w-[60%]\"\n          )}\n          onTaskCreated={handleTaskCreated}\n          onOpenPanel={(taskId) => {\n            setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n            setIsPanelOpen(true)\n          }}\n        />\n\n        {/* Video Detail Panel (Right Side - Desktop Only) */}\n        {!isMobile && (\n          <div\n            className={cn(\n              \"transition-all duration-300 ease-out border-l border-white/10 bg-background\",\n              isPanelOpen ? \"w-[40%] opacity-100\" : \"w-0 opacity-0 overflow-hidden\"\n            )}\n          >\n            {currentTaskId && isPanelOpen && (\n              <VideoDetailPanel\n                taskId={currentTaskId}\n                onClose={handleClosePanel}\n              />\n            )}\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Library Sidebar (Slide-out from left) */}\n      <LibrarySidebar\n        isOpen={isLibraryOpen}\n        onClose={() => setIsLibraryOpen(false)}\n        onSelectTask={handleSelectTask}\n      />\n\n      {/* Mobile Video Modal */}\n      {isMobile && currentTaskId && isPanelOpen && (\n        <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-background\">\n          <VideoDetailPanel\n            taskId={currentTaskId}\n            onClose={() => setIsPanelOpen(false)}\n          />\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </div>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n**Verification**:\n```bash\n# Check TypeScript compilation\ncd frontend\nnpx tsc --noEmit\n```\n\n---\n\n### Step 2: Create ChatContainer Component (Stub)\n\n**File**: `frontend/src/components/chat/ChatContainer.tsx`\n\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { cn } from '@/lib/utils'\n\ninterface ChatContainerProps {\n  className?: string\n  onTaskCreated?: (taskId: string) => void\n  onOpenPanel?: (taskId: string) => void\n}\n\nexport function ChatContainer({\n  className,\n  onTaskCreated,\n  onOpenPanel\n}: ChatContainerProps) {\n  return (\n    <div className={cn(\"flex flex-col h-full\", className)}>\n      {/* Messages Area */}\n      <div className=\"flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4\">\n        <div className=\"text-center text-muted-foreground\">\n          ChatContainer placeholder\n          <br />\n          <small>Will be implemented in Task 2.4</small>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Input Area */}\n      <div className=\"p-4 border-t border-white/10\">\n        <input\n          type=\"text\"\n          placeholder=\"Paste a YouTube URL to start...\"\n          className=\"w-full px-4 py-2 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-lg\"\n          disabled\n        />\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n**Verification**:\n```bash\nnpx tsc --noEmit\n```\n\n---\n\n### Step 3: Create VideoDetailPanel      </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n**Verification**:\n```bash\nnpx tsc --noEmit\n```\n\n---\n\n### Step 4: Create LibrarySidebar Component (Stub)\n\n**File**: border-white/10\">\n          <SheetTitle>Library</SheetTitle>\n        </SheetHeader>\n\n        <div className=\"p-4 text-muted-foreground text-sm\">\n          LibrarySidebar placeholder\n          <br />\n          <small>Will be implemented in Task 2.3</small>\n        </div>\n      </SheetContent>\n    </Sheet>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n**Verification**:\n```bash\nnpx tsc --noEmit\n```\n\n---\n\n###
