            "output": "<file>\n00001| # Design Principles\n00002| \n00003| > **Purpose**: Define the core design philosophy for v2.0  \n00004| > **Audience**: Designers, Frontend Developers, Coding Agents  \n00005| > **Last Updated**: 2025-01-18\n00006| \n00007| ---\n00008| \n00009| ## 🎨 Core Principles\n00010| \n00011| ### 1. **Conversation-First**\n00012| \n00013| **Principle**: All interactions should feel like a natural conversation, not a form submission.\n00014| \n00015| **Implementation**:\n00016| - ✅ DO: Natural language input (\"Summarize https://youtu.be/...\")\n00017| - ❌ DON'T: Multi-step forms with dropdowns\n00018| \n00019| **Example**:\n00020| ```\n00021| BAD (Form-based):\n00022| ┌─────────────────────┐\n00023| │ Video URL: [_____] │\n00024| │ Language:  [v]     │\n00025| │ Output:    [v]     │\n00026| │ [Submit]           │\n00027| └─────────────────────┘\n00028| \n00029| GOOD (Conversational):\n00030| ┌─────────────────────┐\n00031| │ User: Summarize     │\n00032| │ https://youtu.be/...│\n00033| │                     │\n00034| │ AI: Processing...   │\n00035| └─────────────────────┘\n00036| ```\n00037| \n00038| ---\n00039| \n00040| ### 2. **Progressive Disclosure**\n00041| \n00042| **Principle**: Show simple views first, reveal complexity only when needed.\n00043| \n00044| **Implementation**:\n00045| - Start with minimal chat interface\n00046| - Expand to video panel when relevant\n00047| - Hide advanced features until requested\n00048| \n00049| **Hierarchy**:\n00050| ```\n00051| Level 1: Chat input (always visible)\n00052|   ↓\n00053| Level 2: Video card in messages (when URL processed)\n00054|   ↓\n00055| Level 3: Detail panel (when user clicks \"View\")\n00056|   ↓\n00057| Level 4: Advanced features (MindMap, exports)\n00058| ```\n00059| \n00060| ---\n00061| \n00062| ### 3. **Context-Aware**\n00063| \n00064| **Principle**: UI adapts to what the user is currently doing.\n00065| \n00066| **States**:\n00067| - **Empty State**: Guidance + demo cards\n00068| - **Processing State**: Progress indicators + estimated time\n00069| - **Completed State**: Interactive results + Q&A prompts\n00070| - **Error State**: Clear error messages + recovery actions\n00071| \n00072| ---\n00073| \n00074| ### 4. **Keyboard-First (for Power Users)**\n00075| \n00076| **Principle**: Every action should have a keyboard shortcut.\n00077| \n00078| **Core Shortcuts**:\n00079| ```\n00080| Cmd/Ctrl + K     → Open Library\n00081| Cmd/Ctrl + /     → Focus chat input\n00082| Cmd/Ctrl + \\     → Toggle video panel\n00083| Esc              → Close panels/modals\n00084| Cmd/Ctrl + Enter → Send message\n00085| ```\n00086| \n00087| ---\n00088| \n00089| ### 5. **Mobile-Optimized**\n00090| \n00091| **Principle**: Mobile is not an afterthought; design for thumb-reach zones.\n00092| \n00093| **Thumb Zones**:\n00094| ```\n00095| ┌──────────────┐\n00096| │ Hard to reach│ (Avoid primary actions here)\n00097| │              │\n00098| │   Easy       │ (Place input, send button)\n00099| │   Zone       │\n00100| │              │\n00101| │ Easy (Bottom)│ (Place tab bar, close buttons)\n00102| └──────────────┘\n00103| ```\n00104| \n00105| ---\n00106| \n00107| ## 🎯 Design Goals\n00108| \n00109| ### Primary Goals\n00110| 1. **Reduce Time-to-Insight**: From URL paste to first Q&A in <30 seconds\n00111| 2. **Increase Engagement**: Encourage follow-up questions (3+ messages per session)\n00112| 3. **Lower Learning Curve**: New users productive in <2 minutes\n00113| \n00114| ### Secondary Goals\n00115| 4. **Visual Consistency**: Reuse components across web/mobile\n00116| 5. **Performance**: LCP <2s, FID <100ms\n00117| 6. **Accessibility**: WCAG 2.1 AA compliant\n00118| \n00119| ---\n00120| \n00121| ## 🚫 Anti-Patterns to Avoid\n00122| \n00123| ### ❌ Overloading the Chat\n00124| **Bad**: Showing full video player + summary + script in chat messages  \n00125| **Good**: Show compact card → Expand in panel\n00126| \n00127| ### ❌ Modal Overuse\n00128| **Bad**: Opening modals for every action  \n00129| **Good**: Use inline expansion or side panels\n00130| \n00131| ### ❌ Unclear State\n00132| **Bad**: \"Processing...\" with no indication of progress  \n00133| **Good**: \"Transcribing (Step 2/4, ~45s remaining)\"\n00134| \n00135| ### ❌ Desktop-Only Features\n00136| **Bad**: Drag-to-resize only works on desktop  \n00137| **Good**: Alternative tap gestures on mobile\n00138| \n00139| ---\n00140| \n00141| ## 📏 Design Constraints\n00142| \n00143| ### Technical Constraints\n00144| - **Max Panel Width**: 50% of viewport (to keep chat readable)\n00145| - **Min Chat Width**: 400px (below this, hide panel)\n00146| - **Mobile Breakpoint**: 768px (standard MD breakpoint)\n00147| \n00148| ### Content Constraints\n00149| - **Max Message Length**: 4000 characters (OpenAI limit)\n00150| - **Library List**: Show 20 items initially, lazy load more\n00151| \n00152| ### Performance Constraints\n00153| - **Video Panel**: Should open in <200ms\n00154| - **Library Search**: Debounce 300ms, results <500ms\n00155| \n00156| ---\n00157| \n00158| ## 🎨 Visual Style Guide\n00159| \n00160| ### Color Palette\n00161| ```\n00162| Primary (Chat):    #3ECF8E (Emerald Green)\n00163| Background:        #0A0A0A (Deep Black)\n00164| Surface:           #1A1A1A (Dark Gray)\n00165| Border:            rgba(255,255,255,0.1)\n00166| Text Primary:      #FFFFFF\n00167| Text Secondary:    rgba(255,255,255,0.7)\n00168| ```\n00169| \n00170| ### Typography\n00171| ```\n00172| Font Family:  \"Inter\", \"Manrope\", sans-serif\n00173| Headings:     600 weight\n00174| Body:         400 weight\n00175| Code:         \"JetBrains Mono\"\n00176| ```\n00177| \n00178| ### Spacing System\n00179| ```\n00180| xs:  4px\n00181| sm:  8px\n00182| md:  16px\n00183| lg:  24px\n00184| xl:  32px\n00185| 2xl: 48px\n00186| ```\n00187| \n00188| ---\n00189| \n00190| ## ✅ Design Validation Checklist\n00191| \n00192| Before shipping any new feature, verify:\n00193| \n00194| - [ ] Works on mobile (test on real device, not just DevTools)\n00195| - [ ] Keyboard navigable (tab through all interactive elements)\n00196| - [ ] High contrast mode compatible\n00197| - [ ] Animations are smooth (60fps)\n00198| - [ ] Loading states are clear\n00199| - [ ] Error messages are actionable\n00200| \n00201| ---\n00202| \n00203| ## 📚 Reference Examples\n00204| \n00205| **Inspiration Sources**:\n00206| - [Perplexity](https://perplexity.ai) - Split-screen chat + sources\n00207| - [ChatGPT](https://chat.openai.com) - Conversational UX\n00208| - [Linear](https://linear.app) - Keyboard shortcuts\n00209| - [Notion AI](https://notion.so) - Inline AI integration\n00210| \n00211| **Next Steps**: See `design/01_layout_specifications.md` for specific layout rules.\n00212| \n\n(End of file - total 212 lines)\n</file>",

              "filediff": {
                "file": "/Volumes/ssd/AI-Video-Transcriber-Frontend-Opt/docs/redesign/design/00_design_principles.md",
                "before": "# Design Principles\n\n> **Purpose**: Define the core design philosophy for v2.0  \n> **Audience**: Designers, Frontend Developers, Coding Agents  \n> **Last Updated**: 2025-01-18\n\n---\n\n## 🎨 Core Principles\n\n### 1. **Conversation-First**\n\n**Principle**: All interactions should feel like a natural conversation, not a form submission.\n\n**Implementation**:\n- ✅ DO: Natural language input (\"Summarize https://youtu.be/...\")\n- ❌ DON'T: Multi-step forms with dropdowns\n\n**Example**:\n```\nBAD (Form-based):\n┌─────────────────────┐\n│ Video URL: [_____] │\n│ Language:  [v]     │\n│ Output:    [v]     │\n│ [Submit]           │\n└─────────────────────┘\n\nGOOD (Conversational):\n┌─────────────────────┐\n│ User: Summarize     │\n│ https://youtu.be/...│\n│                     │\n│ AI: Processing...   │\n└─────────────────────┘\n```\n\n---\n\n### 2. **Progressive Disclosure**\n\n**Principle**: Show simple views first, reveal complexity only when needed.\n\n**Implementation**:\n- Start with minimal chat interface\n- Expand to video panel when relevant\n- Hide advanced features until requested\n\n**Hierarchy**:\n```\nLevel 1: Chat input (always visible)\n  ↓\nLevel 2: Video card in messages (when URL processed)\n  ↓\nLevel 3: Detail panel (when user clicks \"View\")\n  ↓\nLevel 4: Advanced features (MindMap, exports)\n```\n\n---\n\n### 3. **Context-Aware**\n\n**Principle**: UI adapts to what the user is currently doing.\n\n**States**:\n- **Empty State**: Guidance + demo cards\n- **Processing State**: Progress indicators + estimated time\n- **Completed State**: Interactive results + Q&A prompts\n- **Error State**: Clear error messages + recovery actions\n\n---\n\n### 4. **Keyboard-First (for Power Users)**\n\n**Principle**: Every action should have a keyboard shortcut.\n\n**Core Shortcuts**:\n```\nCmd/Ctrl + K     → Open Library\nCmd/Ctrl + /     → Focus chat input\nCmd/Ctrl + \\     → Toggle video panel\nEsc              → Close panels/modals\nCmd/Ctrl + Enter → Send message\n```\n\n---\n\n### 5. **Mobile-Optimized**\n\n**Principle**: Mobile is not an afterthought; design for thumb-reach zones.\n\n**Thumb Zones**:\n```\n┌──────────────┐\n│ Hard to reach│ (Avoid primary actions here)\n│              │\n│   Easy       │ (Place input, send button)\n│   Zone       │\n│              │\n│ Easy (Bottom)│ (Place tab bar, close buttons)\n└──────────────┘\n```\n\n---\n\n## 🎯 Design Goals\n\n### Primary Goals\n1. **Reduce Time-to-Insight**: From URL paste to first Q&A in <30 seconds\n2. **Increase Engagement**: Encourage follow-up questions (3+ messages per session)\n3. **Lower Learning Curve**: New users productive in <2 minutes\n\n### Secondary Goals\n4. **Visual Consistency**: Reuse components across web/mobile\n5. **Performance**: LCP <2s, FID <100ms\n6. **Accessibility**: WCAG 2.1 AA compliant\n\n---\n\n## 🚫 Anti-Patterns to Avoid\n\n### ❌ Overloading the Chat\n**Bad**: Showing full video player + summary + script in chat messages  \n**Good**: Show compact card → Expand in panel\n\n### ❌ Modal Overuse\n**Bad**: Opening modals for every action  \n**Good**: Use inline expansion or side panels\n\n### ❌ Unclear State\n**Bad**: \"Processing...\" with no indication of progress  \n**Good**: \"Transcribing (Step 2/4, ~45s remaining)\"\n\n### ❌ Desktop-Only Features\n**Bad**: Drag-to-resize only works on desktop  \n**Good**: Alternative tap gestures on mobile\n\n---\n\n## 📏 Design Constraints\n\n### Technical Constraints\n- **Max Panel Width**: 50% of viewport (to keep chat readable)\n- **Min Chat Width**: 400px (below this, hide panel)\n- **Mobile Breakpoint**: 768px (standard MD breakpoint)\n\n### Content Constraints\n- **Max Message Length**: 4000 characters (OpenAI limit)\n- **Library List**: Show 20 items initially, lazy load more\n\n### Performance Constraints\n- **Video Panel**: Should open in <200ms\n- **Library Search**: Debounce 300ms, results <500ms\n\n---\n\n## 🎨 Visual Style Guide\n\n### Color Palette\n```\nPrimary (Chat):    #3ECF8E (Emerald Green)\nBackground:        #0A0A0A (Deep Black)\nSurface:           #1A1A1A (Dark Gray)\nBorder:            rgba(255,255,255,0.1)\nText Primary:      #FFFFFF\nText Secondary:    rgba(255,255,255,0.7)\n```\n\n### Typography\n```\nFont Family:  \"Inter\", \"Manrope\", sans-serif\nHeadings:     600 weight\nBody:         400 weight\nCode:         \"JetBrains Mono\"\n```\n\n### Spacing System\n```\nxs:  4px\nsm:  8px\nmd:  16px\nlg:  24px\nxl:  32px\n2xl: 48px\n```\n\n---\n\n## ✅ Design Validation Checklist\n\nBefore shipping any new feature, verify:\n\n- [ ] Works on mobile (test on real device, not just DevTools)\n- [ ] Keyboard navigable (tab through all interactive elements)\n- [ ] High contrast mode compatible\n- [ ] Animations are smooth (60fps)\n- [ ] Loading states are clear\n- [ ] Error messages are actionable\n\n---\n\n## 📚 Reference Examples\n\n**Inspiration Sources**:\n- [Perplexity](https://perplexity.ai) - Split-screen chat + sources\n- [ChatGPT](https://chat.openai.com) - Conversational UX\n- [Linear](https://linear.app) - Keyboard shortcuts\n- [Notion AI](https://notion.so) - Inline AI integration\n\n**Next Steps**: See `design/01_layout_specifications.md` for specific layout rules.\n",
                "after": "# Design Principles\n\n> **Purpose**: Define the core design philosophy for v2.0  \n> **Audience**: Designers, Frontend Developers, Coding Agents  \n> **Last Updated**: 2025-01-18\n\n---\n\n## 🎨 Core Principles\n\n### 1. **Conversation-First**\n\n**Principle**: All interactions should feel like a natural conversation, not a form submission.\n\n**Implementation**:\n- ✅ DO: Natural language input (\"Summarize https://youtu.be/...\")\n- ❌ DON'T: Multi-step forms with dropdowns\n\n**Example**:\n```\nBAD (Form-based):\n┌─────────────────────┐\n│ Video URL: [_____] │\n│ Language:  [v]     │\n│ Output:    [v]     │\n│ [Submit]           │\n└─────────────────────┘\n\nGOOD (Conversational):\n┌─────────────────────┐\n│ User: Summarize     │\n│ https://youtu.be/...│\n│                     │\n│ AI: Processing...   │\n└─────────────────────┘\n```\n\n---\n\n### 2. **Progressive Disclosure**\n\n**Principle**: Show simple views first, reveal complexity only when needed.\n\n**Implementation**:\n- Start with minimal chat interface\n- Expand to video panel when relevant\n- Hide advanced features until requested\n\n**Hierarchy**:\n```\nLevel 1: Chat input (always visible)\n  ↓\nLevel 2: Video card in messages (when URL processed)\n  ↓\nLevel 3: Detail panel (when user clicks \"View\")\n  ↓\nLevel 4: Advanced features (MindMap, exports)\n```\n\n---\n\n### 3. **Context-Aware**\n\n**Principle**: UI adapts to what the user is currently doing.\n\n**States**:\n- **Empty State**: Guidance + demo cards\n- **Processing State**: Progress indicators + estimated time\n- **Completed State**: Interactive results + Q&A prompts\n- **Error State**: Clear error messages + recovery actions\n\n---\n\n### 4. **Keyboard-First (for Power Users)** — *Deferred to Post-MVP*\n\n> ⚠️ **NOTE**: Keyboard shortcuts are **NOT** part of the initial release (MVP). This section is for future reference only. Focus on mouse/touch interactions first.\n\n**Principle**: Every action should have a keyboard shortcut.\n\n**Core Shortcuts** (Post-MVP):\n```\nCmd/Ctrl + K     → Open Library\nCmd/Ctrl + /     → Focus chat input\nCmd/Ctrl + \\     → Toggle video panel\nEsc              → Close panels/modals\nCmd/Ctrl + Enter → Send message\n```\n\n**Implementation Priority**: Low (Post-launch enhancement)\n\n---\n\n### 5. **Mobile-Optimized**\n\n**Principle**: Mobile is not an afterthought; design for thumb-reach zones.\n\n**Thumb Zones**:\n```\n┌──────────────┐\n│ Hard to reach│ (Avoid primary actions here)\n│              │\n│   Easy       │ (Place input, send button)\n│   Zone       │\n│              │\n│ Easy (Bottom)│ (Place tab bar, close buttons)\n└──────────────┘\n```\n\n---\n\n## 🎯 Design Goals\n\n### Primary Goals\n1. **Reduce Time-to-Insight**: From URL paste to first Q&A in <30 seconds\n2. **Increase Engagement**: Encourage follow-up questions (3+ messages per session)\n3. **Lower Learning Curve**: New users productive in <2 minutes\n\n### Secondary Goals\n4. **Visual Consistency**: Reuse components across web/mobile\n5. **Performance**: LCP <2s, FID <100ms\n6. **Accessibility**: WCAG 2.1 AA compliant\n\n---\n\n## 🚫 Anti-Patterns to Avoid\n\n### ❌ Overloading the Chat\n**Bad**: Showing full video player + summary + script in chat messages  \n**Good**: Show compact card → Expand in panel\n\n### ❌ Modal Overuse\n**Bad**: Opening modals for every action  \n**Good**: Use inline expansion or side panels\n\n### ❌ Unclear State\n**Bad**: \"Processing...\" with no indication of progress  \n**Good**: \"Transcribing (Step 2/4, ~45s remaining)\"\n\n### ❌ Desktop-Only Features\n**Bad**: Drag-to-resize only works on desktop  \n**Good**: Alternative tap gestures on mobile\n\n---\n\n## 📏 Design Constraints\n\n### Technical Constraints\n- **Max Panel Width**: 50% of viewport (to keep chat readable)\n- **Min Chat Width**: 400px (below this, hide panel)\n- **Mobile Breakpoint**: 768px (standard MD breakpoint)\n\n### Content Constraints\n- **Max Message Length**: 4000 characters (OpenAI limit)\n- **Library List**: Show 20 items initially, lazy load more\n\n### Performance Constraints\n- **Video Panel**: Should open in <200ms\n- **Library Search**: Debounce 300ms, results <500ms\n\n---\n\n## 🎨 Visual Style Guide\n\n### Color Palette\n```\nPrimary (Chat):    #3ECF8E (Emerald Green)\nBackground:        #0A0A0A (Deep Black)\nSurface:           #1A1A1A (Dark Gray)\nBorder:            rgba(255,255,255,0.1)\nText Primary:      #FFFFFF\nText Secondary:    rgba(255,255,255,0.7)\n```\n\n### Typography\n```\nFont Family:  \"Inter\", \"Manrope\", sans-serif\nHeadings:     600 weight\nBody:         400 weight\nCode:         \"JetBrains Mono\"\n```\n\n### Spacing System\n```\nxs:  4px\nsm:  8px\nmd:  16px\nlg:  24px\nxl:  32px\n2xl: 48px\n```\n\n---\n\n## ✅ Design Validation Checklist\n\nBefore shipping any new feature, verify:\n\n- [ ] Works on mobile (test on real device, not just DevTools)\n- [ ] Keyboard navigable (tab through all interactive elements)\n- [ ] High contrast mode compatible\n- [ ] Animations are smooth (60fps)\n- [ ] Loading states are clear\n- [ ] Error messages are actionable\n\n---\n\n## 📚 Reference Examples\n\n**Inspiration Sources**:\n- [Perplexity](https://perplexity.ai) - Split-screen chat + sources\n- [ChatGPT](https://chat.openai.com) - Conversational UX\n- [Linear](https://linear.app) - Keyboard shortcuts\n- [Notion AI](https://notion.so) - Inline AI integration\n\n**Next Steps**: See `design/01_layout_specifications.md` for specific layout rules.\n",

Task 2.0 (Setup Workspace)\n\n---\n\n## 🎯 Objective\n\nCreate the root ChatWorkspace container that manages the split-screen layout, state coordination between chat and video panel, and responsive behavior.\n\n---\n\n## 📋 Prerequisites\n\n- [x] Task 2.0 completed\n- [x] Directory structure created (`components/chat/`)\n- [x] Type definitions exist (`types/chat.ts`)\n- [x] URL utilities created ChatWorkspace Component\n\n**File**: `frontend/src/components/chat/ChatWorkspace.tsx`\n\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { useState, useEffect } from 'react'\nimport { useSearchParams, useRouter } from 'next/navigation'\nimport { cn } from '@/lib/utils'\nimport { ChatContainer } from './ChatContainer'\nimport { VideoDetailPanel } from './VideoDetailPanel'\nimport { LibrarySidebar } from './LibrarySidebar'\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'\nimport { Menu, X } from 'lucide-react'\n\nexport function ChatWorkspace() {\n  const searchParams = useSearchParams()\n  const router = useRouter()\n  const taskId = searchParams.get('task')\n  \n  // State management\n  const [isPanelOpen, setIsPanelOpen] = useState(!!taskId)\n  const [currentTaskId, setCurrentTaskId] = useState<string | null>(taskId)\n  const [isLibraryOpen, setIsLibraryOpen] = useState(false)\n  const [isMobile, setIsMobile] = useState(false)\n\n  // Detect mobile viewport\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const checkMobile = () => setIsMobile(window.innerWidth < 1024)\n    checkMobile()\n    window.addEventListener('resize', checkMobile)\n    return () => window.removeEventListener('resize', checkMobile)\n  }, [])\n\n  // Sync with URL params\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (taskId && taskId !== currentTaskId) {\n      setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n      setIsPanelOpen(true)\n    }\n  }, [taskId])\n\n  // Handle task creation from chat\n  const handleTaskCreated = (newTaskId: string) => {\n    setCurrentTaskId(newTaskId)\n    setIsPanelOpen(true)\n    \n    // Update URL without navigation\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(searchParams.toString())\n    params.set('task', newTaskId)\n    router.push(`?${params.toString()}`, { scroll: false })\n  }\n\n  // Handle panel close\n  const handleClosePanel = () => {\n    setIsPanelOpen(false)\n    \n    // Remove task param from URL\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(searchParams.toString())\n    params.delete('task')\n    const newUrl = params.toString() ? `?${params.toString()}` : ''\n    router.push(newUrl, { scroll: false })\n  }\n\n  // Handle task selection from library\n  const handleSelectTask = (taskId: string) => {\n    setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n    setIsPanelOpen(true)\n    setIsLibraryOpen(false)\n    \n    // Update URL\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(searchParams.toString())\n    params.set('task', taskId)\n    router.push(`?${params.toString()}`, { scroll: false })\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"h-screen flex flex-col bg-background\">\n      {/* Top Bar */}\n      <header className=\"h-16 border-b border-white/10 flex items-center px-4 shrink-0\">\n        <Button\n          variant=\"ghost\"\n          size=\"sm\"\n          onClick={() => setIsLibraryOpen(true)}\n          className=\"gap-2\"\n        >\n          <Menu className=\"w-4 h-4\" />\n          <span className=\"hidden md:inline\">Library</span>\n        </Button>\n\n        <div className=\"flex-1\" />\n\n        {/* Close panel button (desktop only, when panel is open) */}\n        {!isMobile && isPanelOpen && (\n          <Button\n            variant=\"ghost\"\n            size=\"sm\"\n            onClick={handleClosePanel}\n            className=\"gap-2\"\n          >\n            <X className=\"w-4 h-4\" />\n            Close Panel\n          </Button>\n        )}\n      </header>\n\n      {/* Main Content Area */}\n      <div className=\"flex-1 flex overflow-hidden\">\n        {/* Chat Container (Left Side) */}\n        <ChatContainer\n          className={cn(\n            \"flex-1 min-w-[320px]\",\n            // On desktop, limit width when panel is open\n            !isMobile && isPanelOpen && \"max-w-[60%]\"\n          )}\n          onTaskCreated={handleTaskCreated}\n          onOpenPanel={(taskId) => {\n            setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n            setIsPanelOpen(true)\n          }}\n        />\n\n        {/* Video Detail Panel (Right Side - Desktop Only) */}\n        {!isMobile && (\n          <div\n            className={cn(\n              \"transition-all duration-300 ease-out border-l border-white/10 bg-background\",\n              isPanelOpen ? \"w-[40%] opacity-100\" : \"w-0 opacity-0 overflow-hidden\"\n            )}\n          >\n            {currentTaskId && isPanelOpen && (\n              <VideoDetailPanel\n                taskId={currentTaskId}\n                onClose={handleClosePanel}\n              />\n            )}\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Library Sidebar (Slide-out from left) */}\n      <LibrarySidebar\n        isOpen={isLibraryOpen}\n        onClose={() => setIsLibraryOpen(false)}\n        onSelectTask={handleSelectTask}\n      />\n\n      {/* Mobile Video Modal */}\n      {isMobile && currentTaskId && isPanelOpen && (\n        <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-background\">\n          <VideoDetailPanel\n            taskId={currentTaskId}\n            onClose={() => setIsPanelOpen(false)}\n          />\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </div>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n**Verification**:\n```bash\n# Check TypeScript compilation\ncd frontend\nnpx tsc --noEmit\n```\n\n---\n\n### Step 2: Create ChatContainer Component (Stub)\n\n**File**:                 "after": "# Task 2.1: Create ChatWorkspace Container\n\n> **Phase**: 2 - Frontend Implementation  \n> **Priority**: Critical  \n> **Estimated Time**: 1.5 hours  \n> **Dependencies**: Task 2.0 (Setup Workspace)\n\n---\n\n## 🎯 Objective\n\nCreate the root ChatWorkspace container that manages the split-screen layout, state coordination between chat and video panel, and responsive behavior.\n\n---\n\n## 📋 Prerequisites\n\n- [x] Task 2.0 completed\n- [x] Directory structure created (`components/chat/`)\n- [x] Type definitions exist (`types/chat.ts`)\n- [x] URL utilities created (`lib/url-utils.ts`)\n\n**Verification Command**:\n```bash\ncd frontend/src\nls components/chat/\nls types/chat.ts\nls lib/url-utils.ts\n```\n\n---\n\n## 🔨 Implementation Steps\n\n### Step 1: Create ChatWorkspace Component\n\n**File**: `frontend/src/components/chat/ChatWorkspace.tsx`\n\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { useState, useEffect } from 'react'\nimport { useSearchParams, useRouter } from 'next/navigation'\nimport { cn } from '@/lib/utils'\nimport { ChatContainer } from './ChatContainer'\nimport { VideoDetailPanel } from './VideoDetailPanel'\nimport { LibrarySidebar } from './LibrarySidebar'\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'\nimport { Menu, X } from 'lucide-react'\n\nexport function ChatWorkspace() {\n  const searchParams = useSearchParams()\n  const router = useRouter()\n  const taskId = searchParams.get('task')\n  \n  // State management\n  const [isPanelOpen, setIsPanelOpen] = useState(!!taskId)\n  const [currentTaskId, setCurrentTaskId] = useState<string | null>(taskId)\n  const [isLibraryOpen, setIsLibraryOpen] = useState(false)\n  const [isMobile, setIsMobile] = useState(false)\n\n  // Detect mobile viewport\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const checkMobile = () => setIsMobile(window.innerWidth < 1024)\n    checkMobile()\n    window.addEventListener('resize', checkMobile)\n    return () => window.removeEventListener('resize', checkMobile)\n  }, [])\n\n  // Sync with URL params\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (taskId && taskId !== currentTaskId) {\n      setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n      setIsPanelOpen(true)\n    }\n  }, [taskId])\n\n  // Handle task creation from chat\n  const handleTaskCreated = (newTaskId: string) => {\n    setCurrentTaskId(newTaskId)\n    setIsPanelOpen(true)\n    \n    // Update URL without navigation\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(searchParams.toString())\n    params.set('task', newTaskId)\n    router.push(`?${params.toString()}`, { scroll: false })\n  }\n\n  // Handle panel close\n  const handleClosePanel = () => {\n    setIsPanelOpen(false)\n    \n    // Remove task param from URL\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(searchParams.toString())\n    params.delete('task')\n    const newUrl = params.toString() ? `?${params.toString()}` : ''\n    router.push(newUrl, { scroll: false })\n  }\n\n  // Handle task selection from library\n  const handleSelectTask = (taskId: string) => {\n    setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n    setIsPanelOpen(true)\n    setIsLibraryOpen(false)\n    \n    // Update URL\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(searchParams.toString())\n    params.set('task', taskId)\n    router.push(`?${params.toString()}`, { scroll: false })\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"h-screen flex flex-col bg-background\">\n      {/* Top Bar */}\n      <header className=\"h-16 border-b border-white/10 flex items-center px-4 shrink-0\">\n        <Button\n          variant=\"ghost\"\n          size=\"sm\"\n          onClick={() => setIsLibraryOpen(true)}\n          className=\"gap-2\"\n        >\n          <Menu className=\"w-4 h-4\" />\n          <span className=\"hidden md:inline\">Library</span>\n        </Button>\n\n        <div className=\"flex-1\" />\n\n        {/* Close panel button (desktop only, when panel is open) */}\n        {!isMobile && isPanelOpen && (\n          <Button\n            variant=\"ghost\"\n            size=\"sm\"\n            onClick={handleClosePanel}\n            className=\"gap-2\"\n          >\n            <X className=\"w-4 h-4\" />\n            Close Panel\n          </Button>\n        )}\n      </header>\n\n      {/* Main Content Area */}\n      <div className=\"flex-1 flex overflow-hidden\">\n        {/* Chat Container (Left Side) */}\n        <ChatContainer\n          className={cn(\n            \"flex-1 min-w-[320px]\",\n            // On desktop, limit width when panel is open\n            !isMobile && isPanelOpen && \"max-w-[60%]\"\n          )}\n          onTaskCreated={handleTaskCreated}\n          onOpenPanel={(taskId) => {\n            setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n            setIsPanelOpen(true)\n          }}\n        />\n\n        {/* Video Detail Panel (Right Side - Desktop Only) */}\n        {!isMobile && (\n          <div\n            className={cn(\n              \"transition-all duration-300 ease-out border-l border-white/10 bg-background\",\n              isPanelOpen ? \"w-[40%] opacity-100\" : \"w-0 opacity-0 overflow-hidden\"\n            )}\n          >\n            {currentTaskId && isPanelOpen && (\n              <VideoDetailPanel\n                taskId={currentTaskId}\n                onClose={handleClosePanel}\n              />\n            )}\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Library Sidebar (Slide-out from left) */}\n      <LibrarySidebar\n        isOpen={isLibraryOpen}\n        onClose={() => setIsLibraryOpen(false)}\n        onSelectTask={handleSelectTask}\n      />\n\n      {/* Mobile Video Modal */}\n      {isMobile && currentTaskId && isPanelOpen && (\n        <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-background\">\n          <VideoDetailPanel\n            taskId={currentTaskId}\n            onClose={() => setIsPanelOpen(false)}\n          />\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </div>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n**Verification**:\n```bash\n# Check TypeScript compilation\ncd frontend\nnpx tsc --noEmit\n```\n\n---\n\n### Step 2: Create ChatContainer Component (Stub)\n\n**File**: `frontend/src/components/chat/ChatContainer.tsx`\n\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { cn } from '@/lib/utils'\n\ninterface ChatContainerProps {\n  className?: string\n  onTaskCreated?: (taskId: string) => void\n  onOpenPanel?: (taskId: string) => void\n}\n\nexport function ChatContainer({\n  className,\n  onTaskCreated,\n  onOpenPanel\n}: ChatContainerProps) {\n  return (\n    <div className={cn(\"flex flex-col h-full\", className)}>\n      {/* Messages Area */}\n      <div className=\"flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4\">\n        <div className=\"text-center text-muted-foreground\">\n          ChatContainer placeholder\n          <br />\n          <small>Will be implemented in Task 2.4</small>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Input Area */}\n      <div className=\"p-4 border-t border-white/10\">\n        <input\n          type=\"text\"\n          placeholder=\"Paste a YouTube URL to start...\"\n          className=\"w-full px-4 py-2 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-lg\"\n          disabled\n        />\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n**Verification**:\n```bash\nnpx tsc --noEmit\n```\n\n---\n\n### Step 3: Create VideoDetailPanel Component (Stub)\n\n**File**: `frontend/src/components/chat/VideoDetailPanel.tsx`\n\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { cn } from '@/lib/utils'\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'\nimport { X } from 'lucide-react'\n\ninterface VideoDetailPanelProps {\n  taskId: string\n  onClose?: () => void\n  className?: string\n}\n\nexport function VideoDetailPanel({\n  taskId,\n  onClose,\n  className\n}: VideoDetailPanelProps) {\n  return (\n    <div className={cn(\"h-full flex flex-col\", className)}>\n      {/* Header */}\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-white/10 shrink-0\">\n        <h2 className=\"font-semibold\">Video Detail</h2>\n        {onClose && (\n          <Button variant=\"ghost\" size=\"icon\" onClick={onClose}>\n            <X className=\"w-4 h-4\" />\n          </Button>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Content */}\n      <div className=\"flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4\">\n        <div className=\"text-muted-foreground\">\n          VideoDetailPanel for task: {taskId}\n          <br />\n          <small>Will be implemented in Task 2.2</small>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n**Verification**:\n```bash\nnpx tsc --noEmit\n```\n\n---\n\n### Step 4: Create LibrarySidebar Component (Stub)\n\n**File**: `frontend/src/components/chat/LibrarySidebar.tsx`\n\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { Sheet, SheetContent, SheetHeader, SheetTitle } from '@/components/ui/sheet'\n\ninterface LibrarySidebarProps {\n  isOpen: boolean\n  onClose: () => void\n  onSelectTask: (taskId: string) => void\n}\n\nexport function LibrarySidebar({\n  isOpen,\n  onClose,\n  onSelectTask\n}: LibrarySidebarProps) {\n  return (\n    <Sheet open={isOpen} onOpenChange={onClose}>\n      <SheetContent side=\"left\" className=\"w-[320px] p-0\">\n        <SheetHeader className=\"p-4 border-b border-white/10\">\n          <SheetTitle>Library</SheetTitle>\n        </SheetHeader>\n\n        <div className=\"p-4 text-muted-foreground text-sm\">\n          LibrarySidebar placeholder\n          <br />\n          <small>Will be implemented in Task 2.3</small>\n        </div>\n      </SheetContent>\n    </Sheet>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n**Verification**:\n```bash\nnpx tsc --noEmit\n```\n\n---\n\n###        </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Library Sidebar (Slide-out from left) */}\n      <LibrarySidebar\n        isOpen={isLibraryOpen}\n        onClose={() => setIsLibraryOpen(false)}\n        onSelectTask={handleSelectTask}\n      />\n\n      {/* Mobile Video Modal */}\n      {isMobile && currentTaskId && isPanelOpen && (\n        <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-background\">\n          <VideoDetailPanel\n            taskId={currentTaskId}\n            onClose={() => setIsPanelOpen(false)}\n          />\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </div>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n**Verification**:\n```bash\n# Check TypeScript compilation\ncd frontend\nnpx tsc --noEmit\n```\n\n---\n\n### Step 2: Create ChatContainer Component (Stub)\n\n**File**:                 "after": "# Task 2.1: Create ChatWorkspace Container\n\n> **Phase**: 2 - Frontend Implementation  \n> **Priority**: Critical  \n> **Estimated Time**: 1.5 hours  \n> **Dependencies**: Task 2.0 (Setup Workspace)\n\n---\n\n## 🎯 Objective\n\nCreate the root ChatWorkspace container that manages the split-screen layout, state coordination between chat and video panel, and responsive behavior.\n\n---\n\n## 📋 Prerequisites\n\n- [x] Task 2.0 completed\n- [x] Directory structure created (`components/chat/`)\n- [x] Type definitions exist (`types/chat.ts`)\n- [x] URL utilities created (`lib/url-utils.ts`)\n\n**Verification Command**:\n```bash\ncd frontend/src\nls components/chat/\nls types/chat.ts\nls lib/url-utils.ts\n```\n\n---\n\n## 🔨 Implementation Steps\n\n### Step 1: Create ChatWorkspace Component\n\n**File**: `frontend/src/components/chat/ChatWorkspace.tsx`\n\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { useState, useEffect } from 'react'\nimport { useSearchParams, useRouter } from 'next/navigation'\nimport { cn } from '@/lib/utils'\nimport { ChatContainer } from './ChatContainer'\nimport { VideoDetailPanel } from './VideoDetailPanel'\nimport { LibrarySidebar } from './LibrarySidebar'\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'\nimport { Menu, X } from 'lucide-react'\n\nexport function ChatWorkspace() {\n  const searchParams = useSearchParams()\n  const router = useRouter()\n  const taskId = searchParams.get('task')\n  \n  // State management\n  const [isPanelOpen, setIsPanelOpen] = useState(!!taskId)\n  const [currentTaskId, setCurrentTaskId] = useState<string | null>(taskId)\n  const [isLibraryOpen, setIsLibraryOpen] = useState(false)\n  const [isMobile, setIsMobile] = useState(false)\n\n  // Detect mobile viewport\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const checkMobile = () => setIsMobile(window.innerWidth < 1024)\n    checkMobile()\n    window.addEventListener('resize', checkMobile)\n    return () => window.removeEventListener('resize', checkMobile)\n  }, [])\n\n  // Sync with URL params\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (taskId && taskId !== currentTaskId) {\n      setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n      setIsPanelOpen(true)\n    }\n  }, [taskId])\n\n  // Handle task creation from chat\n  const handleTaskCreated = (newTaskId: string) => {\n    setCurrentTaskId(newTaskId)\n    setIsPanelOpen(true)\n    \n    // Update URL without navigation\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(searchParams.toString())\n    params.set('task', newTaskId)\n    router.push(`?${params.toString()}`, { scroll: false })\n  }\n\n  // Handle panel close\n  const handleClosePanel = () => {\n    setIsPanelOpen(false)\n    \n    // Remove task param from URL\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(searchParams.toString())\n    params.delete('task')\n    const newUrl = params.toString() ? `?${params.toString()}` : ''\n    router.push(newUrl, { scroll: false })\n  }\n\n  // Handle task selection from library\n  const handleSelectTask = (taskId: string) => {\n    setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n    setIsPanelOpen(true)\n    setIsLibraryOpen(false)\n    \n    // Update URL\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(searchParams.toString())\n    params.set('task', taskId)\n    router.push(`?${params.toString()}`, { scroll: false })\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"h-screen flex flex-col bg-background\">\n      {/* Top Bar */}\n      <header className=\"h-16 border-b border-white/10 flex items-center px-4 shrink-0\">\n        <Button\n          variant=\"ghost\"\n          size=\"sm\"\n          onClick={() => setIsLibraryOpen(true)}\n          className=\"gap-2\"\n        >\n          <Menu className=\"w-4 h-4\" />\n          <span className=\"hidden md:inline\">Library</span>\n        </Button>\n\n        <div className=\"flex-1\" />\n\n        {/* Close panel button (desktop only, when panel is open) */}\n        {!isMobile && isPanelOpen && (\n          <Button\n            variant=\"ghost\"\n            size=\"sm\"\n            onClick={handleClosePanel}\n            className=\"gap-2\"\n          >\n            <X className=\"w-4 h-4\" />\n            Close Panel\n          </Button>\n        )}\n      </header>\n\n      {/* Main Content Area */}\n      <div className=\"flex-1 flex overflow-hidden\">\n        {/* Chat Container (Left Side) */}\n        <ChatContainer\n          className={cn(\n            \"flex-1 min-w-[320px]\",\n            // On desktop, limit width when panel is open\n            !isMobile && isPanelOpen && \"max-w-[60%]\"\n          )}\n          onTaskCreated={handleTaskCreated}\n          onOpenPanel={(taskId) => {\n            setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n            setIsPanelOpen(true)\n          }}\n        />\n\n        {/* Video Detail Panel (Right Side - Desktop Only) */}\n        {!isMobile && (\n          <div\n            className={cn(\n              \"transition-all duration-300 ease-out border-l border-white/10 bg-background\",\n              isPanelOpen ? \"w-[40%] opacity-100\" : \"w-0 opacity-0 overflow-hidden\"\n            )}\n          >\n            {currentTaskId && isPanelOpen && (\n              <VideoDetailPanel\n                taskId={currentTaskId}\n                onClose={handleClosePanel}\n              />\n            )}\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Library Sidebar (Slide-out from left) */}\n      <LibrarySidebar\n        isOpen={isLibraryOpen}\n        onClose={() => setIsLibraryOpen(false)}\n        onSelectTask={handleSelectTask}\n      />\n\n      {/* Mobile Video Modal */}\n      {isMobile && currentTaskId && isPanelOpen && (\n        <div className=\"fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-background\">\n          <VideoDetailPanel\n            taskId={currentTaskId}\n            onClose={() => setIsPanelOpen(false)}\n          />\n        </div>\n      )}\n    </div>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n**Verification**:\n```bash\n# Check TypeScript compilation\ncd frontend\nnpx tsc --noEmit\n```\n\n---\n\n### Step 2: Create ChatContainer Component (Stub)\n\n**File**: ChatWorkspace\n\n**File Path**: `frontend/src/components/chat/ChatWorkspace.tsx`\n\n### Purpose\nRoot container for the split-screen chat interface. Manages layout and state coordination between chat and video panel.\n\n### Props Interface\n```typescript\ninterface ChatWorkspaceProps {\n  // No props - uses URL params and context\n}\n```\n\n### Local State\n```typescript\nconst [isPanelOpen, setIsPanelOpen] = useState(false)\nconst [currentTaskId, setCurrentTaskId] = useState<string | null>(null)\nconst [isLibraryOpen, setIsLibraryOpen] = useState(false)\nconst [isMobile, setIsMobile] = useState(false)\n```\n\n### Implementation Template\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { useState, useEffect } from 'react'\nimport { useSearchParams } from 'next/navigation'\nimport { cn } from '@/lib/utils'\nimport { ChatContainer } from './ChatContainer'\nimport { VideoDetailPanel } from './VideoDetailPanel'\nimport { LibrarySidebar } from './LibrarySidebar'\n\nexport function ChatWorkspace() {\n  const searchParams = useSearchParams()\n  const taskId = searchParams.get('task')\n  \n  const [isPanelOpen, setIsPanelOpen] = useState(!!taskId)\n  const [currentTaskId, setCurrentTaskId] = useState<string | null>(taskId)\n  const [isLibraryOpen, setIsLibraryOpen] = useState(false)\n  const [isMobile, setIsMobile] = useState(false)\n\n  // Detect mobile\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const checkMobile = () => setIsMobile(window.innerWidth < 768)\n    checkMobile()\n    window.addEventListener('resize', checkMobile)\n    return () => window.removeEventListener('resize', checkMobile)\n  }, [])\n\n  // Open panel when task ID changes\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (taskId) {\n      setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n      setIsPanelOpen(true)\n    }\n  }, [taskId])\n\n  const handleTaskCreated = (newTaskId: string) => {\n    setCurrentTaskId(newTaskId)\n    setIsPanelOpen(true)\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"h-screen flex flex-col\">\n      {/* Top Bar */}\n      <header className=\"h-16 border-b border-white/10 flex items-center px-4 shrink-0\">\n        <button \n          onClick={() => setIsLibraryOpen(true)}\n          className=\"flex items-center gap-2\"\n        >\n          ☰ Library\n        </button>\n        <div className=\"flex-1\" />\n        {/* User menu */}\n      </header>\n\n      {/* Main Content */}\n      <div className=\"flex-1 flex overflow-hidden\">\n        <ChatContainer \n          className=\"flex-1 min-w-[400px]\"\n          onTaskCreated={handleTaskCreated}\n          onOpenPanel={(taskId) => {\n            setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n            setIsPanelOpen(true)\n          }}\n        />\n\n        {/* Desktop Panel */}\n        {!isMobile && (\n          <div \n            className={cn(\n              \"transition-all duration-300 border-l border-white/10 bg-background\",\n              isPanelOpen ? \"w-[40%]\" : \"w-0 opacity-0 overflow-hidden\"\n            )}\n          >\n            {currentTaskId && (\n              <VideoDetailPanel \n                taskId={currentTaskId}\n                onClose={() => setIsPanelOpen(false)}\n              />\n            )}\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Library Sidebar */}\n      <LibrarySidebar \n        isOpen={isLibraryOpen}\n        onClose={() => setIsLibraryOpen(false)}\n        onSelectTask={(taskId) => {\n          setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n          setIsPanelOpen(true)\n          setIsLibraryOpen(false)\n        }}\n      />\n    </div>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n### Validation\n- [ ] Renders split-screen on desktop (≥1024px)\n- [ ] Panel animates smoothly (300ms)\n- [ ] URL param `?task=xxx` auto-opens panel\n- [ ] Library sidebar opens with `Cmd+K`\n\n---\n\n## 2. ChatContainer\n\n**File Path**: `frontend/src/components/chat/ChatContainer.tsx`\n\n### Purpose\nContains chat messages and input. Integrates with AI SDK for message handling.\n\n### Props Interface\n```typescript\ninterface ChatContainerProps {\n  className?: string\n  onTaskCreated?: (taskId: string) => void\n  onOpenPanel?: (taskId: string) => void\n}\n```\n\n### Implementation Template\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { useChat } from '@ai-sdk/react'\nimport { useState } from 'react'\nimport { ChatMessages } from './ChatMessages'\nimport { ChatInput } from './ChatInput'\n\nexport function ChatContainer({ \n  className, \n  onTaskCreated,\n  onOpenPanel \n}: ChatContainerProps) {\n  const { messages, sendMessage, status } = useChat({\n    api: '/api/chat',\n    onFinish: (message) => {\n      // Check if message contains task ID\n      const taskId = extractTaskId(message)\n      if (taskId && onTaskCreated) {\n        onTaskCreated(taskId)\n      }\n    }\n  })\n\n  const handleSubmit = async (content: string) => {\n    await sendMessage({ text: content })\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className={cn(\"flex flex-col h-full\", className)}>\n      <ChatMessages \n        messages={messages}\n        onOpenPanel={onOpenPanel}\n      />\n      <ChatInput \n        onSubmit={handleSubmit}\n        disabled={status === 'streaming'}\n      />\n    </div>\n  )\n}\n\nfunction extractTaskId(message: any): string | null {\n  // Parse message for task_id in tool call result\n  // Implementation depends on AI SDK message format\n  return null\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 3. VideoCardMessage\n\n**File Path**: `frontend/src/components/chat/messages/VideoCardMessage.tsx`\n\n### Purpose\nDisplays video processing status as a card in chat messages.\n\n### Props Interface\n```typescript\ninterface VideoCardMessageProps {\n  taskId: string\n  videoUrl: string\n  title?: string\n  thumbnailUrl?: string\n  status: 'processing' | 'completed' | 'failed'\n  progress?: number\n  onViewClick?: (taskId: string) => void\n}\n```\n\n### Implementation Template\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { Card } from '@/components/ui/card'\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'\nimport { Progress } from '@/components/ui/progress'\nimport { Loader2, CheckCircle, XCircle } from 'lucide-react'\n\nexport function VideoCardMessage({\n  taskId,\n  videoUrl,\n  title,\n  thumbnailUrl,\n  status,\n  progress = 0,\n  onViewClick\n}: VideoCardMessageProps) {\n  const StatusIcon = {\n    processing: Loader2,\n    completed: CheckCircle,\n    failed: XCircle\n  }[status]\n\n  return (\n    <Card className=\"p-4 max-w-sm\">\n      {/* Thumbnail */}\n      {thumbnailUrl && (\n        <img \n          src={thumbnailUrl} \n          alt={title}\n          className=\"w-full aspect-video object-cover rounded-lg mb-3\"\n        />\n      )}\n\n      {/* Title */}\n      <h3 className=\"font-semibold mb-2 line-clamp-2\">\n        {title || 'Processing video...'}\n      </h3>\n\n      {/* Status */}\n      <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-muted-foreground mb-3\">\n        <StatusIcon className={cn(\n          \"w-4 h-4\",\n          status === 'processing' && \"animate-spin\",\n          status === 'completed' && \"text-green-500\",\n          status === 'failed' && \"text-red-500\"\n        )} />\n        <span>\n          {status === 'processing' && `Processing (${progress}%)`}\n          {status === 'completed' && 'Ready'}\n          {status === 'failed' && 'Failed'}\n        </span>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Progress Bar */}\n      {status === 'processing' && (\n        <Progress value={progress} className=\"mb-3\" />\n      )}\n\n      {/* Action Button */}\n      {status === 'completed' && onViewClick && (\n        <Button \n          onClick={() => onViewClick(taskId)}\n          className=\"w-full\"\n        >\n          View Summary\n        </Button>\n      )}\n    </Card>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 4. VideoDetailPanel\n\n**File Path**: `frontend/src/components/chat/VideoDetailPanel.tsx`\n\n### Purpose\nRight-side panel displaying video player and analysis results. Reuses extracted components from TaskDetailClient.\n\n### Props Interface\n```typescript\ninterface VideoDetailPanelProps {\n  taskId: string\n  onClose?: () => void\n  className?: string\n}\n```\n\n### Implementation Template\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { useEffect, useState } from 'react'\nimport { createClient } from '@/lib/supabase'\nimport { VideoPlayer } from '@/components/tasks/VideoPlayer'\nimport { SummarySection } from '@/components/tasks/SummarySection'\nimport { ScriptTimeline } from '@/components/tasks/ScriptTimeline'\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'\nimport { X } from 'lucide-react'\nimport { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs'\n\nexport function VideoDetailPanel({ \n  taskId, \n  onClose, \n  className \n}: VideoDetailPanelProps) {\n  const [task, setTask] = useState(null)\n  const [outputs, setOutputs] = useState([])\n  const supabase = createClient()\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    // Fetch task and outputs\n    const fetchData = async () => {\n      const { data: taskData } = await supabase\n        .from('tasks')\n        .select('*')\n        .eq('id', taskId)\n        .single()\n      \n      const { data: outputsData } = await supabase\n        .from('task_outputs')\n        .select('*')\n        .eq('task_id', taskId)\n\n      setTask(taskData)\n      setOutputs(outputsData || [])\n    }\n\n    fetchData()\n\n    // Realtime subscription\n    const channel = supabase.channel(`task_${taskId}`)\n      .on('postgres_changes', {\n        event: '*',\n        schema: 'public',\n        table: 'tasks',\n        filter: `id=eq.${taskId}`\n      }, (payload) => {\n        setTask(payload.new)\n      })\n      .subscribe()\n\n    return () => {\n      supabase.removeChannel(channel)\n    }\n  }, [taskId])\n\n  if (!task) return <div className=\"p-4\">Loading...</div>\n\n  return (\n    <div className={cn(\"h-full flex flex-col\", className)}>\n      {/* Header */}\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-white/10\">\n        <h2 className=\"font-semibold truncate\">{task.video_title}</h2>\n        {onClose && (\n          <Button variant=\"ghost\" size=\"icon\" onClick={onClose}>\n            <X className=\"w-4 h-4\" />\n          </Button>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Content */}\n      <div className=\"flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 space-y-4\">\n        <VideoPlayer \n          videoUrl={task.video_url}\n          title={task.video_title}\n          coverUrl={task.thumbnail_url}\n        />\n\n        <Tabs defaultValue=\"summary\">\n          <TabsList>\n            <TabsTrigger value=\"summary\">Summary</TabsTrigger>\n            <TabsTrigger value=\"script\">Script</TabsTrigger>\n          </TabsList>\n\n          <TabsContent value=\"summary\">\n            <SummarySection \n              outputs={outputs}\n              taskTitle={task.video_title}\n            />\n          </TabsContent>\n\n          <TabsContent value=\"script\">\n            <ScriptTimeline \n              scriptRawContent={outputs.find(o => o.kind === 'script_raw')?.content}\n            />\n          </TabsContent>\n        </Tabs>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 5. LibrarySidebar\n\n**File Path**: `frontend/src/components/chat/LibrarySidebar.tsx`\n\n### Purpose\nSlide-out sidebar showing user's task history.\n\n### Props Interface\n```typescript\ninterface LibrarySidebarProps {\n  isOpen: boolean\n  onClose: () => void\n  onSelectTask: (taskId: string) => void\n}\n```\n\n### Implementation Template\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { useEffect, useState } from 'react'\nimport { createClient } from '@/lib/supabase'\nimport { Sheet, SheetContent, SheetHeader, SheetTitle } from '@/components/ui/sheet'\nimport { Input } from '@/components/ui/input'\nimport { Search } from 'lucide-react'\n\nexport function LibrarySidebar({ \n  isOpen, \n  onClose, \n  onSelectTask \n}: LibrarySidebarProps) {\n  const [tasks, setTasks] = useState([])\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('')\n  const supabase = createClient()\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (isOpen) {\n      fetchTasks()\n    }\n  }, [isOpen])\n\n  const fetchTasks = async () => {\n    const { data } = await supabase\n      .from('tasks')\n      .select('*')\n      .eq('status', 'completed')\n      .order('created_at', { ascending: false })\n      .limit(20)\n\n    setTasks(data || [])\n  }\n\n  const filteredTasks = tasks.filter(task =>\n    task.video_title?.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())\n  )\n\n  return (\n    <Sheet open={isOpen} onOpenChange={onClose}>\n      <SheetContent side=\"left\" className=\"w-[320px] p-0\">\n        <SheetHeader className=\"p-4 border-b\">\n          <SheetTitle>Library</SheetTitle>\n        </SheetHeader>\n\n        {/* Search */}\n        <div className=\"p-4\">\n          <div className=\"relative\">\n            <Search className=\"absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground\" />\n            <Input\n              placeholder=\"Search videos...\"\n              value={searchQuery}\n              onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}\n              className=\"pl-9\"\n            />\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Task List */}\n        <div className=\"overflow-y-auto\">\n          {filteredTasks.map(task => (\n            <button\n              key={task.id}\n              onClick={() => {\n                onSelectTask(task.id)\n                onClose()\n              }}\n              className=\"w-full text-left p-4 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors border-b border-white/5\"\n            >\n              <div className=\"font-medium truncate\">{task.video_title}</div>\n              <div className=\"text-sm text-muted-foreground\">\n                {new Date(task.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}\n              </div>\n            </button>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      </SheetContent>\n    </Sheet>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## ✅ Component Checklist\n\n**Before marking any component as complete**:\n\n- [ ] TypeScript types defined and exported\n- [ ] Props documented with JSDoc comments\n- [ ] Responsive behavior implemented (mobile/desktop)\n- [ ] Loading states handled\n- [ ] Error states handled\n- [ ] Accessibility attributes added (aria-*, role)\n- [ ] Unit tests written (if applicable)\n- [ ] Integrated with parent component\n\n**Next**: See `tasks/phase-2-frontend/task-2.1-chat-workspace.md` to start implementation.\n",
                "after": "# Component Specifications\n\n> **Purpose**: Technical specs for all new/refactored components  \n> **Audience**: Coding Agents, Frontend Developers  \n> **Format**: TypeScript interfaces + Implementation examples  \n> **Last Updated**: 2025-01-18\n\n---\n\n## ⚠️ Critical Dependency: AI SDK v6\n\n**IMPORTANT**: This project uses **AI SDK v6** (Vercel AI SDK). All implementations MUST use v6 APIs.\n\n```bash\n# Required packages (v6 ONLY)\nnpm install ai@^4.0.0 @ai-sdk/react@^1.0.0 @ai-sdk/openai@^1.0.0\n```\n\n**v6 Import Pattern**:\n```typescript\n// ✅ CORRECT - AI SDK v6\nimport { useChat } from '@ai-sdk/react'\n\n// ❌ WRONG - Old v3 pattern (DO NOT USE)\nimport { useChat } from 'ai/react'\n```\n\n**Key v6 Changes**:\n- `useChat` returns `{ messages, sendMessage, status }` (not `handleSubmit`)\n- Use `sendMessage({ content: string })` instead of form submission\n- `status` values: `'idle' | 'streaming' | 'error'`\n\n---\n\n## 📦 Component Hierarchy\n\n```\nChatWorkspace (New - Root Container)\n├── ChatContainer (New)\n│   ├── ChatMessages (Refactor AssistantChat)\n│   ├── MessageItem (New)\n│   │   ├── VideoCardMessage (New)\n│   │   ├── TextMessage (Exists)\n│   │   └── ProcessingMessage (New)\n│   └── ChatInput (New)\n│\n├── VideoDetailPanel (New)\n│   ├── VideoPlayer (Extract from TaskDetailClient)\n│   ├── SummarySection (Extract from TaskDetailClient)\n│   ├── ScriptTimeline (Reuse existing)\n│   └── MindMapView (Extract from TaskDetailClient)\n│\n└── LibrarySidebar (New)\n    ├── LibrarySearch (New)\n    └── TaskListItem (New)\n```\n\n---\n\n## 1. ChatWorkspace\n\n**File Path**: `frontend/src/components/chat/ChatWorkspace.tsx`\n\n### Purpose\nRoot container for the split-screen chat interface. Manages layout and state coordination between chat and video panel.\n\n### Props Interface\n```typescript\ninterface ChatWorkspaceProps {\n  // No props - uses URL params and context\n}\n```\n\n### Local State\n```typescript\nconst [isPanelOpen, setIsPanelOpen] = useState(false)\nconst [currentTaskId, setCurrentTaskId] = useState<string | null>(null)\nconst [isLibraryOpen, setIsLibraryOpen] = useState(false)\nconst [isMobile, setIsMobile] = useState(false)\n```\n\n### Implementation Template\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { useState, useEffect } from 'react'\nimport { useSearchParams } from 'next/navigation'\nimport { cn } from '@/lib/utils'\nimport { ChatContainer } from './ChatContainer'\nimport { VideoDetailPanel } from './VideoDetailPanel'\nimport { LibrarySidebar } from './LibrarySidebar'\n\nexport function ChatWorkspace() {\n  const searchParams = useSearchParams()\n  const taskId = searchParams.get('task')\n  \n  const [isPanelOpen, setIsPanelOpen] = useState(!!taskId)\n  const [currentTaskId, setCurrentTaskId] = useState<string | null>(taskId)\n  const [isLibraryOpen, setIsLibraryOpen] = useState(false)\n  const [isMobile, setIsMobile] = useState(false)\n\n  // Detect mobile\n  useEffect(() => {\n    const checkMobile = () => setIsMobile(window.innerWidth < 768)\n    checkMobile()\n    window.addEventListener('resize', checkMobile)\n    return () => window.removeEventListener('resize', checkMobile)\n  }, [])\n\n  // Open panel when task ID changes\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (taskId) {\n      setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n      setIsPanelOpen(true)\n    }\n  }, [taskId])\n\n  const handleTaskCreated = (newTaskId: string) => {\n    setCurrentTaskId(newTaskId)\n    setIsPanelOpen(true)\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"h-screen flex flex-col\">\n      {/* Top Bar */}\n      <header className=\"h-16 border-b border-white/10 flex items-center px-4 shrink-0\">\n        <button \n          onClick={() => setIsLibraryOpen(true)}\n          className=\"flex items-center gap-2\"\n        >\n          ☰ Library\n        </button>\n        <div className=\"flex-1\" />\n        {/* User menu */}\n      </header>\n\n      {/* Main Content */}\n      <div className=\"flex-1 flex overflow-hidden\">\n        <ChatContainer \n          className=\"flex-1 min-w-[400px]\"\n          onTaskCreated={handleTaskCreated}\n          onOpenPanel={(taskId) => {\n            setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n            setIsPanelOpen(true)\n          }}\n        />\n\n        {/* Desktop Panel */}\n        {!isMobile && (\n          <div \n            className={cn(\n              \"transition-all duration-300 border-l border-white/10 bg-background\",\n              isPanelOpen ? \"w-[40%]\" : \"w-0 opacity-0 overflow-hidden\"\n            )}\n          >\n            {currentTaskId && (\n              <VideoDetailPanel \n                taskId={currentTaskId}\n                onClose={() => setIsPanelOpen(false)}\n              />\n            )}\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Library Sidebar */}\n      <LibrarySidebar \n        isOpen={isLibraryOpen}\n        onClose={() => setIsLibraryOpen(false)}\n        onSelectTask={(taskId) => {\n          setCurrentTaskId(taskId)\n          setIsPanelOpen(true)\n          setIsLibraryOpen(false)\n        }}\n      />\n    </div>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n### Validation\n- [ ] Renders split-screen on desktop (≥1024px)\n- [ ] Panel animates smoothly (300ms)\n- [ ] URL param `?task=xxx` auto-opens panel\n- [ ] Library sidebar opens with `Cmd+K`\n\n---\n\n## 2. ChatContainer\n\n**File Path**: `frontend/src/components/chat/ChatContainer.tsx`\n\n### Purpose\nContains chat messages and input. Integrates with AI SDK for message handling.\n\n### Props Interface\n```typescript\ninterface ChatContainerProps {\n  className?: string\n  onTaskCreated?: (taskId: string) => void\n  onOpenPanel?: (taskId: string) => void\n}\n```\n\n### Implementation Template\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { useChat } from '@ai-sdk/react'\nimport { useState } from 'react'\nimport { ChatMessages } from './ChatMessages'\nimport { ChatInput } from './ChatInput'\n\nexport function ChatContainer({ \n  className, \n  onTaskCreated,\n  onOpenPanel \n}: ChatContainerProps) {\n  const { messages, sendMessage, status } = useChat({\n    api: '/api/chat',\n    onFinish: (message) => {\n      // Check if message contains task ID\n      const taskId = extractTaskId(message)\n      if (taskId && onTaskCreated) {\n        onTaskCreated(taskId)\n      }\n    }\n  })\n\n  const handleSubmit = async (content: string) => {\n    await sendMessage({ text: content })\n  }\n\n  return (\n    <div className={cn(\"flex flex-col h-full\", className)}>\n      <ChatMessages \n        messages={messages}\n        onOpenPanel={onOpenPanel}\n      />\n      <ChatInput \n        onSubmit={handleSubmit}\n        disabled={status === 'streaming'}\n      />\n    </div>\n  )\n}\n\nfunction extractTaskId(message: any): string | null {\n  // Parse message for task_id in tool call result\n  // Implementation depends on AI SDK message format\n  return null\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 3. VideoCardMessage\n\n**File Path**: `frontend/src/components/chat/messages/VideoCardMessage.tsx`\n\n### Purpose\nDisplays video processing status as a card in chat messages.\n\n### Props Interface\n```typescript\ninterface VideoCardMessageProps {\n  taskId: string\n  videoUrl: string\n  title?: string\n  thumbnailUrl?: string\n  status: 'processing' | 'completed' | 'failed'\n  progress?: number\n  onViewClick?: (taskId: string) => void\n}\n```\n\n### Implementation Template\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { Card } from '@/components/ui/card'\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'\nimport { Progress } from '@/components/ui/progress'\nimport { Loader2, CheckCircle, XCircle } from 'lucide-react'\n\nexport function VideoCardMessage({\n  taskId,\n  videoUrl,\n  title,\n  thumbnailUrl,\n  status,\n  progress = 0,\n  onViewClick\n}: VideoCardMessageProps) {\n  const StatusIcon = {\n    processing: Loader2,\n    completed: CheckCircle,\n    failed: XCircle\n  }[status]\n\n  return (\n    <Card className=\"p-4 max-w-sm\">\n      {/* Thumbnail */}\n      {thumbnailUrl && (\n        <img \n          src={thumbnailUrl} \n          alt={title}\n          className=\"w-full aspect-video object-cover rounded-lg mb-3\"\n        />\n      )}\n\n      {/* Title */}\n      <h3 className=\"font-semibold mb-2 line-clamp-2\">\n        {title || 'Processing video...'}\n      </h3>\n\n      {/* Status */}\n      <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-muted-foreground mb-3\">\n        <StatusIcon className={cn(\n          \"w-4 h-4\",\n          status === 'processing' && \"animate-spin\",\n          status === 'completed' && \"text-green-500\",\n          status === 'failed' && \"text-red-500\"\n        )} />\n        <span>\n          {status === 'processing' && `Processing (${progress}%)`}\n          {status === 'completed' && 'Ready'}\n          {status === 'failed' && 'Failed'}\n        </span>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Progress Bar */}\n      {status === 'processing' && (\n        <Progress value={progress} className=\"mb-3\" />\n      )}\n\n      {/* Action Button */}\n      {status === 'completed' && onViewClick && (\n        <Button \n          onClick={() => onViewClick(taskId)}\n          className=\"w-full\"\n        >\n          View Summary\n        </Button>\n      )}\n    </Card>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 4. VideoDetailPanel\n\n**File Path**: `frontend/src/components/chat/VideoDetailPanel.tsx`\n\n### Purpose\nRight-side panel displaying video player and analysis results. Reuses extracted components from TaskDetailClient.\n\n### Props Interface\n```typescript\ninterface VideoDetailPanelProps {\n  taskId: string\n  onClose?: () => void\n  className?: string\n}\n```\n\n### Implementation Template\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { useEffect, useState } from 'react'\nimport { createClient } from '@/lib/supabase'\nimport { VideoPlayer } from '@/components/tasks/VideoPlayer'\nimport { SummarySection } from '@/components/tasks/SummarySection'\nimport { ScriptTimeline } from '@/components/tasks/ScriptTimeline'\nimport { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'\nimport { X } from 'lucide-react'\nimport { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs'\n\nexport function VideoDetailPanel({ \n  taskId, \n  onClose, \n  className \n}: VideoDetailPanelProps) {\n  const [task, setTask] = useState(null)\n  const [outputs, setOutputs] = useState([])\n  const supabase = createClient()\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    // Fetch task and outputs\n    const fetchData = async () => {\n      const { data: taskData } = await supabase\n        .from('tasks')\n        .select('*')\n        .eq('id', taskId)\n        .single()\n      \n      const { data: outputsData } = await supabase\n        .from('task_outputs')\n        .select('*')\n        .eq('task_id', taskId)\n\n      setTask(taskData)\n      setOutputs(outputsData || [])\n    }\n\n    fetchData()\n\n    // Realtime subscription\n    const channel = supabase.channel(`task_${taskId}`)\n      .on('postgres_changes', {\n        event: '*',\n        schema: 'public',\n        table: 'tasks',\n        filter: `id=eq.${taskId}`\n      }, (payload) => {\n        setTask(payload.new)\n      })\n      .subscribe()\n\n    return () => {\n      supabase.removeChannel(channel)\n    }\n  }, [taskId])\n\n  if (!task) return <div className=\"p-4\">Loading...</div>\n\n  return (\n    <div className={cn(\"h-full flex flex-col\", className)}>\n      {/* Header */}\n      <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b border-white/10\">\n        <h2 className=\"font-semibold truncate\">{task.video_title}</h2>\n        {onClose && (\n          <Button variant=\"ghost\" size=\"icon\" onClick={onClose}>\n            <X className=\"w-4 h-4\" />\n          </Button>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Content */}\n      <div className=\"flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 space-y-4\">\n        <VideoPlayer \n          videoUrl={task.video_url}\n          title={task.video_title}\n          coverUrl={task.thumbnail_url}\n        />\n\n        <Tabs defaultValue=\"summary\">\n          <TabsList>\n            <TabsTrigger value=\"summary\">Summary</TabsTrigger>\n            <TabsTrigger value=\"script\">Script</TabsTrigger>\n          </TabsList>\n\n          <TabsContent value=\"summary\">\n            <SummarySection \n              outputs={outputs}\n              taskTitle={task.video_title}\n            />\n          </TabsContent>\n\n          <TabsContent value=\"script\">\n            <ScriptTimeline \n              scriptRawContent={outputs.find(o => o.kind === 'script_raw')?.content}\n            />\n          </TabsContent>\n        </Tabs>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 5. LibrarySidebar\n\n**File Path**: `frontend/src/components/chat/LibrarySidebar.tsx`\n\n### Purpose\nSlide-out sidebar showing user's task history.\n\n### Props Interface\n```typescript\ninterface LibrarySidebarProps {\n  isOpen: boolean\n  onClose: () => void\n  onSelectTask: (taskId: string) => void\n}\n```\n\n### Implementation Template\n```typescript\n'use client'\n\nimport { useEffect, useState } from 'react'\nimport { createClient } from '@/lib/supabase'\nimport { Sheet, SheetContent, SheetHeader, SheetTitle } from '@/components/ui/sheet'\nimport { Input } from '@/components/ui/input'\nimport { Search } from 'lucide-react'\n\nexport function LibrarySidebar({ \n  isOpen, \n  onClose, \n  onSelectTask \n}: LibrarySidebarProps) {\n  const [tasks, setTasks] = useState([])\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('')\n  const supabase = createClient()\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (isOpen) {\n      fetchTasks()\n    }\n  }, [isOpen])\n\n  const fetchTasks = async () => {\n    const { data } = await supabase\n      .from('tasks')\n      .select('*')\n      .eq('status', 'completed')\n      .order('created_at', { ascending: false })\n      .limit(20)\n\n    setTasks(data || [])\n  }\n\n  const filteredTasks = tasks.filter(task =>\n    task.video_title?.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())\n  )\n\n  return (\n    <Sheet open={isOpen} onOpenChange={onClose}>\n      <SheetContent side=\"left\" className=\"w-[320px] p-0\">\n        <SheetHeader className=\"p-4 border-b\">\n          <SheetTitle>Library</SheetTitle>\n        </SheetHeader>\n\n        {/* Search */}\n        <div className=\"p-4\">\n          <div className=\"relative\">\n            <Search className=\"absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground\" />\n            <Input\n              placeholder=\"Search videos...\"\n              value={searchQuery}\n              onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}\n              className=\"pl-9\"\n            />\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Task List */}\n        <div className=\"overflow-y-auto\">\n          {filteredTasks.map(task => (\n            <button\n              key={task.id}\n              onClick={() => {\n                onSelectTask(task.id)\n                onClose()\n              }}\n              className=\"w-full text-left p-4 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors border-b border-white/5\"\n            >\n              <div className=\"font-medium truncate\">{task.video_title}</div>\n              <div className=\"text-sm text-muted-foreground\">\n                {new Date(task.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}\n              </div>\n            </button>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      </SheetContent>\n    </Sheet>\n  )\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## ✅ Component Checklist\n\n**Before marking any component as complete**:\n\n- [ ] TypeScript types defined and exported\n- [ ] Props documented with JSDoc comments\n-
